name: SSG Brian Mast, U.S. Army (ret.)
subject: Leave No Man Behind
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
body:
Peter11 years ago this week, when I was serving as a bomb technician under Joint Special Operations Command in the Army, my life changed forever. I lost both legs and a finger when a roadside bomb blew up beneath me while in the Kandahar region of Afghanistan. If it weren't for the bravery and selflessness of my fellow soldiers, and the grace of God, I very well could have lost my life.What I remember most clearly from that day is my fellow soldiers sprinting towards the bomb instead of away from my motionless body. They rushed in the direction where an explosive device had just detonated, putting their own lives in danger to save mine.While I may have lost my ability to continue being an asset on the battlefield that day, I didn't lose my drive to keep fighting for our amazing country. So, I learned to walk again, graduated from college and set my sights on a new mission: restoring America First greatness to the United States.On this anniversary of that explosion, will you help me win this latest battle for the future of our country? [Join The Fight](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ctlba-ahkdjtlkr-r/) I wouldn't be alive today if it weren't for the most solemn of mantras: leave no man behind. Unfortunately, Joe Biden has done the exact opposite. He has abandoned Americans and our allies in Afghanistan, and in doing so, he has betrayed the men and women I served alongside. His behavior is completely unforgivable, and as a result, Joe Biden does not deserve to have the words "commander" or "chief" anywhere in his title.If you agree, please help me hold Joe Biden accountable for his betrayal and stop his disastrous America Last agenda: [Donate $25](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ctlba-ahkdjtlkr-y/) [Donate $50](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ctlba-ahkdjtlkr-j/) [Donate $100](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ctlba-ahkdjtlkr-t/) [DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ctlba-ahkdjtlkr-h/) I want to thank you all from the bottom of my heart for your support in letting me continue my service to our country in Congress. My prosthetic legs may hold me back from serving on the battlefield in Afghanistan, but I will always serve you and the America First movement in Congress with everything I've got! Sincerely,
SSG Brian Mast, U.S. Army (ret.) _Use of military images or rank does not imply endorsement by the U.S. Dept. of Defense or the U.S. Army._
[](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ctlba-ahkdjtlkr-k/)[](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ctlba-ahkdjtlkr-u/) | Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
P.O. Box 5048, Elm Grove, WI 53122 [Preferences](https://scottfitzgerald.updatemyprofile.com/t-ctlba-62D8F9CE-ahkdjtlkr-o) | [Unsubscribe](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-u-ctlba-ahkdjtlkr-b/)

name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: need input, not money
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
Can you spare just one minute and let me know what's on your mind?
| | | I hate to bother you on your Sunday, but this is critical:

There are just **four hours** left until my September Priorities Survey deadline, and my team noticed that I'm still missing your input.

Feedback from grassroots supporters like you is what powered our HISTORIC wins in 2020, and it's what will defend our House Majority from fringe, right-wing Republican attacks next year.

_**Let me be clear: All the momentum and money in the world won 't matter if my House Democrats and I aren't able to run a campaign powered by your on-the-ground priorities and perspectives.**_

That's why, before my survey closes in just four hours, I have to ask one last time:

_Can you spare just one minute and let me know what 's on your mind?_

**[https://action.dccc.org/survey/email/september-2021-priority-survey](https://links.e.dccc.)**
---

Thanks for your input,

Nancy
---

Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc.org/contact/) | www.dccc.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
---

This message was sent to: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/get-updates) | If you'd like to sign up for emails in a different account, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/get-updates).

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45644023&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjA4NDA5NTA1NwS2&l=13991902&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45644023&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjA4NDA5NTA1NwS2&l=13991902&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). If you'd like to make an online donation, click [here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dcccactblue?amount=25). Thanks for your support of Democrats!

Contributions or gifts to the DCCC are not tax deductible.
clean_body: Can you spare just one minute and let me know what's on your mind? | | | I hate to bother you on your Sunday, but this is critical: There are just four hours left until my September Priorities Survey deadline, and my team noticed that I'm still missing your input. Feedback from grassroots supporters like you is what powered our HISTORIC wins in 2020, and it's what will defend our House Majority from fringe, right-wing Republican attacks next year. Let me be clear: All the momentum and money in the world won 't matter if my House Democrats and I aren't able to run a campaign powered by your on-the-ground priorities and perspectives. That's why, before my survey closes in just four hours, I have to ask one last time: Can you spare just one minute and let me know what 's on your mind? Thanks for your input, Nancy Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | | www.dccc.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

Take it or else!

Dear Friend-

Were you paying attention to Biden's threats last week? If you don't submit to their demands and take the vaccine they may force you from your jobs. Big tech, cancel-mobs, and even members of Congress are trying to **penalize you for making health care decisions for yourself.**

We started [CaucusRoom.com](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdj439v552vpj6jihucnjd3rbvpeid86a6vg3ec8_rp22sh2s8i66pj2chj6eob1c9h2bs), a social network for conservatives because we need our own space to discuss these sweeping mandates with one another. Have you tried questioning vaccines on traditional social media? The anger and hatred directed at those **simply asking questions** has gotten way out of hand.

[CaucusRoom.com](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zv3eneiivbte0jvsij9crnkopauut4aeamnp1luo_rp22sh2s8i66pj2chj6eob1c9h2bs) is a place where we can work together to make our voices heard. So join us, get active, and help **promote freedom for generations to come** at [CaucusRoom.com](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfos4o0l9rm20bh8van751bd9nmbqc7llco24kv0_rp22sh2s8i66pj2chj6eob1c9h2bs).
Matt Knoedler

subject: Glenn Youngkin could win in Virginia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
Believe us
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36080021/307058856/-2023814932?refcode=20210920.1_538_9DX&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTE0OTc1ZS0wYzFhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rPi_RU_GFhAJ4X6oQ_V6DIDxFGBIj4z88dB9UM2mPfM=)

| | **Derek, Glenn Youngkin could really win in Virginia.**

Don’t just take it from us — election experts at _FiveThirtyEight_ laid it all out in a recent report, and right now, it’s looking like their prediction might be true.

The only way to stop Donald Trump’s handpicked candidate from becoming Virginia’s governor is by building the largest grassroots movement Virginia has ever seen.

Right now, we are $94,000 shy of reaching $5 million raised online to date — with your help, we can get to $5 million today.

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: "Get vaccinated or starve"
body:
Peter, **The Biden Administration just announced that all businesses with more than 100 employees will be FORCED to require COVID-19 vaccines for all employees.** In other words, Joe Biden is basically saying: _**" Get the**** ****vaccine or**** ****starve. "** _ **_I 'll be_**** _ _****_clear_**** _ _****_with you; The Center_**** _ _****_for_**** _ _****_American Liberty WILL sue the Biden Administration the second he enforces this outrageous, totalitarian mandate._** [**Will you support the Center for American**** ****Liberty**** ****to help us sue the Biden Administration for this completely unconstitutional vaccine order?** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58364389:JZyDMY2N0:m:1:3253819041:5913AA21D7C9378BEFAFF1B3594F1AE3:r) This isn't an empty threat. _**This is a PROMISE.** _ And the writing has been on the wall for months. First they locked you out of your houses of worship, schools, and closed small businesses... ...then they forced you to wear masks. Now Joe Biden and the rest of his authoritarian minions are going to stop you from making a living and _**feeding your family if you don 't get the COVID vaccine.** _ They don't care about your right to religious freedom... They don't care about your right to medical privacy... They don't care about your right to determine how you should live your life... The only thing that matters to Joe Biden and the radical Left is that you obey. [**That 's why I'm urgently asking you to help us stop this totalitarian takeover of our lives by sending a tax-deductible gift of $35 or more to the Center for American Liberty today. **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58364389:JZyDMY2N0:m:1:3253819041:5913AA21D7C9378BEFAFF1B3594F1AE3:r) If we don't stand up HERE and NOW it will never end. But we can't do this without you. My name is Harmeet Dhillon, and I founded the Center for American Liberty to push back against these kinds of threats to our civil liberties. And Biden's UNCONSTITUTIONAL order mandating that employers require COVID-19 vaccination is perhaps his worst offense yet. Forget about the astounding hypocrisy. For years they've shouted, "my body, my choice." But it's clear that they only care about "your body" and "your choice" when it fits their political narrative. And if we don't take immediate action against the Biden Administration's new vaccine mandate - your right to make your own medical decisions... your right to individual freedom will disappear overnight. [**That 's why I'm asking you to help us prepare for one of the most important legal battles of our lives with a gift of $35 or more today.** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58364389:JZyDMY2N0:m:1:3253819041:5913AA21D7C9378BEFAFF1B3594F1AE3:r) If we don't fight to keep our freedoms today, they'll be gone tomorrow. Thank you in advance for standing with us and for liberty. Sincerely, Harmeet K. Dhillon [**DONATE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58364389:JZyDMY2N0:m:1:3253819041:5913AA21D7C9378BEFAFF1B3594F1AE3:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58364389:JZyDMY2N0:m:1:3253819041:5913AA21D7C9378BEFAFF1B3594F1AE3:r) [Please consider supporting our efforts to defend our Constitution with a donation today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58364389:JZyDMY2N0:m:1:3253819041:5913AA21D7C9378BEFAFF1B3594F1AE3:r) The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free-speech and anti-civil liberties trends.

name: Eddie Geller
subject: Who this campaign is for (hint: not me)
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EDDIE GELLER FOR CONGRESS
body:
When I launched this campaign, I hoped I could channel the frustration with our politics that so many people feel. And that hope has found legs — I’ve heard from so many Floridians in the last few days who are fed up with what’s happening in Washington and who want to see something different. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36085484/307077122/476879738?refcode=fl_email_onb_2021onboarding2_EG_new_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MzNjZTc2MS0xNzFhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aaaVuAucb2NO1wmGpxSrEb6a8uLTQYRDNwaL9lhSFtc=)
---
Friends, When I launched this campaign, I hoped I could channel the frustration with our politics that so many people feel. And that hope has found legs — I’ve heard from so many Floridians who are fed up with what’s happening in Washington and who want to see something different. Here’s the most important thing I want you to know: **It’s not too late.** We are running out of time, there’s no doubt about that, but it’s still not too late. If we organize, give our time and dollars when we can (maybe write some catchy jingles and [make some fun videos](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36085485/307077130/476879738?refcode=fl_email_onb_2021onboarding2_EG_new_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MzNjZTc2MS0xNzFhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aaaVuAucb2NO1wmGpxSrEb6a8uLTQYRDNwaL9lhSFtc=) along the way), and _keep bringing up the issues_ , we can 1. beat the money machine also known as the Republican Party, 2. bring real representation to Congress, and 3. bring new voters into the fold who’ve previously felt that politics had nothing to offer them. With a representative in Congress who will be a voice for the people (me!), we _can_ fight back against corruption. We can provide good jobs and affordable healthcare to every American. We _can_ mitigate the effects of climate change before we all end up living in houseboats. **Because at its heart, this campaign is about you. Not me and not my opponent (don’t worry, Scott, we’ll get to you eventually). It’s about you.** My promise to you, right now, with 400 plus days until the election, is that I’ll listen to you every step of the way. I want to know what keeps you up at night. I want to know what keeps you going. [So, can you take our quick survey to shape this campaign into one that’s all about fighting for you and your families? Every bit of input helps us figure out what matters most to the people I plan to serve in Congress.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36085486/307077137/-203670597?refcode=fl_email_onb_2021onboarding2_EG_new_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MzNjZTc2MS0xNzFhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aaaVuAucb2NO1wmGpxSrEb6a8uLTQYRDNwaL9lhSFtc=&emci=9f4b4f73-9f09-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=933ce761-171a-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=12772398) [_****_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36085487/307077139/-203670597?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MzNjZTc2MS0xNzFhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aaaVuAucb2NO1wmGpxSrEb6a8uLTQYRDNwaL9lhSFtc=&emci=9f4b4f73-9f09-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=933ce761-171a-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=12772398) | [Take the survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36085488/307077140/-203670597?refcode=fl_email_onb_2021onboarding2_EG_new_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MzNjZTc2MS0xNzFhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aaaVuAucb2NO1wmGpxSrEb6a8uLTQYRDNwaL9lhSFtc=&emci=9f4b4f73-9f09-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=933ce761-171a-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=12772398)
---
Thanks for joining me on this ride,
Eddie

P.S. [If you haven’t watched this launch video I made, you really, really should. Right now. Watch it right now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36085489/307077141/476879738?refcode=fl_email_onb_2021onboarding2_EG_new_xx_ftr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MzNjZTc2MS0xNzFhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aaaVuAucb2NO1wmGpxSrEb6a8uLTQYRDNwaL9lhSFtc=)

name: Tyler Harper for Georgia
subject: ICYMI: TYLER HARPER'S "AGRICULTURE BONA FIDES" TOUTED BY ALBANY HERALD
body:
---
| | | | | | | |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE MONDAY, SEPTEMBER 20, 2021
---
| ICYMI: TYLER HARPER'S "AGRICULTURE BONA FIDES" TOUTED BY ALBANY HERALD
---
| OCILLA - In case you missed it, Tyler Harper was featured in the Albany Herald, where a [recent article](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00153HkAxaaAQ3kpvQJZy_u4HSHhLx3t0jouWfQ0HQOHZuOjothGuZ95CgtIr-vleu9ZeI6-LezM_eH93ZTjvCL6rPCsGmoUuW-gxcVJb6VsogNN-ddOzVHfH6AdHZZrjC1cSRLTjfEmVdcwzrvW_SlbqTuCUPp1ouifYNAo12-hJ-BkbaLUlZ54ZRxXb0G87Omra734m6fGaSpQcUudIgO2zmZXHv81TFgWNAblzNRO5-YGbfKXNnYjeiJ3-iP7E8QN1yCte_ghDI58FemjKSrHaZ2Ztnm3N5XGHcAJdwdgig=&c=u05M_TrlcPleaWE4Rd0lJVho0VirN21VAo-X7s3sg-z5uV7dCHwp0g==&ch=HOp7-SyzwI0J32kxoB3_P1GulWIbul5Dt0GYhhSwZLfSEj7eciYKBA==) touted Tyler's "agriculture bona fides" in his campaign to be Georgia's next Agriculture Commissioner. The article discusses Tyler's South Georgia roots, his experience working on his family farm, and his conservative vision to boost our state's agriculture industry and fight for local producers and consumers across the state, stating, "it's difficult to imagine a more qualified candidate than Harper."
Click [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00153HkAxaaAQ3kpvQJZy_u4HSHhLx3t0jouWfQ0HQOHZuOjothGuZ95CgtIr-vleu9ZeI6-LezM_eH93ZTjvCL6rPCsGmoUuW-gxcVJb6VsogNN-ddOzVHfH6AdHZZrjC1cSRLTjfEmVdcwzrvW_SlbqTuCUPp1ouifYNAo12-hJ-BkbaLUlZ54ZRxXb0G87Omra734m6fGaSpQcUudIgO2zmZXHv81TFgWNAblzNRO5-YGbfKXNnYjeiJ3-iP7E8QN1yCte_ghDI58FemjKSrHaZ2Ztnm3N5XGHcAJdwdgig=&c=u05M_TrlcPleaWE4Rd0lJVho0VirN21VAo-X7s3sg-z5uV7dCHwp0g==&ch=HOp7-SyzwI0J32kxoB3_P1GulWIbul5Dt0GYhhSwZLfSEj7eciYKBA==) or read below for the full article:
---
| [Ocilla's Tyler Harper has the agriculture bona fides](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00153HkAxaaAQ3kpvQJZy_u4HSHhLx3t0jouWfQ0HQOHZuOjothGuZ95CgtIr-vleu9ZeI6-LezM_eH93ZTjvCL6rPCsGmoUuW-gxcVJb6VsogNN-ddOzVHfH6AdHZZrjC1cSRLTjfEmVdcwzrvW_SlbqTuCUPp1ouifYNAo12-hJ-BkbaLUlZ54ZRxXb0G87Omra734m6fGaSpQcUudIgO2zmZXHv81TFgWNAblzNRO5-YGbfKXNnYjeiJ3-iP7E8QN1yCte_ghDI58FemjKSrHaZ2Ztnm3N5XGHcAJdwdgig=&c=u05M_TrlcPleaWE4Rd0lJVho0VirN21VAo-X7s3sg-z5uV7dCHwp0g==&ch=HOp7-SyzwI0J32kxoB3_P1GulWIbul5Dt0GYhhSwZLfSEj7eciYKBA==)
While it would be nice -- though impossible in today's ultra-partisan atmosphere -- to throw out all the stereotypical political hoo-hah that now inundates every element of modern-day life and talk about what really matters, that's just not reality.
And that's sad when it comes to a political candidate like Tyler Harper, who is seeking to replace Gary Black as Georgia's Agriculture Commissioner. Because Harper, an Ocilla Republican, is much more than a politician. He's more than a catchy slogan, more than the favorite of his party, more than a fixture in the state's 7th Senate District. He is, quite simply, the person who, if you drew up the qualifications for the Ag Commissioner position, he'd check off every box.
And while Georgia remains a "red" state, despite its support for Democrats Joe Biden, Raphael Warnock and Jon Ossoff in the last election cycle, Democrats, Independents and Republicans alike should be looking for candidates who, for one thing, actually know about the offices they seek. Given that criteria, it's difficult to imagine a more qualified candidate than Harper.
To wit, Harper has:
* An Ag Engineering degree from the University of Georgia (after picking up an associate's degree at Tifton's Abraham Baldwin Agricultural College);
* Supported in the state Senate and helped push through legislation that's had a significantly positive impact on rural Georgians, including farm tax relief and rural broadband;
* Earned during his almost 10 years in the Senate the respect and trust of a great many of his peers in the state Legislature.

But, most of all, Harper has, in his own words, "been involved in the ag industry since I was old enough to work."
Indeed, the Ocilla native, a seventh-generation farmer, has worked on -- and continues to run -- his family's farm on land that the Harpers have owned for more than a century. He serves on the state Senate's Natural Resources, Public Safety, and Agriculture committees. He also is the Agriculture & Rural Development vice chairman of the Southern Legislative Conference and previously served as president of the Georgia Young Farmers Association.
"I'm proud of my record in the Senate," Harper said. "My record shows that, during my time in the Legislature, I have worked tirelessly to push issues that impact the 7th District, issues that affect rural Georgia. But I also have championed statewide issues that I thought were important to all Georgians. Among those are agriculture, natural resources and public safety issues.
"When Gary (Black) announced that he was going to run for the U.S. Senate, and thus vacate the Ag Commissioner's office in 2022, I started thinking about having a bigger voice in the state, having a bigger impact. That's one of the reasons I decided to run. I have the passion for the ag industry, I know it inside and out from my work in the industry, and I know what it takes to fight for Georgia farmers so that their work remains the No. 1 industry in the state. I don't know who might ultimately decide to run for the office, but I do know my background compares most favorably to anyone who might decide to run."
Harper said his primary concern as Agriculture Commissioner would be to make sure that the state's "food chain" is delivered "safe and protected."
"Our nation's food supply chain is certainly a national security issue," he said. "I believe recent events have shown that we have to put renewed focus on that issue. America feeds its people and much of the world, and we have to continue to make sure we shine a light on that fact. We must invest in the technology and the human capital it takes to keep Georgia growers and producers competitive in the worldwide markets.
"We also need to keep expanding ag education on down to the elementary level -- K-12 -- so that the next generation can know that there are a lot of opportunities in the ag industry beyond production. And we want to make sure new and beginning farmers have access to ag capital so that they can become a part of the process."
The candidate says he feel that his team has developed a good plan to run for statewide office.
"Obviously, Georgia is a big state," he said. "And, yes, running for statewide office is a whole different ballgame. But the 10-county 7th Senate District is the largest, landwise, in the state, so I'm used to traveling. We just had to be a little more methodical in our planning.
"I've been to Atlanta, to Savannah to Kingsland, from Columbus to Macon to Decatur County to the (Interstate) 285 doughnut. I've been to Albany and all over south Georgia. I've been from one corner of the state to the other, just meeting the people, telling them what I wanted to do as Agriculture Commissioner. So far, I've been encouraged by the reception. I don't make a lot of promises, but I do promise the people of Georgia I will work hard. It's what I've always done."
---

---

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | | | | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE MONDAY, SEPTEMBER 20, 2021 | ICYMI: TYLER HARPER'S "AGRICULTURE BONA FIDES" TOUTED BY ALBANY HERALD | OCILLA - In case you missed it, Tyler Harper was featured in the Albany Herald, where a == touted Tyler's "agriculture bona fides" in his campaign to be Georgia's next Agriculture Commissioner. The article discusses Tyler's South Georgia roots, his experience working on his family farm, and his conservative vision to boost our state's agriculture industry and fight for local producers and consumers across the state, stating, "it's difficult to imagine a more qualified candidate than Harper." Click == or read below for the full article: | == While it would be nice -- though impossible in today's ultra-partisan atmosphere -- to throw out all the stereotypical political hoo-hah that now inundates every element of modern-day life and talk about what really matters, that's just not reality. And that's sad when it comes to a political candidate like Tyler Harper, who is seeking to replace Gary Black as Georgia's Agriculture Commissioner. Because Harper, an Ocilla Republican, is much more than a politician. He's more than a catchy slogan, more than the favorite of his party, more than a fixture in the state's 7th Senate District. He is, quite simply, the person who, if you drew up the qualifications for the Ag Commissioner position, he'd check off every box. And while Georgia remains a "red" state, despite its support for Democrats Joe Biden, Raphael Warnock and Jon Ossoff in the last election cycle, Democrats, Independents and Republicans alike should be looking for candidates who, for one thing, actually know about the offices they seek. Given that criteria, it's difficult to imagine a more qualified candidate than Harper. To wit, Harper has: An Ag Engineering degree from the University of Georgia (after picking up an associate's degree at Tifton's Abraham Baldwin Agricultural College); Supported in the state Senate and helped push through legislation that's had a significantly positive impact on rural Georgians, including farm tax relief and rural broadband; * Earned during his almost 10 years in the Senate the respect and trust of a great many of his peers in the state Legislature. But, most of all, Harper has, in his own words, "been involved in the ag industry since I was old enough to work." Indeed, the Ocilla native, a seventh-generation farmer, has worked on -- and continues to run -- his family's farm on land that the Harpers have owned for more than a century. He serves on the state Senate's Natural Resources, Public Safety, and Agriculture committees. He also is the Agriculture & Rural Development vice chairman of the Southern Legislative Conference and previously served as president of the Georgia Young Farmers Association. "I'm proud of my record in the Senate," Harper said. "My record shows that, during my time in the Legislature, I have worked tirelessly to push issues that impact the 7th District, issues that affect rural Georgia. But I also have championed statewide issues that I thought were important to all Georgians. Among those are agriculture, natural resources and public safety issues. "When Gary (Black) announced that he was going to run for the U.S. Senate, and thus vacate the Ag Commissioner's office in 2022, I started thinking about having a bigger voice in the state, having a bigger impact. That's one of the reasons I decided to run. I have the passion for the ag industry, I know it inside and out from my work in the industry, and I know what it takes to fight for Georgia farmers so that their work remains the No. 1 industry in the state. I don't know who might ultimately decide to run for the office, but I do know my background compares most favorably to anyone who might decide to run." Harper said his primary concern as Agriculture Commissioner would be to make sure that the state's "food chain" is delivered "safe and protected." "Our nation's food supply chain is certainly a national security issue," he said. "I believe recent events have shown that we have to put renewed focus on that issue. America feeds its people and much of the world, and we have to continue to make sure we shine a light on that fact. We must invest in the technology and the human capital it takes to keep Georgia growers and producers competitive in the worldwide markets. "We also need to keep expanding ag education on down to the elementary level -- K-12 -- so that the next generation can know that there are a lot of opportunities in the ag industry beyond production. And we want to make sure new and beginning farmers have access to ag capital so that they can become a part of the process." The candidate says he feel that his team has developed a good plan to run for statewide office. "Obviously, Georgia is a big state," he said. "And, yes, running for statewide office is a whole different ballgame. But the 10-county 7th Senate District is the largest, landwise, in the state, so I'm used to traveling. We just had to be a little more methodical in our planning. "I've been to Atlanta, to Savannah to Kingsland, from Columbus to Macon to Decatur County to the (Interstate) 285 doughnut. I've been to Albany and all over south Georgia. I've been from one corner of the state to the other, just meeting the people, telling them what I wanted to do as Agriculture Commissioner. So far, I've been encouraged by the reception. I don't make a lot of promises, but I do promise the people of Georgia I will work hard. It's what I've always done." | | | | Visit www.tylerharperga.com to stay up to date with the campaign, sign up to volunteer, and donate. name: Hala Ayala
subject: This is a long email, but I mean every word
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Way Ahead PO Box 597
body:
| | | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/M8mFujGWL0GyAukTGVl_P7fJO2vvKHHYSXGr17e3rus=/zo7F3Syu4iSzFsTM8ItAEHlBfnt6i_KKcyAzcf3BEVo=)
---
Hi there, friend: I'm going to ask you to chip in $5 at the end of this long email. [**It would mean so much to me if you read the whole thing and considered donating $5 toward our $20,000 fundraising goal.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/M8mFujGWL0GyAukTGVl_P7fJO2vvKHHYSXGr17e3rus=/zo7F3Syu4iSzFsTM8ItAEHlBfnt6i_KKcyAzcf3BEVo=) I am a Virginian, born and raised. **And I uniquely understand the struggles of so many working families in our state -- because I 've lived them.** Growing up, my immigrant family struggled to make ends meet. And when I was pregnant, my job didn't offer health insurance. When my son had health complications, Medicaid saved our lives. From then on, I built my cybersecurity career while being a single mom. I'm proud of where I came from, and I was so proud to bring a voice to Virginia's 51st District as their Delegate since 2017. **As your Lt. Governor, I 'm committed to celebrating Virginia's growing diversity and supporting Virginians of all backgrounds.** The hard-working people of Virginia deserve a Lt. Governor who understands their struggles and works side by side with them to lift them up. [**I can 't wait to do this together, friend! But this won't be possible if we fall short on Election Day this November. So I'm personally asking: Will you chip in $5 today to my campaign? Every dollar counts in a race like this one.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/M8mFujGWL0GyAukTGVl_P7fJO2vvKHHYSXGr17e3rus=/zo7F3Syu4iSzFsTM8ItAEHlBfnt6i_KKcyAzcf3BEVo=) Grateful for your support, friend. _Hala Ayala_ Democratic Nominee for Virginia Lt. Governor

name: Dave Giles for Congress
subject: Protect Against Invasion
body:
Hello Peter! Favor the Constitution then Favor Dave Giles! __ "Article IV, Section 4." The Unit
| | |
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/261510?id=3975468.4447.1.19ed773287d377e3a5657d67655ec623)
---
**__Hello Peter!** **Favor the Constitution
then
Favor Dave Giles!**
__
"**Article IV, Section 4**."
_The United States shall guarantee to every State in this Union a Republican Form of Government, and shall protect each of them against**Invasion** ; and on Application of the Legislature, or of the Executive (when the Legislature cannot be convened) against domestic **Violence**._ Meaning:
The Federal Government has the responsibility to make sure
to protect the states against foreign invasion
or internal insurrection. We have an **Invasion** on the southern border.
We have domestic **Violence** in democratic states.
__
Democrats support the Invasion, condone the Violence
and continue to fail us.
I’m demanding accountability from the failed democrats.
**I will fight to protect our Constitutional Rights**
---
We can Take District Nine and **"Stop the Madness"**.
---
| | [ Support Our Constitution ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/261510?id=3975468.4448.1.45d381b5660f142c44662be47594dc21)
---
Sincerely,

---
|
---
**Dave Giles**
Candidate
United States Congress
Arizona's 9th District

name: Lesley Shinbaum, Team Jay
subject: FW: My opponent's comments are anti-Semitic and have no place in our Commonwealth
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Friends of Jay Jones
body:
Friend,
As a Jewish woman, I am proud to with an inclusive, compassionate man like Jay.
Meanwhile, Virginia Republicans still won't condemn [anti-Semitism](https://act.myngp.com/el/5fUf0A2O1KQvHciEw7EprBWuLftlejI6s5dV4RAQS2o=/WAw8s6EBBf6OQ2tWe7KI0KCF8XhApd6NVLksJrbyedI=?wvpId=466942c0-9340-4164-94a8-d2e6b51e7655) directed at the first female and first Jewish Speaker of the House in Virginia's history.
I say all of this because the choice is clear this November: we must protect our Democratic Majority so that we can build on the progress we've made.
**[Join me by contributing $5 or more to Jay 's campaign today!](https://act.myngp.com/el/5fUf0A2O1KQvHciEw7EprBWuLftlejI6s5dV4RAQS2o=/54XJkX1UE5SckRbAEy1mVEOtIoGmXxRjBQdbJ3IL7XM=)**
We can't turn back the clocks on our progress, and with Jay and our Democratic slate, Virginia will remain welcoming to all.
Best,
Lesley Shinbaum
Finance Director, Friends of Jay Jones
_Begin forwarded message:_
| | | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/5fUf0A2O1KQvHciEw7EprBWuLftlejI6s5dV4RAQS2o=/G0js4XLCDhyGUjxDL5dd7wJ6aJcbriqskiOI3WJbY7A=)
---
Friend -- Last night, my Republican opponent Hahns Copeland made vile, anti-Semitic [comments](https://act.myngp.com/el/5fUf0A2O1KQvHciEw7EprBWuLftlejI6s5dV4RAQS2o=/aj86bTyS76uffI4D45yW7qwDkpmTGa9xlkc_UysRoN4=?s=20) on Twitter attacking my friend and colleague House Speaker Eileen Filler-Corn. And what did Glenn Youngkin and his cronies have to say about it? Nothing. Let me be clear: Hahns Copeland is a bigot, and his dangerous, hateful rhetoric has no place in our Commonwealth or the 89th District. [**That 's why I'm asking you directly for a contribution today so we can defeat Hahns Copeland and Glenn Youngkin and keep Virginia blue this November.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/5fUf0A2O1KQvHciEw7EprBWuLftlejI6s5dV4RAQS2o=/54XJkX1UE5SckRbAEy1mVEOtIoGmXxRjBQdbJ3IL7XM=) I'm working hard every day to win re-election to the House and help elect Democrats up and down the ticket, but extreme Republicans like Glenn Youngkin and Hahns Copeland will stop at nothing to turn back the clocks on the progress we've made with their divisive rhetoric and bigotry. This Commonwealth needs fresh voices and ideas as we enter this new Virginia decade that reflect who we are, what we value, and where we're going. My commitment to giving a voice to those left behind is unflinching, and we will work tirelessly over the years ahead to make Virginia stronger and more just for every citizen. That starts with keeping our Democratic Majority in the House and securing another statewide sweep this year. [**I hope you will join me by making a contribution today!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/5fUf0A2O1KQvHciEw7EprBWuLftlejI6s5dV4RAQS2o=/54XJkX1UE5SckRbAEy1mVEOtIoGmXxRjBQdbJ3IL7XM=) This is too important. Our future depends on it. \- Jay Jones

# ** — Joe Biden doesn’t want you to see what’s happening at the border.**

---
Just a few days ago, his FAA tried to block media coverage of the border crisis. I’ve taken immediate action to investigate the FAA and what role Biden’s White House played in the decision.

**Tucker Carlson just covered our efforts.[Will you watch here, then let me know if you agree that the American people need to see what’s happening at the border? ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/1cee80d685b972e4/8d3a003b0d5c4e54c3d6b838967d376c)**
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/1cee80d685b972e4/24ae56442ac2a2d3c3d6b838967d376c)
Joe Biden and Kamala Harris promised open borders and sweeping amnesty. Their policies have created a national security crisis and a public health crisis. And they’re not doing a thing to stop it.

They think they can just sweep this under the rug and block you from being able to see what’s really going on. **We aren’t going to let them.**
** **
**I went to the border earlier this year and saw the crisis firsthand. Believe me, Kansans and Americans need to see the crisis that Joe Biden’s agenda has created.**
** **
[**And I’m going to keep fighting to ensure they can. I hope you’ll stand with me NOW.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/1cee80d685b972e4/cf81a5bafe2e023ec3d6b838967d376c)

Doc is defending life. He's standing for our jobs, our families, and our faith.

**He's taking our Kansas values to the U.S. Senate, but he can't get it done without your help.**

Representative Paul Gosar (R-AZ) is a danger to our democracy. Don't believe us? Just ask his family.

Rep. Gosar is so dangerous that his own family has spoken out _on multiple_ occasions against him. They made a video in support of his opponent in 2018 and his brothers went on CNN to apologize for Paul's "despicable" response to the January 6 attack on our Capitol.

So why are his family members such outspoken critics? Let's take a look at some of what Representative Gosar has done:
* Peddled Trump's election fraud lies and voted to reject the results of the 2020 election,
* Called the violent white supremacist mob that attacked our Capitol "peaceful protestors,"
* Attended multiple events with a white-nationalist activist who described Gosar in Congress as "a reason for hope,"
* Promoted dangerous QAnon conspiracy theories.

And that's just to name a few.

Representative Paul Gosar is a danger to our democracy. We can't afford for him to remain in Congress any longer, that's why we're working to defeat Rep. Gosar next year and replace him with a leader who will defend our democracy.

**[Are you with us? Rush a donation of $5 or more right away to help us defeat Representative Paul Gosar.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/36095782/307117835/-1542473972?refcode=em21_210920_gosar_adv_gq_act___tnap_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210920_gosar_adv_gq_act___tnap_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYxMGUwYmJmLTJjMWEtZWMxMS05ODFmLTUwMWFjNTdiYTNlZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=LnRvUhgAtJL7t4XE6g1T8ie8unmq1oSBdL6Z_KJfgIY=)**

Right now we’re facing an uphill battle this November. Recent polling has shown the Virginia Governor’s race in a dead heat, and we’ve got to work as hard as we can to ensure that Virginia stays blue.

We fought to protect the Affordable Care Act and took the fight all the way to the Supreme Court -- where we won. Since then, we’ve made sure that DREAMers could get an affordable education in Virginia and that immigrants feel welcome. We blocked Trump’s un-American Muslim ban in the courts, took on big pharma, and led in the fight for criminal justice reform. Mark Herring | Paid for by Common Good Virginia | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Terry McAuliffe, please .

name: Team Salud
subject: So much at stake
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Salud Carbajal for Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/NfuVnjYIgmlDgezxAoYvRuV2axo2Vl7CFD70HvUKmYk=/bZmnwFO9jT6zFJHL35J9VHOYmlDpOW11yZs6XivVAmM=?am=&recipientId=cDmLEpJFmDvVxlWX7upKG1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)
Californians had a lot to celebrate last week. On Tuesday, common sense prevailed and voters soundly rejected the recall of Governor Newsom.
Voters saw what was happening in other states under Republican leadership \-- fights over mask mandates, rising COVID cases, women losing the right to make decisions about their own bodies and healthcare -- and sent a clear message: we don't want those types of leaders running our state.
But while we may pause and celebrate, we also can't take our eyes off the prize: keeping a Democratic Majority in the House.
[**_Will you chip in today to support Salud Carbajal for Congress and keep our Majority strong?_**](https://act.myngp.com/el/NfuVnjYIgmlDgezxAoYvRuV2axo2Vl7CFD70HvUKmYk=/bZmnwFO9jT6zFJHL35J9VHOYmlDpOW11yZs6XivVAmM=?am=&recipientId=cDmLEpJFmDvVxlWX7upKG1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)
Our quarterly fundraising deadline closes on September 30, and right-wing Republican strategists are looking for districts to run challengers in. We saw the vast amount of resources Governor Newsom had to spend fending off Republican challengers and we don't want to have to do the same in our district.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/NfuVnjYIgmlDgezxAoYvRuV2axo2Vl7CFD70HvUKmYk=/bZmnwFO9jT6zFJHL35J9VHOYmlDpOW11yZs6XivVAmM=?am=&recipientId=cDmLEpJFmDvVxlWX7upKG1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)
Please help us fund our campaign now so we can keep Salud Carbajal fighting for our Democratic values in Congress. Your donation will keep our House Majority strong. Thank you for your support.

My team and I can’t wait to read your responses. \-- Elaine | | We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, . If you’d like to remove yourself from our list, please click . If you'd like to support Elaine for Congress, click below to make a donation! | | = Paid for by Elaine for Congress PO Box 66191 Virginia Beach, VA 23466 United States Elaine Luria is a retired member of the US Navy. Use of her military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the US Navy or the Department of Defense._

name: Marco Rubio
subject: [update] here’s what I’mseeing on the ground
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
The latest FEC filings show that Liberal fundraising just hit an all-time-high this year
[View this message in your browser](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z7c0ekpv2aj7ean8m6ve8tp8me6fg4256url0hg0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkorr7djl69pn8cbkmdqj6drh6ej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfcstimgrjddb2cjib4o5hm1r70p5kcir3ccrje3gj1pj4edpbecbme8r34sjjc1jt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or0eap6cc5kmmpm0slicor61cj26pp238h1e8he4933cph68pb3cph61oh5u)
****
If we fail, Republicans up and down the ballot will be completely overwhelmed and the battle for the control of Congress will be lost...
****This is Marco Rubio:
I just reviewed the latest YouGov polls and my stomach just DROPPED. TWO back-to-back polls show Democrats ahead by SEVEN POINTS. That was a hard pill to swallow, but that's not even the worst of it...
The latest FEC filings show that Liberal fundraising just hit an all-time-high this year. [**At this point, defeat is a near certainty unless we respond in record time!**](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z60l9ctcblj3fu0ei9ilef17fp6cboum6p9blis8_rp22sh2s8i66pj2chim6pj2c3h2bs)[****](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z9nt15jc58qnpj2plt4kesvnienq2d6li6u8pbao_rp22sh2s8i66pj2chim6pj2c3h2bs)
Here's what I'm seeing on the ground:****
****
* House Democrats just raked in $11.3 million
* Senate Democrats already raised $6.5 million
* Republicans are trailing in the latest YouGov polls
* And in my own race, the ARCHITECT OF TRUMP'S IMPEACHMENT pulled in $4.6 million...

**All told, Democrats are crushing us in fundraising.**
This is an emergency. I'm teaming up with Republican Whip Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME because, together, we need to rally [**15,000 American Patriots**](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z7pluugis1q5csmnt0kd1v0fl5jg79cbuksj18eg_rp22sh2s8i66pj2chim6pj2c3h2bs) to pitch in before midnight tomorrow. **If we fail, Republicans up and down the ballot will be completely overwhelmed and the battle for the control of Congress will be lost...**
But if every last American Patriot on this list -- including you -- steps up in the next 24 hours, we win.
We're behind in the polls. Liberal fundraising is surging. Our window to catch up is closing by the second. [**Please help us, we 're running out of time.**](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zue52c81km8muiva51d4cdhk4dkmsfaapbc6mjr0_rp22sh2s8i66pj2chim6pj2c3h2bs)
Thanks for all you do,
\-- _Marco_ _Rubio_ | _Senator from Florida_

disclaimer_text: Paid For By Becker for Congress
body:
I have been quickly identified as the progressive Democrats' worst nightmare: A Republican woman with staunch conservative credentials, who proved tha A Republican woman with staunch conservative credentials, who proved that you can have a family and a successful career, an American patriot that dismantles the Left’s narrative that the GOP is for men and misogynists – I’m hoping that you’ll help me become the woman that takes back the House for Republicans in 2022. | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ad290cc731b544118ab467645476c35a&_e=K4nF1GKY_pFy2FpqRrGIRm-7QEXaxXpv8Z2Tyg3zHeYiFCCgaYQn3HTNjz-VpmU3yd2eTHhFRCWJZFTexC6CNr5kKJUoUh1LP1Q3lVL8bd400XpFXbM1xPMDeDHR4pHhh_JcDUqIHBqbTXEfgnpxjLx6js1DURY1S9iA7A5AwyASw2Co-t6KQDpsEM6dMpN6dj-cjJhg3a--RqRwh_yI40XVmlhXccOS24ZCQSSfXpPokg1UOhGA7XpFuFR_dYAxWIVqEKk2umf37bfAErVZ4oggH431niyk262lWC0LA2fwdlRxPHxZsiOA6Pb-5IkLY8-pZ1KbRsk_K_gvZY1TRSx0Njf5B6PqkqLxhSczC4ndpUkVFPaOTSOTAbDEvuglHB_K59h8txYNXcCdeBdz-QI3Nd9y-lggCqrSMTsbah_oV5l1ukfMH6CTgjMN7Wls7n5TB1KJ2JmsXXyq83bdkw%3D%3D)
---
Fellow Conservative,

Since launching my campaign, **I have been quickly identified as the progressive Democrats' worst nightmare:**

A Republican woman with staunch conservative credentials, who proved that you can have a family and a successful career, an American patriot that dismantles the Left’s narrative that the GOP is for men and misogynists – I’m hoping that you’ll help me become the woman that takes back the House for Republicans in 2022.

Before I continue explaining how I earned the title of _'Progressive Democrat's Worst Nightmare,'_ **I must tell you about my critical fundraising deadline approaching on September 30th.** Once this deadline passes, my fundraising numbers will be published for EVERYONE to see, including the Democrats.

**I cannot stress enough how critical it is that I OUTRAISE them, and prove that my race really is a nightmare to their House majority chances.** **[Which is why I'm turning to the best conservative supporters during this time for help.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ad290cc731b544118ab467645476c35a&_e=K4nF1GKY_pFy2FpqRrGIRm-7QEXaxXpv8Z2Tyg3zHeYiFCCgaYQn3HTNjz-VpmU3yd2eTHhFRCWJZFTexC6CNr5kKJUoUh1LP1Q3lVL8bd400XpFXbM1xPMDeDHR4pHhh_JcDUqIHBqbTXEfgnpxjLx6js1DURY1S9iA7A5AwyASw2Co-t6KQDpsEM6dMpN6dj-cjJhg3a--RqRwh_yI40XVmlhXccOS24ZCQSSfXpPokg1UOhGA7XpFuFR_dYAxgT95a-XgU6CZEQOvThWUCS8MMbDHXNvl83YrDLl7DzW8IWCL69T4CggarM9i3AzJCm32s1hC-dRGIbbInq-A8vnkWKZ55LAjfA9XoSnZG_dLbqiLANAUC3AQ8pF6r2A5UUPBfAzUprrhs1uSepnYr07IrYbD_JPfaTde2SkVBxgGpmKwOjCsp0xCA0UiVKEdzaDoVp8KHEDiBZOwTQHnqw%3D%3D)**

Now, back to explaining my new nickname... **[I am a lawyer, mother, wife, unapologetic conservative, and currently, the Democrats’ worst nightmare.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ad290cc731b544118ab467645476c35a&_e=K4nF1GKY_pFy2FpqRrGIRm-7QEXaxXpv8Z2Tyg3zHeYiFCCgaYQn3HTNjz-VpmU3yd2eTHhFRCWJZFTexC6CNr5kKJUoUh1LP1Q3lVL8bd400XpFXbM1xPMDeDHR4pHhh_JcDUqIHBqbTXEfgnpxjLx6js1DURY1S9iA7A5AwyASw2Co-t6KQDpsEM6dMpN6dj-cjJhg3a--RqRwh_yI40XVmlhXccOS24ZCQSSfXpPokg1UOhGA7XpFuFR_dYAxz8qVvAc2JqG0_Tq3ly4BsICfeLxEvnqAm92q3oN9PqmCfNkWjrFHT2zfq-61WtAhCGgkEAht4yllW8IpjSuUg7vVwmg7XDAtgFwpx2lGZ6CD3ED93zjpPuZQ9LK5xCcVmJDF1vtUSt4Rd0-wyj_VZ9RxOpJ94xFxfjaSSpemo6QaGFTcD_IfvK3h_JhBeXJeixSJXr-uFWbZ22Z-nl6F0w%3D%3D)**

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ad290cc731b544118ab467645476c35a&_e=K4nF1GKY_pFy2FpqRrGIRm-7QEXaxXpv8Z2Tyg3zHeYiFCCgaYQn3HTNjz-VpmU3yd2eTHhFRCWJZFTexC6CNr5kKJUoUh1LP1Q3lVL8bd400XpFXbM1xPMDeDHR4pHhh_JcDUqIHBqbTXEfgnpxjLx6js1DURY1S9iA7A5AwyASw2Co-t6KQDpsEM6dMpN6dj-cjJhg3a--RqRwh_yI40XVmlhXccOS24ZCQSSfXpPokg1UOhGA7XpFuFR_dYAxUlWqs4oNfkfKLFveCG3NWr-7QoKDTRYtK2jgXafkgqm6AYzP3YK299wMuZMtJbDJc2uOWDoe5Z_ob7Y67X0MGjbfYKt_5yDPUHLWYPXKvXjYAq9Pya0Jg2uUQqjZbmWshrC2MWgBcLH48WBXAuXiZx3uP0TuAg_dDb5zbL7WuFFqcxKeCqLxo6jlTKRYuUu46YcqEIg7gEDsRkcxzNVV_w%3D%3D)
[**SUPPORT APRIL TODAY -> **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ad290cc731b544118ab467645476c35a&_e=K4nF1GKY_pFy2FpqRrGIRm-7QEXaxXpv8Z2Tyg3zHeYiFCCgaYQn3HTNjz-VpmU3yd2eTHhFRCWJZFTexC6CNr5kKJUoUh1LP1Q3lVL8bd400XpFXbM1xPMDeDHR4pHhh_JcDUqIHBqbTXEfgnpxjLx6js1DURY1S9iA7A5AwyASw2Co-t6KQDpsEM6dMpN6dj-cjJhg3a--RqRwh_yI40XVmlhXccOS24ZCQSSfXpPokg1UOhGA7XpFuFR_dYAx6EqkWCpU2d-KAJmwMhA_izVMicsc8pAwLQocNrDlIgN1tAkQY4wY1ONHeendxBBVAkU98Utrf-p-x3ER2b1G75iXEpFYaCvVUl-zBcsVqPnHL1Z1BjNuKONH1-OqV7NjElPaGcYdJp_1hj-92vCe7AX5d4JWFuKosXsvll68zjEvjwMCWS8V_pSZIBRO2LByvttmkNoV7CtMOlOMjshS5w%3D%3D)
I am running for Congress in one of the National Republican Congressional Committee’s target districts, Nevada-03, where I am taking on a little-known Democrat with no accomplishments to speak of -- other than voting with Pelosi 99% of the time. Honestly, this could be the sleeper race that finally forces Nancy Pelosi to put her Washington D.C. penthouse on the market, having lost the House majority for the last time in her career.

**[Fellow Conservative, today I’d like to explain to you why my campaign for Congress is worth investing in immediately, as we are quickly approaching our 3rd quarter fundraising deadline.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ad290cc731b544118ab467645476c35a&_e=K4nF1GKY_pFy2FpqRrGIRm-7QEXaxXpv8Z2Tyg3zHeYiFCCgaYQn3HTNjz-VpmU3yd2eTHhFRCWJZFTexC6CNr5kKJUoUh1LP1Q3lVL8bd400XpFXbM1xPMDeDHR4pHhh_JcDUqIHBqbTXEfgnpxjLx6js1DURY1S9iA7A5AwyASw2Co-t6KQDpsEM6dMpN6dj-cjJhg3a--RqRwh_yI40XVmlhXccOS24ZCQSSfXpPokg1UOhGA7XpFuFR_dYAxTUHTxrONFCJZV7i3NHcKqun5986dMO-5WD5b2KY6gwYfZ44dD0_WrbyPlaPs0rKCNfv2D1kZa3PmKOYG2071XgeLt-PupJCPsq2Cdemz-W-XMs0rpE6_zoMqZD7XaQmeS0ILY-fBI3wVHSqdjCkvGLmLIip-Ab_ERp6xde5b3S64G7218-L8paygGVFYDqMyJf8DhTqwRj7wGU1_g1JgUA%3D%3D)**

With three children, I worked to pay my own way through college, and then law school.**When I wasn’t packing lunches and sitting in school pick-up lines, I was a practicing attorney, building a business, fighting for the underdog, and taking on tough cases.** I am proud to be a working mom. Now I want to take that same drive and attitude to Congress.

I’m the type of person who outworks everyone in the room and exceeds expectations. My plan is to take down one of Pelosi’s most trusted partners before she even knows she’s in trouble. body:
Parents, caregivers, and kids don’t need a strategic pause — they need progress.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36100397/307134449/-182076786?refcode=BLU-SJC-20210920-z-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMGU2MmE2MS0zODFhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8gN27cNdsM8QmZV8oOYTJaa11sueavesRQ4T5WiWOZM=)
---
Team,

Earlier this summer, I met with parents in my district to talk about the expanded Child Tax Credit. So many of the parents spoke to me, full of emotion, not about school supplies or new shoes they could buy, but about something much bigger — about the importance of having extra money available so they could start saving for their kids, about being able to look to the future.

**That’s why it is so misguided that Senator Joe Manchin and others are looking to limit the Build Back Better Act, citing its high price tag.** Senator Manchin has indicated he has objections to expanding the Child Tax Credit, creating universal pre-K, and reducing child care costs for most parents and has called for a “strategic pause” on the bill.

Parents, caregivers, and kids don’t need a strategic pause — they need progress. Eighteen months into a pandemic that has upended caregiving, America’s kids and parents are at a breaking point. **Some may say that we can’t afford this, but the truth is we can’t afford not to invest in our children.**

If Democrats negotiate against ourselves and fail to produce real results for American families, they will have no reason to trust us with another term in office. We saw this happen in 2009, and it led to Democrats losing control of the House for eight years. We cannot afford to let it happen again.

[_**To show that I have support on this major issue, please consider chipping in $5 or whatever you can spare to my re-election campaign today.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36100398/307134450/-182076786?refcode=BLU-SJC-20210920-z-EM&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMGU2MmE2MS0zODFhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8gN27cNdsM8QmZV8oOYTJaa11sueavesRQ4T5WiWOZM=)

clean_body: Parents, caregivers, and kids don’t need a strategic pause — they need progress. | = Team, Earlier this summer, I met with parents in my district to talk about the expanded Child Tax Credit. So many of the parents spoke to me, full of emotion, not about school supplies or new shoes they could buy, but about something much bigger — about the importance of having extra money available so they could start saving for their kids, about being able to look to the future. That’s why it is so misguided that Senator Joe Manchin and others are looking to limit the Build Back Better Act, citing its high price tag. Senator Manchin has indicated he has objections to expanding the Child Tax Credit, creating universal pre-K, and reducing child care costs for most parents and has called for a “strategic pause” on the bill. Parents, caregivers, and kids don’t need a strategic pause — they need progress. Eighteen months into a pandemic that has upended caregiving, America’s kids and parents are at a breaking point. Some may say that we can’t afford this, but the truth is we can’t afford not to invest in our children. If Democrats negotiate against ourselves and fail to produce real results for American families, they will have no reason to trust us with another term in office. We saw this happen in 2009, and it led to Democrats losing control of the House for eight years. We cannot afford to let it happen again. = | = Thank you for your support, Sara Jacobs | | | * | | = Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress Sara Jacobs for Congress PO Box 120085 San Diego, CA 92112 United States | = If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please

|
---
Peter,

The panicked screengrab from the Senate Democrats' email says it all:

[ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58369552:J0w9qY2mN:m:1:3253819041:5EF3331E4AC24F44DED366D83DEB0F69:r)
The Democrats in Washington are watching our campaign like a hawk because they know that we are **a genuine threat to their continued majority in the United States Senate.**

Honestly, their desperation shows. They seem to be in a panic.

They're sending upwards of 3 emails a day because they know that their hold on the Georgia Senate seat is precarious. It took a perfect storm for Georgia to elect Raphael Warnock to the U.S. Senate in the January runoff election, and I guarantee you that storm isn't coming around again next year.

We're going to have to work around the clock - day and night - for the next 400+ days to pull off a victory for conservatives in Georgia and around the country.

We're going to recruit thousands of volunteers to help us register new voters, knock on doors, put out signs, get our message out, and get our supporters to the polls.

clean_body: | Peter, The panicked screengrab from the Senate Democrats' email says it all: The Democrats in Washington are watching our campaign like a hawk because they know that we are a genuine threat to their continued majority in the United States Senate. Honestly, their desperation shows. They seem to be in a panic. They're sending upwards of 3 emails a day because they know that their hold on the Georgia Senate seat is precarious. It took a perfect storm for Georgia to elect Raphael Warnock to the U.S. Senate in the January runoff election, and I guarantee you that storm isn't coming around again next year. We're going to have to work around the clock - day and night - for the next 400+ days to pull off a victory for conservatives in Georgia and around the country. We're going to recruit thousands of volunteers to help us register new voters, knock on doors, put out signs, get our message out, and get our supporters to the polls. And, of course, it all takes money to operate. Democrats are in panic mode. Peter,

I’ve told you about my own major policy priorities if I’m elected the next Member of Congress representing Arizona’s 9th District - in short, I plan to replace the disastrous Democrats’ Debt, Division, and Dependency with smart policies that focus on Economics, Education, and true Equality for all Arizonans and all Americans.

[**But to run the most effective campaign, to truly understand the issues that are most concerning to voters here, I’m counting on the indispensable feedback of grassroots conservatives like you, Peter!**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=d45c761faa194e578a345af0b2fa53e9&_e=RTOUS-FmYwCIa5WIUPjOGZ0qotnUho7LSAHdjmZcY1uagtvO4RqzoICWbMsthnA-McsZDn8j28X_FmFl2h1KGJp-5ugcryg0D-pclvqoGKv1qNl5Q7XApwzSfI7FxpNLYyMjKpJbeiSiGeg3L_FuAIzyBcOgnpOCQ_AL8fm8ADIRDQwohNXHfqMuMwSJ1rA8Hr4bNCxAmeP0-_3s0Uep8xlLrTZ-xGmamBusRGAScHjDGsL6snkh4hPGcmv_TDbydF-D93Gs1UGo-HF8SsL8fmHT8PsEyP9tU4JL2QA1syB0aFqFHrh7P_VrW0xKdc4IXns96XqPoUIbbx3VaemGV2dE5Nrqgkz2BDe-afW-RlN2ziGulSAxtHu1NwAg1s7IITkcpoUayLBQ5jfNEOKLpvSJyjP4aYVHw0ZfuDfwwRqS56FiXdNZTU_Vf-kgVsKVNGK7uG_4bZz8I-uvFdCwniRQ2mjJ3Lk25WS1H3opiSospdq5a8A8OK4IgSC0rJ1-DZ0x8R2QMZa9-DklyuNzgnbO1mpxJYvukRSt-AR7iGc%3D)

name: Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Action for the week of September 20th: Fight Vaccine Mandates
body:
| |
---
We are in a final push to recruit organizers for Just Say No sign waving protests next week, and putting pressure on Congress to oppose all vaccine mandates.

**Action items for this week include:**
* Local: Sign up to organize a Just Say No sign waving on 9/22 (or whatever day works!)
* National: Call Congress to oppose vaccine mandates – even if you are vaccinated
* Ongoing legislation watch
* Reminders and other sign up forms

See below for details!

_Note: in order to share any links, simply open the link, and copy the URL address, and then paste it wherever it is that you are sharing it._
**Local: Sign up to organize a Just Say No protest on 9/22
**
There must be public pushback against these unAmerican medical mandates. One reason is because there are people out there who oppose them, but who believe they are alone. They need to see that there are many other Americans who agree with them! When they see they aren’t alone, they will feel more confident to step up and join the fight.

Even if your event consists of three people at a busy intersection, **_you are making a huge difference._**

We have so many resources to help you do this, so there is no excuse not to! Also, if you can’t hold an event on Wednesday, September 22nd, feel free to hold it on a day that works for you!
[HOST A PROTEST](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjYzLTAwNzBkM2RjMGZjZDQ3M2NhNmY4ODYwYTY4MWVmMDVm%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvc3RvcG1lZGljYWxtYW5kYXRlcy8_bWlkPTQ0MzQ3JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=aBry9r_XLRAwutf89TyugQ)
|
---
Gen. Mark Milley, Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff, [called Chinese officials on two separate occasions](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjYzLTAwNzBkM2RjMGZjZDQ3M2NhNmY4ODYwYTY4MWVmMDVm%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZm94bmV3cy5jb20vcG9saXRpY3MvbWlsbGV5LXNlY3JldGx5LWNhbGxlZC1jaGluZXNlLW9mZmljaWFscy1vdXQtb2YtZmVhci10cnVtcC13b3VsZC1hdHRhY2staW4tZmluYWwtZGF5cy1ib29rLWNsYWltcyUyMD9taWQ9NDQzNDcmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=6UBUtIKVooeL0yv61c-9Ig) to assure them America wasn't planning to strike at China, according to a book by Bob Woodward and Robert Costa, set for release next week. Gen. Milley made these calls without consulting President Trump, acting outside of the chain of command, the book contends.

The book reports that Milley even told a Chinese general, "Gen. Li, you and I have known each other for now five years. If we're going to attack, I'm going to call you ahead of time. It's not going to be a surprise."

Every patriotic American should be alarmed by reports that Gen. Milley initiated contact with a Chinese military official behind President Trump's back. At a minimum, Congress should launch an investigation to find out more about Milley's actions. Meanwhile, President Biden should suspend Milley and fire him if any of the allegations are substantiated.
|
---
**National: Call Congress to oppose vaccine mandates
**
Whether you are vaccinated or not, please call your Representative and both of your Senators and tell them to oppose all vaccine mandates. This includes the government’s attempt to use private companies to force vaccines on employees or customers. Outright mandates from the government, or using private companies to implement public policy are both wrong.

We are also hearing from allies in Congress that it is very important for the Democrats to hear from constituents as well. If they believe there will be no outcry from this, they will push for more limits on your liberty.

[Find your Representative’s number](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjYzLTAwNzBkM2RjMGZjZDQ3M2NhNmY4ODYwYTY4MWVmMDVm%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaG91c2UuZ292L3JlcHJlc2VudGF0aXZlcy9maW5kLXlvdXItcmVwcmVzZW50YXRpdmU_bWlkPTQ0MzQ3JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=eMtcsKPOj-xVISfRn0TTtA) and [your Senators’ numbers](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjYzLTAwNzBkM2RjMGZjZDQ3M2NhNmY4ODYwYTY4MWVmMDVm%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc2VuYXRlLmdvdi9zZW5hdG9ycy9zZW5hdG9ycy1jb250YWN0Lmh0bT9taWQ9NDQzNDcmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=DbB-Mbtj9lQgc7wUcgLz1g).
|
---
Senior officials in the Biden administration are [facing serious questions about America's collapse in Afghanistan](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjYzLTAwNzBkM2RjMGZjZDQ3M2NhNmY4ODYwYTY4MWVmMDVm%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZm94bmV3cy5jb20vcG9saXRpY3MvYmxpbmtlbi10ZXN0aWZpZXMtYWZnaGFuaXN0YW4tc2VuYXRlLWhlYXJpbmclMjA_bWlkPTQ0MzQ3JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=lv_mWl6__AS_5rZfSFzdAg). Anthony Blinken, the Biden Administration's Secretary of State, was tasked with explaining away the situation before the House and Senate Foreign Affairs Committees.

Blinken wouldn't comment on reports that Biden had pressured the Afghan president to project a false picture of what was happening in the country. He also deflected questions about how Vladimir Putin and Russia had influenced the situation. And of course, did the Biden Administration know that China would benefit greatly from our disastrous withdrawal plan?

The American people want straight answers, not smokescreens and evasions. It is time for the Administration to come clean about Afghanistan.
|
---
**Ongoing Legislation Watch
**
**1932: “No Vaccine Passport Act”** in the Senate.
**VOTE YES**

**H.R. 4: “Pelosi Power Grab Act”** now in the Senate.
**VOTE NO**
|
---
[Inflation continues impeding America's economic recovery](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjYzLTAwNzBkM2RjMGZjZDQ3M2NhNmY4ODYwYTY4MWVmMDVm%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud3NqLmNvbS9hcnRpY2xlcy91cy1pbmZsYXRpb24tY29uc3VtZXItcHJpY2UtaW5kZXgtYXVndXN0LTIwMjEtMTE2MzE1NjQ4NDklMjA_bWlkPTQ0MzQ3JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=kxi3uEyMKN1fhEL7LTtuHg) as the Biden Administration's spending policies are hurting American families. Instead of allowing businesses and individuals to return to normal, Biden seems to believe paying people not to work and throwing money at the economy will solve everything.

Unsurprisingly, the Consumer Price Index rose 5.3% in August compared with a year ago as Democrats’ spending policies are overheating the economy.
|
---
**Reminders: Sign up forms and research to do**
September is [National Voter Registration Month](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjYzLTAwNzBkM2RjMGZjZDQ3M2NhNmY4ODYwYTY4MWVmMDVm%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubmFzcy5vcmcvaW5pdGlhdGl2ZXMvbmF0aW9uYWwtdm90ZXItcmVnaXN0cmF0aW9uLW1vbnRoP21pZD00NDM0NyZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=QftsJppjtC3dJ0dryUyBLA) and [National Voter Registration Day](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjYzLTAwNzBkM2RjMGZjZDQ3M2NhNmY4ODYwYTY4MWVmMDVm%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9uYXRpb25hbHZvdGVycmVnaXN0cmF0aW9uZGF5Lm9yZy8_bWlkPTQ0MzQ3JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=jHgv2V2KWevkZ5LqtTXksw) is September 28th. The links will take you to websites with resources like how to register people to vote, state laws, and more.
|
---
Keep attending the monthly meetings of your local school board! You can use our [**School Board How-to Guide**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjYzLTAwNzBkM2RjMGZjZDQ3M2NhNmY4ODYwYTY4MWVmMDVm%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AOA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvYXR0ZW5kLXNjaG9vbC1ib2FyZC8_bWlkPTQ0MzQ3JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=NzObVtpy-T8CqZmG6H8uXQ) again before you attend, and if you haven’t yet watched, you can view the two training webinars we recorded on attending school board meetings. You can find [the first one here](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjYzLTAwNzBkM2RjMGZjZDQ3M2NhNmY4ODYwYTY4MWVmMDVm%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AOQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9ldmVudC53ZWJpbmFyamFtLmNvbS9nby9yZXBsYXkvMTMva3l3a3pmcmhrcmkyczE_bWlkPTQ0MzQ3JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=aHTrUEwY_9y_hVfK6tFcqQ)**,** and [the second one here](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjYzLTAwNzBkM2RjMGZjZDQ3M2NhNmY4ODYwYTY4MWVmMDVm%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9ldmVudC53ZWJpbmFyamFtLmNvbS9yZXBsYXkvMjYvMzN3cHlmbG5iOTNmeHdmcnc_bWlkPTQ0MzQ3JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=YlX1O43x9jVloaY07L-FQw).
|

|

This is not just a Border Crisis, this is a Crisis Crisis. name: Derek Kilmer
subject: No community can fully recover until all communities have recovered
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Peter,

This pandemic is not over. Due to virus mutations, many states have seen the deadliest days of this pandemic in just the past few weeks. Hospitals across the country are at capacity, and all of our health care workers are feeling the strain after 18 months of nearly nonstop hard work. We should all be grateful for their heroic dedication.

Here in Washington State, some long-term care facilities are having COVID-19 outbreaks, and ICU beds in our local hospitals are nearing capacity. I have been monitoring the situation in our district and remain in constant communication with local health officials. I'm also working hard in Congress to secure the resources needed to support communities impacted by COVID-19 in our district and around the nation.

As of today, over 670,000 Americans have lost their lives to COVID-19 -- including over 7,000 Washingtonians. Sadly 1 in every 500 Americans has now died from COVID-19. I hope you will join me in taking a moment to pause and recognize this tremendous loss of life.

The virus has changed the fabric of our communities -- including the businesses we see when we walk down the street. It's even impacted our relationships with our neighbors. It's been a long battle, but each of us needs to continue to do our part -- to support our local businesses, to help our local social service organizations that are keeping people fed and housed, and to support those who need a helping hand.

Peter, it's clearer than ever before that getting out of this pandemic is going to take all of us. We are all in this together. Our interconnected lives and communities mean our health and our fates are interconnected as well. **No community can fully recover until all communities have recovered.**

It's an honor to represent you,

Derek

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/Fn4D2p_SiaUC6KLEMZwjdm02nH8nxzDc9kyHutIjIhU=/aED4XK7puNqAVoiD6CWqX_Tvx2_8wgTQCSdSIiBENdU=) | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/Fn4D2p_SiaUC6KLEMZwjdm02nH8nxzDc9kyHutIjIhU=/L10oDU918CWVLwahWqy_AusU6w84a3zBdZHS4CkumT4=)
---|---

PO Box 1381
Tacoma WA 98402 United States

Peter, thank you so much for being a supporter of Derek Kilmer and Democrats up and down the ballot.

Our digital program helps us reach folks with the latest updates. But, if you'd rather not hear from our team, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/Fn4D2p_SiaUC6KLEMZwjdm02nH8nxzDc9kyHutIjIhU=/3C9rMFOEEDEOhweaCzJauw58dLEPVHiNLdgi5NLmbtI=).

name: Nikki Fried
subject: They’re fixing the election for Ron DeSantis
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Dear Friends,

I’m angry.

We now have text messages and emails showing that Florida Republicans are willing to cheat voters out of requested mail ballots in an attempt to fix the 2022 election for Ron DeSantis and Republicans.

Team, this is urgent. Florida’s voter suppression law passed last session was designed to rig the system for Ron DeSantis. We need all hands on deck to fight back, so please click here to chip in now. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-voter-suppression]

The report shows that the Republican Party of Florida was directly involved in drafting the bill and saw it as a way to cut down Democrats’ advantage in mail-in voting.

They called it voter “integrity” in public, but these text messages show they don’t know the definition of the word “integrity.” This Trump-inspired law is a direct attack on our civil rights. As we’ve said all along, 2022 is going to be a choice about democracy vs. fascism.

Elected Republicans are using all levels of Government to stack the deck against us next year, and we need to fight back. Please click here to chip in now and help us ensure their flagrant voter suppression tactics don’t work.

Elected Republicans have shown they don’t care about our democracy. For them, it’s all about preserving their own power.

They’ve rigged Tallahassee for decades. We need to fight like hell to take it back.

I’ve said all along that this election is about far more than Ron DeSantis. It’s breaking the corrupt system and building a democracy that works for everyone in Florida.

Thanks for standing with me on this.

Nikki

Political advertisement paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
Nikki Fried for Governor
6619 S Dixie Hwy
No. 148

He didn’t do this for fame, he risked his life in service and because of his commitment to the American values we hold dear. Peter, I am asking every proud patriot to join me in supporting Alek in this race. His opponent, Peter DeFazio has lived off the taxpayers’ dime for the last 34 years. His voting record shows he is nothing more than a rubber stamp for Nancy Pelosi and the radical Left. **In 2022, we need Alek to defeat DeFazio and help us Take Back the House.**

clean_body: I’m writing to you today because I know an American hero who deserves to be in Washington, and needs our help. Alek Skarlatos saved dozens of lives by I’m writing to you today because I know an American hero who deserves to be in Washington, and needs our help. Alek Skarlatos saved dozens of lives by thwarting a radical Islamic terrorist attack on a passenger train bound for Paris. | Peter, In a time where politicians run for office for celebrity status, social media fame, book deals and ego boosts, it’s important to remember what they are actually in Washington to do: Serve YOU. I am tired of my radical-Left counterparts who continue to put you and your families last while they collect a paycheck bigger than what most hard-working Americans will ever see. That’s why I need your immediate help to rid Washington of these types of self-serving politicians and replace them with TRUE American patriots. Alek Skarlatos saved dozens of lives by thwarting a radical Islamic terrorist attack on a passenger train bound for Paris. He didn’t do this for fame, he risked his life in service and because of his commitment to the American values we hold dear. JOIN REPUBLICAN LEADER KEVIN MCCARTHY Not only did Alek thwart a terrorist attack as a civilian, but he is an Oregon Army National Guard veteran who bravely deployed to Afghanistan. I know his record of exemplary service to our country will continue once we elect him as a Member of Congress in 2022. Peter, I am asking every proud patriot to join me in supporting Alek in this race. His opponent, Peter DeFazio has lived off the taxpayers’ dime for the last 34 years. His voting record shows he is nothing more than a rubber stamp for Nancy Pelosi and the radical Left. In 2022, we need Alek to defeat DeFazio and help us Take Back the House. JOIN REPUBLICAN LEADER KEVIN MCCARTHY I’m proud to support his candidacy and look forward to working with him in Congress for years to come. His proven track record to put freedom and service above himself shows that he will get the job done for the great people of Oregon’s 4th Congressional District and Americans across the country. The People's House deserves a champion of the people, and that is why I proudly endorse Alek Skarlatos for Congress. We need more strong conservatives, strong Americans, like Alek in Congress - Thank you, Rep. body:
Across the country, voting rights are under attack. Earlier this month, Governor Greg Abbott signed Texas' restrictive voting bill into law. This law makes voting more difficult by banning drive thru-voting, 24-hour polling locations, drop boxes for mail ballots, and more. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36106704/307152056/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWE4ZDdmMy00NDFhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S-_QfvWOdqOMMrj-ZdxPkFqeSkDe8ruC1ixGyj-Oazo=&emci=c2b97e7b-1317-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=11a8d7f3-441a-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter,

Across the country, voting rights are under attack. Earlier this month, Governor Greg Abbott signed Texas' restrictive voting bill into law. This law makes voting more difficult by banning drive thru-voting, 24-hour polling locations, drop boxes for mail ballots, and more.

Texas is just the latest example of Republicans attacking our right to vote. So far this year, more than 400 bills have been introduced in 49 states that restrict the right to vote and at least 18 states have already enacted voting restrictions into law.

Kim believes that every American should be able to make their voices heard at the ballot box, so she's fighting back against these attacks on our right to vote. **Last month, Kim was proud to join her Democratic colleagues in the House in passing the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act -- a bill she was an original co-sponsor of.**

This bill will restore key provisions of the Voting Rights Act and ensure equal access to the ballot box for all Americans. But now we need the Senate to pass this critical legislation and ensure President Biden can sign it into law.

**[Will you add your name to join Kim in calling on the Senate to pass the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36106706/307152058/632475572?ms=em21_210920_vraa_adv_gq_act___ts_ettx&source=em21_210920_vraa_adv_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210920_vraa_adv_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=2k59D8P2llaHOT1H17IB1zHHVleU8%2B6HRHSZAjpCwJrgnh4yoBKw1DWF4bb6JITr4VBEselCX6mCfPbAkFlPhIy44ORabKFveeKCE0qInR4yMhLpVk8zcBQLL4JFR5VitReu0hHKydVC7WaW%2FqC7c034jfPpGE28IOLcivJQDoo%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWE4ZDdmMy00NDFhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S-_QfvWOdqOMMrj-ZdxPkFqeSkDe8ruC1ixGyj-Oazo=&emci=c2b97e7b-1317-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=11a8d7f3-441a-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=15820338)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36106707/307152059/632475572?ms=em21_210920_vraa_adv_gq_act___ts_ettx&source=em21_210920_vraa_adv_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210920_vraa_adv_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=2k59D8P2llaHOT1H17IB1zHHVleU8%2B6HRHSZAjpCwJrgnh4yoBKw1DWF4bb6JITr4VBEselCX6mCfPbAkFlPhIy44ORabKFveeKCE0qInR4yMhLpVk8zcBQLL4JFR5VitReu0hHKydVC7WaW%2FqC7c034jfPpGE28IOLcivJQDoo%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWE4ZDdmMy00NDFhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S-_QfvWOdqOMMrj-ZdxPkFqeSkDe8ruC1ixGyj-Oazo=&emci=c2b97e7b-1317-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=11a8d7f3-441a-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=15820338)
