name: Martin Heinrich
subject: Gabe Vasquez
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36106838/307152331/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_TAN_AC_20210920_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDFlMjc4MS00NTFhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1_dycb8o6e8lFg3b_OyRc2-yWknkObLIssrZhP1Ri64=&emci=391e2781-451a-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=3d1e2781-451a-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=252045)
---
Here’s the reality of the situation, friend: The odds of keeping the House of Representatives majority in this midterm election are not on our side. But we can and will protect it if we focus on taking back seats in competitive districts. New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District should be one of our top targets. Democrats winning that seat in 2018 helped us flip the House. We can take it back again now. Gabe Vasquez can win this seat. I’ve known Gabe for a long time. I know he’ll put in the work to get it done — and he needs us to join him in that effort. That’s why I’m rolling out my endorsement of him now — early in this race, because we have no time to lose. Everything Gabe does is rooted in his passion for the people and places of Southern New Mexico. body:
I’m between meetings right now so I have to make this quick. Friend, I’m between meetings right now so I have to make this quick.

Democrats have shown us EXACTLY what their priorities are. They recently vetoed a bill to rescue Americans in Afghanistan in order to pursue passage of the $3.5 Trillion Bernie Budget.

Here’s the simple truth, they are more worried about spending trillions of your taxpayer dollars on their progressive wishlist than they are about performing the basic functions of government, like protecting the lives of our citizens. They sacrificed:
* Keeping our soldiers safe
* Evacuating our citizens from an enemy takeover
* And honoring our promises to our allies

... all to spend $3.5 Trillion on the Bernie Budget, jam-packed with crazy socialist spending. The stakes could not be higher. The contrasts could not be clearer. This is why we need to win the majority back in 2022 and get our nation on track. _[**If you’re with me, please pitch in to help take back Congress so we can get some truth back in DC.**](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=89858e8af50d4237a3a9e1a16d2d9156&_e=Tv9Vrvv3GMUu0vQ2vcdNGNZ4nNQsabk6AVPyA2lrz5St8h206SsNYoKhcPTgG-j4pyr0dmlw7IStnjNC9wwK7qyvJdgELW5hHFVKl8vVE950s-CnoAuemzHvgClByh_14RmVUkzKly2xYYjsnQkUp_7VYkg5q9XwADKW50JYz711Ca0dDpTfc52eD4FejqjUYZcsTvvfXpwPR2cy22ZDGAFSjMZUUhdi9wOwdyL0UvoSg72XBpHfPZcet6JUNcM7WvgHuSxaRRKp72B6I2pMCwrJigMigLRZXNKNYf9wwAq68jTpbm3s_jlq7Ta6W2o4GAnc2l1kSZyEg6YVfbLMCc-yRRk6aE0i7BaybjxC5g5v-FeL-78yTEQ7mgmOFkdNufmc74I3PMfsLmqkaR00nrDVKau6FZd8g_rGQKe_INcwvBaOhpHg_TbjQNBNsrWAtAZbG4cQDTWubAcS9dmC1dRUAMcXIiXTKPFMkr8vRsc%3D)_ Thank you, Mike Gallagher _Sent from my iPhone_ |

Joe Biden thinks he can just spend money he doesn't have while passing the burden to working-class Floridians. Kat says no to Biden's Blueprint for Bankruptcy! | | | == | == | The Biden administration wants to spend billions of dollars on free community college and green energy initiatives instead of supporting small businesses. This socialist wishlist will destroy our rural communities. Many Floridians are already faced with rising prices on their groceries and gas thanks to inflation caused by far-left spending. I think we all agree with Kat when she said, "They're taxing us into submission" Kat refuses to submit to the radical left's socialist spending agenda. But she needs your help. With your support, Kat can help conservatives retake the House in 2022 and end radical spending that cripples working-class Floridians. == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | For Florida, Team Cammack | | == | == == == | | Kat for Congress | 5200 NW 43rd Street, Suite 102-180, Gainesville, FL 32606 | | Sent by mailto:info@katforcongress.com

name: Charlie Crist for Governor | HQ
subject: Gov. DeSantis spent his summer playing politics with people’s lives
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
but some counties had to courage to defy him and protect their students |
---

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36108120/307155485/-1601756415?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTZlMGEyOS00ODFhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qK9kL0xKzRcupzY4b3XGfAKkF26PbaNSPUWN9tMHvMM=&emci=8f965225-1e1a-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=916e0a29-481a-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=8807089)
---

Friend,

Schools across Florida spent their summer preparing to safely welcome back students and teachers ...

... while Gov. Ron DeSantis spent _his_ summer **_playing politics with people’s lives by banning schools from implementing mask requirements!_**

Fortunately, a handful of counties are defying his unscientific orders and requiring masks anyway, even though they know their schools could lose _funding_ and their administrators could lose their _salaries_.

**[Will you join Charlie Crist and sign a message of support for these courageous county officials and school administrators?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36108121/307155488/-1601756415?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTZlMGEyOS00ODFhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qK9kL0xKzRcupzY4b3XGfAKkF26PbaNSPUWN9tMHvMM=&emci=8f965225-1e1a-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=916e0a29-481a-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=8807089)**

These counties are bold changemakers, and their actions will help keep students safe as Gov. DeSantis spends his time fighting this case in the courts.

**We need more leaders like these school officials in Florida, who are willing to put people over politics and make the right call -- no matter what.[Please join Charlie in thanking these county officials and school administrators for their bravery!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36108122/307155489/-1601756415?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTZlMGEyOS00ODFhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qK9kL0xKzRcupzY4b3XGfAKkF26PbaNSPUWN9tMHvMM=&emci=8f965225-1e1a-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=916e0a29-481a-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=8807089)**

\-- Team Crist

Peter — the evidence is in. **When the first Child Tax Credit payments started going out to families in North Carolina and across the country, we saw an _immediate_ drop in households with children reporting food insecurity.** The third round of payments is on the way to hardworking families now, and we bet many of you are among those seeing the benefits. Governor Cooper wants to hear what you think of the Biden-Harris administration’s Child Tax Credit. **[We have just one question for you: Do you APPROVE or DISAPPROVE of Child Tax Credit payments?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36108349/307155697/-252529476?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMWU3Yzc5NS00ODFhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8QW76Qdb9Sp6g4iZkebecKqXumsYgJNiJ-p20EHzNpg=&emci=ca8df68e-481a-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=c1e7c795-481a-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=1049176)** | [APPROVE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36108350/307155698/-252529476?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMWU3Yzc5NS00ODFhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8QW76Qdb9Sp6g4iZkebecKqXumsYgJNiJ-p20EHzNpg=&emci=ca8df68e-481a-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=c1e7c795-481a-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=1049176) | [DISAPPROVE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36108352/307155699/-252529476?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMWU3Yzc5NS00ODFhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8QW76Qdb9Sp6g4iZkebecKqXumsYgJNiJ-p20EHzNpg=&emci=ca8df68e-481a-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=c1e7c795-481a-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=1049176)

clean_body: This poll is just one question. | Peter — the evidence is in. When the first Child Tax Credit payments started going out to families in North Carolina and across the country, we saw an immediate drop in households with children reporting food insecurity. The third round of payments is on the way to hardworking families now, and we bet many of you are among those seeing the benefits. Governor Cooper wants to hear what you think of the Biden-Harris administration’s Child Tax Credit. | | ---|--- Thanks for sharing your input! Look, Steve is Nevada’s first Democratic governor in _20 years_. **Republicans are willing to do just about anything to roll back the progress we’ve made.**
In the Senate, Dean Heller repeatedly led the fight to dismantle the Affordable Care Act and that would’ve left working families across the country without anywhere to turn.
As Governor, Steve Sisolak has built on the success of the Affordable Care Act by passing a public health insurance option that ensures Nevadans have access to affordable health care and revitalizes our hospital infrastructure amidst the COVID-19 pandemic.
It’s critical to keep Nevada blue if we want to maintain the progress we’ve made. That’s why it’s essential to re-elect Steve. **[Can we count on you to chip in and help Steve fight off his 5 Republican opponents?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zlDPxDHCSe8GlVxjXZtZRt8RmMiHH_rmhmb_QXuKOypDq1d9p9hdBUhukqOKX9gZf01aEpFcGxAb_WQK6rTYa1fgUESuxxfd598NScJo0zjYnom2raw3Vdd33JN7DC2Q8Zyw-l0FRrrnLoU6JiFGFH461uC5mG9Je5vNrjP5SP2dBn4gsz8pZqhJ98-9-4q8yfqLUJghdv25EGWMJVJo1ickViV3ZaMJfb4BsjelJ8VqBLy-WvMufmSwLHGUeY_CEKkaAIMMdBgSWf8QkDJOqE-eFRTBZSB3hIz1S-513aT435ivkM67ntbhNHkcJJMMzeSVa4HUuVjr5Nhc-LTKC7h5EjFZzx25PW_Tl9iRVzMNfoRFv6oR4HaASY84DMX4TOC6eVPa_l9VIP7WJa2zzlPLHrNSO6Evrfnt2TiVMtHuBOPdoQytDAwc_MUXjphpotO5hFT13T3tDw9VxlRZqj9ZOuacagnx2dOOjwDHRGdZJbgFYvOZj5XObhZXT2GWXHKkCacSdGUlHGLcyWOfIlMwUQ0-TXXEgJNVubTCud0QB1pAtTtIvs_r6_ONg4_6pqmXgpRd4QS5O2kGk842mo94IGq5xQEu4N2_ILmyV6uA/3fh/H7Q0QgqtSTKulTpBVIgTog/h10/GECCv5PQy_sjzXlYiYkiEQlcnOye4L86NUzRvhelKz4)**

clean_body: A 5th Republican opponent just announced | | | | | | | BREAKING: A 5th Republican opponent vying to unseat Governor Steve Sisolak JUST ANNOUNCED...**** | | Team -- A familiar face is considering a comeback to the Silver State and to that, we say no thank you. During his time as Nevada’s U.S. Senator, he bowed down to Donald Trump -- and was kicked out of office by Nevadans because of his allegiance to Trump over working families. So what makes him think 2022 will be different this time around? Dean Heller thinks we’ve forgotten about his Trump cronyism. But we haven’t. That’s why it’s essential we keep Steve in office and ensure Nevada remains blue in 2022. | | | | | | | | | | | | Look, Steve is Nevada’s first Democratic governor in 20 years. Republicans are willing to do just about anything to roll back the progress we’ve made. In the Senate, Dean Heller repeatedly led the fight to dismantle the Affordable Care Act and that would’ve left working families across the country without anywhere to turn. As Governor, Steve Sisolak has built on the success of the Affordable Care Act by passing a public health insurance option that ensures Nevadans have access to affordable health care and revitalizes our hospital infrastructure amidst the COVID-19 pandemic. It’s critical to keep Nevada blue if we want to maintain the progress we’ve made. That’s why it’s essential to re-elect Steve. | | | | | | | | | | | | Thank you, Team Sisolak | | If you'd like to support Steve Sisolak for Governor, you can | Paid for and Authorized by Committee to Elect Steve Sisolak Steve Sisolak for Governor P.O. Box 850 Las Vegas, NV 89125 mailto:info@stevesisolak.com | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Sisolak for Nevada, please .

Team, Soon after President Biden was sworn into office, Mitch McConnell declared that he’s 100% focused on obstructing the Democrats’ agenda and making sure nothing gets to President Biden’s desk. Despite McConnell’s best efforts, Michael and his colleagues successfully passed the American Rescue Plan, expanded the Child Tax Credit, and passed a historic infrastructure bill. Now Mitch McConnell has a new focus: the 2022 midterms. National Republicans are targeting Michael and Colorado as a key seat to flip next year — and if they’re successful, Democrats will lose their Senate majority, and Mitch McConnell will be back in charge blocking all of our progress. We can’t let that happen. The Democrat’s socialist agenda does not align with Hispanic’s conservative values any longer News alert: Hispanics are no longer all Democrats. We left behind socialist countries and we won’t let America become a socialist nation. | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d4b4d2e145fc4404a38c5d37652369f5&_e=GMFoYHCBJJ32_qVauXIqXNkga9HByrReptQmp2yfaQqM5ion0r-7QlSJrPQRcWdL5tSGbOGi5UDKTqkGKx5ZYSenXuNTP7i3aCVxtgqlnUZLd3C6hzEh4yAkj964gVgSqcq9YaWhDv0Zn-6iuUbnkTx6MowWfuo3rD0jFqWtoKKNGJYRkIxCFzJ0iEo0_1NIa1xv2EOLXQP-OcjPGwAT_U3YeBvmF8Lk1ussb3pLk8jBWDXnHj2wkSJg4pIm7bW7mGL5jE_7hyEAe_Z4np4NcxRIIBuVZ2JU1GFb2iylHXSmWlO7qeTRWNEh9U84lbbqxVX1ew67csjv0EjhSShqDfeTVUejx7IRsn8A7zikC4rw0rypgitxdCBUSx2wTmyz6oM38WOd_VRuFcAOPe0IjaQO4kxioDG5yUqKWbOaGtd9_ADYh5FfpXapZzqkh5GpKar5q34LpHLAMyG3EqwjLumc-TIn4RWxgIWLFldsjKk%3D)

Fellow American - - Democrats think that to be Hispanic, you must vote Blue.

We should welcome them to the 21st century because, I don’t know if you’ve heard - _but Hispanics are no longer all Democrats._

That’s right, thanks to former President Donald Trump’s common-sense policies and the liberal’s insane socialist logic, the tides are turning. **_The Democrat’s socialist agenda does not align with Hispanic’s conservative values any longer._**

Frankly, it’s racist that Democrats think that skin color has anything to do with political ideology.

You may not know me, so I want to take a minute to introduce myself. My name is Jose Castillo. I was born in New Orleans but grew up in Honduras with a strong, single mother before returning to the United States. I now live in Florida with my beautiful wife and daughter, living the American dream.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d4b4d2e145fc4404a38c5d37652369f5&_e=GMFoYHCBJJ32_qVauXIqXNkga9HByrReptQmp2yfaQqM5ion0r-7QlSJrPQRcWdL5tSGbOGi5UDKTqkGKx5ZYSenXuNTP7i3aCVxtgqlnUZLd3C6hzEh4yAkj964gVgSqcq9YaWhDv0Zn-6iuUbnkTx6MowWfuo3rD0jFqWtoKKNGJYRkIxCFzJ0iEo0_1NIa1xv2EOLXQP-OcjPGwAT_U3YeBvmF8Lk1ussb3pLk8jBWDXnHj2wkSJg4pIm7bW7mGL5jE_7hyEAe_Z4np4Nc8RmZgb-6Mt1MkjWdT6qZ4pXECI_5rqjh2ivrS4HB_TARg9hNx8jLwrz1ejhWwBoicMT5tThjjk0Ah1PH2SgDsImxYp5AuHetnjeLHK2hwhdEIOw2JIe0kD8AwjrUGNs6N2e1wJ0mGVyFFQpkyMF7Fkf07yShqZXYnz2jpF1sQOpJ9A8QfENjMyBzci8nvXpVsSbJpOhcdY30iWsy5xmrSc%3D)
_This is me during Donald Trump’s ‘Save America’ Rally in Florida in July_
After witnessing the Democrats destroy Donald Trump’s America-First agenda, I decided to run for Congress in Florida’s 9th district. I’m a pro-life, pro-2nd Amendment, and pro-America First conservative. I know what it's like to live in a corrupt country. There's a reason I left it behind - and I don't want those socialist policies to be implemented into America. [**It would be an honor if you would chip in $10 to help elect a Hispanic conservative from Florida to take on the Democrats and make Congress great again.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d4b4d2e145fc4404a38c5d37652369f5&_e=GMFoYHCBJJ32_qVauXIqXNkga9HByrReptQmp2yfaQqM5ion0r-7QlSJrPQRcWdL5tSGbOGi5UDKTqkGKx5ZYSenXuNTP7i3aCVxtgqlnUZLd3C6hzEh4yAkj964gVgSqcq9YaWhDv0Zn-6iuUbnkTx6MowWfuo3rD0jFqWtoKKNGJYRkIxCFzJ0iEo0_1NIa1xv2EOLXQP-OcjPGwAT_U3YeBvmF8Lk1ussb3pLk8jBWDXnHj2wkSJg4pIm7bW7mGL5jE_7hyEAe_Z4np4Nc2rCRlVHiUIiAG0eUd_xyROp77HC71RkQm6v6SI793zfcZxV3x5czH_YOmVxdZX2OQabsp5_-zC3U5ijNuxaaOgpv0LCAa7ey6vlOv7dYsNyFNeSDSZWmDYa775IMOB2QZHPO7RylWLiuSVmt3dDlZUTlzz1qzHPv0QQ2xZFPPmi1-4_I8y2vXuj3M8RUd9c0wMENwWNFxBd4GIAx4IfUxo%3D)

[ Make Congress Great Again
Support Jose »](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d4b4d2e145fc4404a38c5d37652369f5&_e=GMFoYHCBJJ32_qVauXIqXNkga9HByrReptQmp2yfaQqM5ion0r-7QlSJrPQRcWdL5tSGbOGi5UDKTqkGKx5ZYSenXuNTP7i3aCVxtgqlnUZLd3C6hzEh4yAkj964gVgSqcq9YaWhDv0Zn-6iuUbnkTx6MowWfuo3rD0jFqWtoKKNGJYRkIxCFzJ0iEo0_1NIa1xv2EOLXQP-OcjPGwAT_U3YeBvmF8Lk1ussb3pLk8jBWDXnHj2wkSJg4pIm7bW7mGL5jE_7hyEAe_Z4np4Nc2p4LX2w1P9iOHJElFhi_oUW0Q8WbOIy9weVwZzsrz7CSY5uaT1wSShkX8SW9Z8t0oHOmyW6KX-gyZS_-J-iJS89jOA3hbZvvPBIwMEEXzPZ07Q_94w2e1g35v-KedyZK8CZloIBYWByJHMc-cwx91lvTxvHQ6rmegIG6tm4Uvx5OljrrIpFdXRO0ZgWq9OPE5CKv7C0nzzB9JYHx90ZfOg%3D)
Hispanics are walking away from the racist, do-nothing Democrats once and for all. Their ‘values’ do not equate to the same things we want. We want secure borders, an open economy, common-sense policies, and we strongly oppose allowing the U.S. to become a socialist nation.

**We want liberal logic out of our lives.**

Here’s the deal - Republicans only need to pick up FIVE seats next year to win back the House, and I can tell you we have a real opportunity to unseat a Democrat and flip a blue seat RED! [**If you could chip in just $5 right now, you’ll send me to Washington to be a voice for all conservatives against the RINOs and socialist Liberals.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d4b4d2e145fc4404a38c5d37652369f5&_e=GMFoYHCBJJ32_qVauXIqXNkga9HByrReptQmp2yfaQqM5ion0r-7QlSJrPQRcWdL5tSGbOGi5UDKTqkGKx5ZYSenXuNTP7i3aCVxtgqlnUZLd3C6hzEh4yAkj964gVgSqcq9YaWhDv0Zn-6iuUbnkTx6MowWfuo3rD0jFqWtoKKNGJYRkIxCFzJ0iEo0_1NIa1xv2EOLXQP-OcjPGwAT_U3YeBvmF8Lk1ussb3pLk8jBWDXnHj2wkSJg4pIm7bW7mGL5jE_7hyEAe_Z4np4Nc6bOqsVnG6FqzDtwwM5uOcioGNT5p3CE9jYEgp6kcnD-vrYQPNE9roIJUnfnMM9ryy-DWTk4OSbY2ft9xH2vVhZYPH35sYL57PZAtuIfB2UgIyhv2yz2s15Pq6NMDcZksiPtUdz2J_r8CWTthmjdaslfOlOEDIrU9rbExOEMayhSfnxpVajXp95gPGQeSXw09ADjcILfdPPaHb2LrTw4g7k%3D)

Thank you for your time, I look forward to fighting for our shared conservative values and making Congress GREAT (Republican) again!

God Bless,

Peter,

As each of us go to sleep every night, others are up and at it working tirelessly to defend our democracy and keep our country safe. Those are our military service people.

But over the course of 18 years, more than **13,000 service members of our military were discharged under the Don’t Ask, Don’t Tell policy.** And guess what? _It’s only been 10 years since Don’t Ask Don’t Tell was repealed._

Don’t Ask Don’t Tell was originally signed by President Clinton to “protect” LGBTQ+ service members from being required to disclose their sexual orientation -- but following massive push back from military and congressional leaders, the policy _did_ permit LGBTQ+ service members to be discharged if they wittingly or unwittingly revealed on their sexual orientation.

Peter, we’ve let our friends and family in the military down. Because while they were making the ultimate sacrifice for our country and our freedoms -- _they were having their own freedoms infringed upon._

**_Again, I repeat, only 10 years ago,_ did LGBTQ+ service members begin to feel a burden being lifted off their shoulders. On this anniversary we are recognizing how much further we have to go when it comes to protecting LGBTQ+ rights in the military and beyond.**

**[It’s simple: The right to serve with pride is worth the fight. Add your name right now and demand Congress pass legislation that would expand and protect the rights of LGBTQ+ people in the military.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36109208/307157175/-1675749849?ms=em21_092021_dadtpt&refcode=em21_092021_dadtpt&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YWFiZmM4NS00OTFhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pipCZdcUePUBBpkQGQBdmrbXquC0cIbpN8IQIZhGRlI=&emci=d4648adf-391a-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=5aabfc85-491a-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=34271788)** [SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36109209/307157176/-1675749849?ms=em21_092021_dadtpt&refcode=em21_092021_dadtpt&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YWFiZmM4NS00OTFhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pipCZdcUePUBBpkQGQBdmrbXquC0cIbpN8IQIZhGRlI=&emci=d4648adf-391a-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=5aabfc85-491a-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=34271788) It’s sad to say, but the reality is that we have a long way to go to clean up the disheartening injustices of our past. Nobody should have to wait on that, either.

Far too many of our leaders would still rather pass discriminatory policies than work toward full equality. Just earlier this year, Florida’s own Gov. Ron DeSantis signed a law _on the first day of Pride month_ attacking transgender children.

Gov. DeSantis is not alone in his anti-LGBTQ+ stances and legislation. Legislators on the local, state, and federal level are a part of this hate as well.

**But their time has run out. The need for expanded LGBTQ+ rights, in our military and beyond, is long overdue.**

**[So Peter, will you add your name to the petition? We are committed to overcoming the suppression of LGBTQ+ rights, and the first step is demanding action from our legislators in Congress. Sign on now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36109210/307157177/-1675749849?ms=em21_092021_dadtpt&refcode=em21_092021_dadtpt&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YWFiZmM4NS00OTFhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pipCZdcUePUBBpkQGQBdmrbXquC0cIbpN8IQIZhGRlI=&emci=d4648adf-391a-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=5aabfc85-491a-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=34271788)** [SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36109211/307157178/-1675749849?ms=em21_092021_dadtpt&refcode=em21_092021_dadtpt&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YWFiZmM4NS00OTFhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pipCZdcUePUBBpkQGQBdmrbXquC0cIbpN8IQIZhGRlI=&emci=d4648adf-391a-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=5aabfc85-491a-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=34271788) Thanks for always showing up,

body:
Adam’s character has been relentlessly under assault by the GOP, Fox News, and fringe figures as of late.
Why? Because he stands up for the truth and our democracy.
With Trump coming back on the scene and gearing up for a 2024 presidential run, we’re going to need a lot of resources to fight back
Will you rush a donation today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sep2021_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20210920_PM1_V1_S4]
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sep2021_abs_em?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20210920_PM1_V1_S4]

Derek,

Adam’s fierce, unrelenting advocacy for our democracy and the rule of law have made him a constant target of Donald Trump, Fox News, and the right-wing forces threatening those very ideals every day.

In speeches, tweets, press releases, TV ads, and yes, fundraising emails just like this one, the full force of the Republican echo chamber has attacked Adam with a ferocity bordering on weird obsession.

Most people know Adam for his impassioned speeches on the floor, for prosecuting Donald Trump’s first impeachment, and for standing up to Republicans when they put party before country.

So as you can imagine, the last few years have been pretty busy, and our grassroots team has grown considerably.

To his core, Adam believes that democracy matters , which is why he continues to do everything in his power to protect the fundamental freedoms that make our democracy possible, like the right to vote.

Right now, he’s doing everything he can to help new and incumbent Democrats get elected to the House and Senate in 2022. He’s determined to not only protect but expand our slim Democratic majorities so we can continue fighting for progress.

And we can’t just play defense if we’re going to abolish the filibuster, pass federal voting rights legislation, get dark money out of politics, and stop this cult of the former president that is masquerading as a political party.

Next week, we’ll reach our deadline for the FEC fundraising quarter. When it’s over, we’ll report not only how much we’ve raised, but how many people have contributed to our campaign to defend and expand our Democratic majorities.

We have to go on offense. With the FEC end-of-quarter fundraising deadline less than two weeks away, can you pitch in right now to ensure we hit our fundraising goal? Every dollar goes towards Adam’s work protecting our slim Democratic majorities.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

CHIP IN $10 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sep2021_abs_em?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20210920_PM1_V1_S4]

CHIP IN $25 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sep2021_abs_em?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20210920_PM1_V1_S4]

CHIP IN $50 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sep2021_abs_em?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20210920_PM1_V1_S4]

CHIP IN $100 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sep2021_abs_em?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20210920_PM1_V1_S4]

CHIP IN $250 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sep2021_abs_em?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20210920_PM1_V1_S4]

ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sep2021_abs_em?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20210920_PM1_V1_S4]

Together, we’ve accomplished so much. You helped us defeat Donald Trump, flip the Senate, and crush the Republican-led recall of Gov. Gavin Newsom — all in the last 12 months. This grassroots team is truly unstoppable once we’ve identified a cause.

And there has never been one greater than beating back the forces of authoritarianism that have taken over the Republican Party. Our democracy is not invincible. We could lose it in the next midterms if we allow the cult of Donald Trump to seize a majority. But with you on our side, we can save our democracy for generations to come.

Adam believes in you — more strongly than ever. And so do we. Because we know what this team is capable of when we have one goal and put everything we have toward achieving it.

Thank you for inspiring Adam every day, and for all that you do.

— Team Schiff

I've put together a list of factors affecting the supply chain right now. You've probably noticed how empty the shelves are in supermarkets and stores with household goods and computers.

Well these are some of the reasons why – and whatever they're telling you about it being over soon, they're lying.

This is a massive cluster muck - they call it Csscade Failure.

AND YOU NEED TO PREPARE FOR IT.

body:

| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001H2Z9WcIz-t3B-UhU9IeiJ53UxrXBMe_5yx8McgwlLQ_ooRD2yBMikiZqCwXJwsVBfrsnTaWVrXLHU7JiXDmgBxSBwAuBbQFmWfEXc4c-zvYFTkjHr9Gt29wMKb3i7DOmMTOcKUeP_mg7gl9ChQSXzxPSYsV5G9w6jcU107TpEndVCfHwFfD-OfkI3UlCZhngL91gYkYuna_Egstmsy9DqMRLL0mY_iK2Vl7FBkSYUsJUVYb-n6M-O06VVU7_oO9ycOp52yaaMeZ7Arr84JXSIskVbLA96Y6ubqvvHRTRXS8tXRO3Y_IMXQ==&c=97Dz0cI-yMG0wXGnG7z1KVoxy2BMO_lY2D4tcv7rjxJkRYuRvIsSjw==&ch=qQRfHsp57ayLrA17Rcwt3i91Qim67Fpc75JK94d_fNL4DHKZz_TEMQ==)

| Peter -
42 percent approval rating.
59 percent disapproval rating on foreign policy.
52 percent disapproval rating on the economy.
55 percent disapproval rating on his job as Commander in Chief.
These are just some of the terrible numbers for Joe Biden in a [recent poll](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001H2Z9WcIz-t3B-UhU9IeiJ53UxrXBMe_5yx8McgwlLQ_ooRD2yBMikgh_u6PHT2QbSqd3muILQsolG97GU-A8AA94kHRAk1fBVBU8F4H1gN0wuis4voTdH5PectCoVOgfqP3rq_WfirZFojIoQHWG58IiJPTmxYSXM5V0Xo2cvA6yrHnsLKjEa0bayv5fsisw8L1dx90Vyes=&c=97Dz0cI-yMG0wXGnG7z1KVoxy2BMO_lY2D4tcv7rjxJkRYuRvIsSjw==&ch=qQRfHsp57ayLrA17Rcwt3i91Qim67Fpc75JK94d_fNL4DHKZz_TEMQ==). Yikes.
And it only gets worse.
---
| | | [TAKE THE POLL. HOW IS JOE BIDEN DOING AS PRESIDENT?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001H2Z9WcIz-t3B-UhU9IeiJ53UxrXBMe_5yx8McgwlLQ_ooRD2yBMiks9UzjdGPOkHxf8R135AB8DhCACAsmh8DWq7HwK_h43pTIRzKoZ6v-RcNi1L1QycnX4--WeAxd8Gdug9nxLGyx2b9V5stFNXayx4MqFfVXr4YlMSvQCp4P0PfF2zibwyu31888qb3tGoqDs_3f7xt44l7dXWHor7ilfvlHI459klDg4j7dUle4tPPFfXPnxq_SNFVS_kBGYwqY77tVlj_AbdqMv2a9r1T1B82dRR7kCGZpsVp2Tblvb7ChjIZurLQdI4YIA59r4oW4dMbE4fMQo=&c=97Dz0cI-yMG0wXGnG7z1KVoxy2BMO_lY2D4tcv7rjxJkRYuRvIsSjw==&ch=qQRfHsp57ayLrA17Rcwt3i91Qim67Fpc75JK94d_fNL4DHKZz_TEMQ==)

| "If there ever was a honeymoon for President Biden, it is clearly over. This is, with few exceptions, a poll full of troubling negatives... from overall job approval, to foreign policy, to the economy," said Quinnipiac University Polling Analyst Tim Malloy.
Our messaging is working.
I've been relentless in exposing the truth about Joe's terrible policies from the border to the economy to his handling of Afghanistan.
But we can't let off the gas now.
---
| | | [DONATE. EXPOSE THE TRUTH ABOUT JOE BIDEN'S PRESIDENCY.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001H2Z9WcIz-t3B-UhU9IeiJ53UxrXBMe_5yx8McgwlLQ_ooRD2yBMiks9UzjdGPOkHSm0suyrgjLVRxxx_M82is2gCfoQAquojd7OxLkDZrgouLcA4vc4Pbo_QrenPyDOUMeU5QBJjUE-NIg9cVeraIQKbF_yqtpGY9U6Ipg-tXh0bYRBGx165hKgkn3_QaQo4oO3VEAAMW5laf-cU4vBuaIw1fGaGTXkZ_QB7dfQsgbQHxM04V-pRGNLdNTzevntvo-ZzmzrC_HiZ5bSHPxWboWKos3VEqNVPQM2L8NeeoppWk-ciki5Q5NdGbwQiXxT9ffFqReM1iQIgq5a0eq0pGVh15Br5LMHHX-6hOJrHfSs=&c=97Dz0cI-yMG0wXGnG7z1KVoxy2BMO_lY2D4tcv7rjxJkRYuRvIsSjw==&ch=qQRfHsp57ayLrA17Rcwt3i91Qim67Fpc75JK94d_fNL4DHKZz_TEMQ==)

| |

| Joe is freaking out about these poll numbers, and he's only going to ramp up his efforts to get his socialist agenda through Congress before the American people realize what he's doing.
That's why we can't let up.
We need to re-double our efforts to take the fight to the socialist left and expose the impact their policies will have on the American people.
I'm ready to ramp up my messaging efforts, but I can't do this without you. [I need you in this fight if we are going to win.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001H2Z9WcIz-t3B-UhU9IeiJ53UxrXBMe_5yx8McgwlLQ_ooRD2yBMiks9UzjdGPOkHSm0suyrgjLVRxxx_M82is2gCfoQAquojd7OxLkDZrgouLcA4vc4Pbo_QrenPyDOUMeU5QBJjUE-NIg9cVeraIQKbF_yqtpGY9U6Ipg-tXh0bYRBGx165hKgkn3_QaQo4oO3VEAAMW5laf-cU4vBuaIw1fGaGTXkZ_QB7dfQsgbQHxM04V-pRGNLdNTzevntvo-ZzmzrC_HiZ5bSHPxWboWKos3VEqNVPQM2L8NeeoppWk-ciki5Q5DlYxEBIGUxC0EyYgUZp8ZprYNv_26b1kNG-T-QUKmfzOm2fzWTaHPw=&c=97Dz0cI-yMG0wXGnG7z1KVoxy2BMO_lY2D4tcv7rjxJkRYuRvIsSjw==&ch=qQRfHsp57ayLrA17Rcwt3i91Qim67Fpc75JK94d_fNL4DHKZz_TEMQ==)
Are you ready?

body:
| | | **[WOW! Since Republicans launched over 400 voter suppression bills across the country to suppress the vote, Barack AND Michelle Obama have BOTH called us to action to fight back. They're asking every last Democrat to STOP these Republican schemes attacking our voting rights and PROTECT our critical Democratic Majorities. We're calling for 2,000 gifts before midnight to answer their calls, DEFEAT House Republicans, and make the Obamas proud. Will you step up with $3 to defend our House Majority? >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/bazEfXmejgJ_)**

We need to move quickly.

**FIRST:**

After Republicans rushed over 400 voter suppression bills across the country to suppress the vote, President Obama broke his silence:

[](https://links.e.dccc.)

**THEN:**

Michelle Obama spoke out too -- and personally called us to action.

[](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/mPmpcqRY~)

**NOW:**

We're calling for 2,000 gifts before midnight to answer Michelle and Barack's calls to protect our House Majority.

**When two of our most beloved Democrats ask for our help, we wouldn 't dare let them down.**

**[So will you stand with the Obamas and rush $3 to defend our House Majority? >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/D_)**

name: Cheri Beasley
subject: We can win North Carolina.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Common Good Virginia
body:
They said a mom couldn’t win. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4mi5CmjcBWefeG876DYdJ3EljeCILQuSKApFGnBmeJJjyYuNwgTQGPx_akaPH9howmh2n93NISumsJUISw2O2dt2KRBZwx6Zj4PK9xqtbizOVdqQm4lcryDYs9r-CIuNm4QBDgOmqSS-RwV0fALVquOboXWBX3-DALPtC0uVQ4XBzyCRBCGY7LCXzAnFjdyTXs-dyBYd5nJjpZx8NhR_KdonPJ0L6v4GvpbQs56ggXRRXi8mF825rayrhg085gqVzEmPi1OFXAgfccHZMKkVNOgxCTUHyGOzHTOx8QyF06jWa6pseo2nfr-2nZph1nKcRjq/3fh/VH77OGJ4Q_ykeTxFjeWSlA/h0/8PgybKOtg3sIlLAaw4Cm4zAJ8TX51WOZDRzuoP9022g)
Derek,

In my first election, my opponent said I couldn’t win because I was a mom.

So I went door-to-door with my twin boys, and I won. By 30 points. [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4mi5CmjcBWefeG876DYdJ3EljeCILQuSKApFGnBmeJJjybc1kMKtu5MW0ZQNUwRMuBxKz-8pLpjcQeXoDbdSArHeAeeOsUTxW__AsTK913BbJ34nlsOrchJdAsPWS6n_j9u8o873txj-xVqPcetL-HEj46fA99fJxt0Y9KIlmX2Qro4ZcnTHf5cFVa9JqZsJ2gg_hzYfmjVv7XLKDp0JVvRZ2tEI3fYApwIxD00BwjB3dzbtV9j1gdtC_euyRePE_AmzkmXA4GWNZaukCflg8jHZOKr8pZgfTR9QWuyuBJlEaId-9zFdnRlIyK8q0fgy5-X/3fh/VH77OGJ4Q_ykeTxFjeWSlA/h1/h6TZ8L3dsUbepts8N2gsq9PqRmz0-pC4ypB_777jp_M) _My husband Curt and I with our twin boys_ I went on to win statewide twice and became the first African American woman to serve as chief justice of North Carolina’s Supreme Court.

Now, I’m taking on my toughest race yet: North Carolina’s open U.S. Senate seat.

Some have said that running to become the third African American woman ever to serve in the U.S. Senate — and the first African American senator from North Carolina — will be difficult to do.

But I’m no stranger to tough fights, and I don’t back down from a challenge.

**[If you’re ready to flip North Carolina and hold the Senate, can you split a $15 donation between our campaign and Common Good VA before our FEC deadline? There’s no doubt that we can win if we all work together and do our part.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4mi5CmjcBWefeG876DYdJ3ElrPkPShX7IyT41Lrewq4SOtTYGY_toKuJgDMxJe46frZcEADMI9rW-0bkbwR-oj3ABmtuBOQkgZX3dFCJKjwoOiCv1tQVn_KkDNK9bNfOX34RARrgeAPgVVCyVq3MPOn_KCRW25PlMS2Y6YjAJpo4S9ZsDLuDTAZp_isM7zvFXLFlCRhZJvBaTBteBf0dTUJOsC1zsoi2YWdjNWoS3qHnALFMJAP8vMEmVe76oAik4pmI6IK0qZ2rRcbrIK8c27yRrdzmawyvh8Bzow30x3BXUPZT33zJtZxc0qU5TFKB_qr-mgA6_3q1DqJ2qA5piyTuA/3fh/VH77OGJ4Q_ykeTxFjeWSlA/h2/H2sP-SuhKFOSdzkwV00MBFvKWdtUHxQLQ98qyrcsjvA)**

We’ve seen the same playbook and same type of candidates time and time again in North Carolina. It’s time for us to try something new.

The obstacles are real. History shows that there’s a consistent trend of underfunding for women and people of color who run for office.

But like my mother told me — with hard work and faith, we can do anything. Running for Senate required a big leap of faith — faith in myself and faith that enough good people like you would step up to support us.

No candidate can win a race like this on their own, so my hope is you’re up to answer the call at this important moment for our campaign.

**[If you can afford it, please split a $15 donation to our campaign and Common Good VA before our official FEC deadline. Every donation matters because each one sends a message that you believe that we can win North Carolina, hold the Senate, and win real change for the people of this country.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4mi5CmjcBWefeG876DYdJ3ElrPkPShX7IyT41Lrewq4SOtTYGY_toKuJgDMxJe46frZX83Mw4qon1Cczoy8PRgRglmKe-N_EEuiUymCNgkCJabafPm-W2U0YSb0zqtU3QgNHXs_iEi-1Hu5aj658IiSKN9BlF7QQoFt3GnGHBHLLe2jRLb8XwAS700oGkMCx3MEcQn1MfC23-3wUcBbGPR4AF89ESkUwQNGA9G3PcfZmxdIz2hj4OtnuAWODrqnnESNJZ08cW2hUxjpI-IiGJIK2xn0ID4NZNIeyPM1AODbxvRf5LIWzkjzcWVKn-8rjn_BT4veCc4nWrybAh9gsooKtQ/3fh/VH77OGJ4Q_ykeTxFjeWSlA/h3/IegMzYzAqXjIicwuyK_fsxrttQXv8JRLWlKwZIRip4I)**

I’m grateful to everyone that’s taken this leap of faith with us. I believe we will accomplish incredible things together, and when we all do our part, we will win.

\- Cheri Beasley
| [**DONATE »**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4mi5CmjcBWefeG876DYdJ3EljeCILQuSKApFGnBmeJJjyYSYtuSUE2vqHEDJrQqYjcjsLRYMCkFcAzOdbC6Tqz0u8PCN1G6KK8E-Hbxljg6E-iXEpAHI6RGWYNCvnfoVqNl4K7N-iwYvn69c2YCP3-aB0WSRFoY6XwykZQxdghyfN7B0pdWYsfKorzOU2JionvnXpy8vfwxcXyyxqyCTSIn9PpX_pas6FVB8hEZttZwqNkOpwIzJtslDNM_tZchZ866rRJA1Kdz-uepbKx9PE_rzFWkW0PD9PGg9T5gKKBf_Ws7NMKkco0cxkRGM6UORXHm/3fh/VH77OGJ4Q_ykeTxFjeWSlA/h4/PO97gnCEgnO1lMkvD86NtwVK-EWgqvNBFoREDsCBynY)

It’s time for us to try something new. The obstacles are real. History shows that there’s a consistent trend of underfunding for women and people of color who run for office. But like my mother told me — with hard work and faith, we can do anything. Running for Senate required a big leap of faith — faith in myself and faith that enough good people like you would step up to support us. No candidate can win a race like this on their own, so my hope is you’re up to answer the call at this important moment for our campaign. I’m grateful to everyone that’s taken this leap of faith with us. I believe we will accomplish incredible things together, and when we all do our part, we will win. \- Cheri Beasley | Paid for by Common Good Virginia | | Sent via . name: NextGen America
subject: Tell Congress to keep a path to citizenship in the final budget
body:
| | | The Senate Parliamentarian has issued the first of many procedural decisions on immigration, but we are undeterred. Democrats must pursue every possible option to pass a pathway to citizenship.
---
| [Send message](https://click.everyaction.com/k/36114478/307167185/123155966?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2M2E3YzdiYS00ZTFhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KCqouoNGXnqD-2x-uuF8FHkNqx2PnSDVZRmmjnaIxV4=&emci=fe12501c-311a-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=63a7c7ba-4e1a-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=6787172) |
|
Friend,
**Did you know that a strong majority of Americans — by a +41-point margin — supports legislation that would create an earned path to citizenship?**
Congress has a prime opportunity to provide long-awaited security and reprieve to Dreamers, TPS holders, farmworkers, and other undocumented essential workers by ensuring a pathway to citizenship stays in the budget.
**If American voters are calling out for immigration reform and our elected leaders are in a position to finally deliver on their promises, what are we waiting for?**
**Not only is a pathway to citizenship incredibly popular, it’s good for the economy.** A pathway to citizenship will boost wages, reduce deficits, and accelerate GDP growth. This crucial investment in the American economy is key to a robust economic recovery. And there is no moral economic recovery without including the immigrants who have kept this country running even amidst a global pandemic.
[**Congress needs to hear from you: Send a letter to demand that immigration stays in the budget reconciliation package.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/36114480/307167186/-1799158335?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2M2E3YzdiYS00ZTFhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KCqouoNGXnqD-2x-uuF8FHkNqx2PnSDVZRmmjnaIxV4=&emci=fe12501c-311a-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=63a7c7ba-4e1a-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=6787172)
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/36114481/307167187/2092524434?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2M2E3YzdiYS00ZTFhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KCqouoNGXnqD-2x-uuF8FHkNqx2PnSDVZRmmjnaIxV4=&emci=fe12501c-311a-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=63a7c7ba-4e1a-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=6787172) [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/36114482/307167188/2092524434?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2M2E3YzdiYS00ZTFhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KCqouoNGXnqD-2x-uuF8FHkNqx2PnSDVZRmmjnaIxV4=&emci=fe12501c-311a-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=63a7c7ba-4e1a-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=6787172)
**Senate Democrats have proposed a pathway to citizenship in the next budget reconciliation package, which can bypass a GOP filibuster and pass with a simple majority vote.** This is the best chance Democrats in Congress have had in years to finally bring hope to folks who have been waiting for a lifeline — and this time, Republicans won’t be able to block it.
The immigrant rights movement organized relentlessly for years to get us here. Our foot is in the door because of the multi-racial and multi-generational coalition of voters who have advanced this movement for immigrant justice. Now, it’s up to us to keep up the momentum and ensure citizenship stays in the version that reaches the president’s desk. **This is our year and reconciliation is our instrument.**
[**Urge Congress to keep a pathway to citizenship in the final budget reconciliation package.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/36114483/307167189/929725020?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2M2E3YzdiYS00ZTFhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KCqouoNGXnqD-2x-uuF8FHkNqx2PnSDVZRmmjnaIxV4=&emci=fe12501c-311a-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=63a7c7ba-4e1a-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=6787172)
[Send a message](https://click.everyaction.com/k/36114485/307167190/-636358921?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2M2E3YzdiYS00ZTFhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KCqouoNGXnqD-2x-uuF8FHkNqx2PnSDVZRmmjnaIxV4=&emci=fe12501c-311a-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=63a7c7ba-4e1a-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=6787172 "Sign up to text")

clean_body: | | | The Senate Parliamentarian has issued the first of many procedural decisions on immigration, but we are undeterred. Democrats must pursue every possible option to pass a pathway to citizenship. | | | Friend, Did you know that a strong majority of Americans — by a +41-point margin — supports legislation that would create an earned path to citizenship? Congress has a prime opportunity to provide long-awaited security and reprieve to Dreamers, TPS holders, farmworkers, and other undocumented essential workers by ensuring a pathway to citizenship stays in the budget. If American voters are calling out for immigration reform and our elected leaders are in a position to finally deliver on their promises, what are we waiting for? Not only is a pathway to citizenship incredibly popular, it’s good for the economy. A pathway to citizenship will boost wages, reduce deficits, and accelerate GDP growth. This crucial investment in the American economy is key to a robust economic recovery. And there is no moral economic recovery without including the immigrants who have kept this country running even amidst a global pandemic. Senate Democrats have proposed a pathway to citizenship in the next budget reconciliation package, which can bypass a GOP filibuster and pass with a simple majority vote. This is the best chance Democrats in Congress have had in years to finally bring hope to folks who have been waiting for a lifeline — and this time, Republicans won’t be able to block it. The immigrant rights movement organized relentlessly for years to get us here. Our foot is in the door because of the multi-racial and multi-generational coalition of voters who have advanced this movement for immigrant justice. Now, it’s up to us to keep up the momentum and ensure citizenship stays in the version that reaches the president’s desk. This is our year and reconciliation is our instrument. "Sign up to text" Join us in this moment, NextGen America | NextGen America 268 Bush St. #2919 San Francisco CA 94104-3503 This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | =

Fellow Conservative,

What if I told you that even just $1 dollar could make a difference as me and my Republican colleagues work to take back control of the House from the socialist Democrats next November? **[Would you donate $1?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e0c7fdbe96304596a54ab1833e4500ff&_e=ur4pGyvy_WMShDVI1s8XQVjXe0mA-JmY3wUT7nZ_2O1Q9PKSxH0Q6KFn6ZuJa9RGnS2UVGsNfcrmfX0WoaL5H_eob3QTn1wAMVviRjy-GWnrstz0f2dCAalvrbxmofnbIJFncIuaBovXiso3WnUPZVxwgbRsAwRTqekExnUrZxsFMI8QJIs8yr_B8PWoAFnE9nmk0Udsj4udTsSUlpkdkz1h_rN2lvogqKpwxaJLF-mCokJo13Q_RQKyjW5AdW1egB6u3xwTEXn10Or64RmSpX0-B-WjXeltUtB2o9uscqXGY7Hfky8MfrGYTYYc6ApfDD_XcWOzGBczfCcgKlj2BW0UXyiXoSdRshKC9BY5lZU%3D)**

By now, you are probably well aware that if we don’t do anything to stand in their way, Democrats are going to bankrupt the United States. And the best part? They’re using the same approach that they did when then jammed Obamacare through the House ten years ago. **When the price tag of a bill in consideration is $3.5 TRILLION, we ought to take the time to make sure we know what’s in it before we pass it**.

[**HELP US TAKE BACK THE HOUSE
CHIP IN $1 OR MORE->**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e0c7fdbe96304596a54ab1833e4500ff&_e=ur4pGyvy_WMShDVI1s8XQVjXe0mA-JmY3wUT7nZ_2O1Q9PKSxH0Q6KFn6ZuJa9RGnS2UVGsNfcrmfX0WoaL5H_eob3QTn1wAMVviRjy-GWnrstz0f2dCAalvrbxmofnbIJFncIuaBovXiso3WnUPZVY8XMcNXD30VfIBLNipo7IWcL8mvAsVIjWS51G9Vx9BFr_GSkMgdRDW_QAagzZi5X-Qme-d2okCjbmhiv9wMwhlo0MEMZPuIhLCh2nGdNr_efWpMjBrRmkG7D15lNpU7Y7-8GS0JjscqAZSnTlhQPM1zmik6GiNOn-6nOR7CqVkergbHovkmquQYGSviushfJRb6ou2Z57IYn_OVPogTvE%3D)

**But no. The Democrat in charge of moving the bill through the house said recently** ,

_"detailing tax-increase plans too soon can give too much time for opposition to build."_

**No way??**

**[If that crooked DC insider way of thinking upsets you as much as it upsets me, please consider contributing $1 or more right now toward my team’s efforts to send Democrats back into the minority.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e0c7fdbe96304596a54ab1833e4500ff&_e=ur4pGyvy_WMShDVI1s8XQVjXe0mA-JmY3wUT7nZ_2O1Q9PKSxH0Q6KFn6ZuJa9RGnS2UVGsNfcrmfX0WoaL5H_eob3QTn1wAMVviRjy-GWnrstz0f2dCAalvrbxmofnbIJFncIuaBovXiso3WnUPZdynXAMgG1Wm9uZj6NpecaXrkiiR_FwpY5vPYNpmhutltVUEC4oOGGRD2Y486iujcxDuryYz84MqhatZEDkPzLkWjCLpnZhr_APOESDGP62DIFWYbRel3m6wYeRNaPKX3igpNSHPFW2xYebSXxYG_JWfGVedTj9YDgfoFDtiBPPL07f7RYW39S_C4REwk2VS6w0JMtrBTZ3E_3ywFKvHoNA%3D)**

So I am asking: [**Can you please split a $15 contribution between my campaign and Seth Moulton before this critical, end-of-quarter fundraising deadline comes to a close? name: Malcolm Kenyatta
subject: Humbly asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
I know how difficult and how upside-down our economy has been for families like mine
#

Hey everybody,
In one second, I'm going to ask you to chip in $3 to my campaign. But first, let me tell you why:
When working people are able to be in the room where decisions are made about our lives, we can be a part of crafting solutions that work for us.
**It's not good enough to have politicians talking about working people or to working people.**
When decisions are being made about the quality of our schools, about fixing our broken justice system, and even about our fundamental right to vote, working people need to be in the room — period.
I'm a working class person from North Philly, raised by two working class parents.
So I know how difficult and how upside-down our economy has been for families like mine.
We can change that — but it's going to require all of us playing our part. And I need your support.
[So, I'm humbly asking you to chip in $3 or whatever you can afford to help power this movement.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36118375/307170047/-353695395?refcode2=6d574a9a-511a-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210920-1-15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZDU3NGE5YS01MTFhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S3zZnTqNgUD7mUA76KJF8mqLFwfIOI1t4bja-GuFQXQ=)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36118378/307170048/-353695395?refcode2=6d574a9a-511a-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210920-1-15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZDU3NGE5YS01MTFhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S3zZnTqNgUD7mUA76KJF8mqLFwfIOI1t4bja-GuFQXQ=)**
Every donation is a powerful statement that working class people must speak for ourselves in the room where decisions are made about our lives.
Thanks for everything you do,
Malcolm

name: Peter Ambler, Giffords.org
subject: YOU answered Gabby’s call – and we need to call on you again today
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
This is a long email but please read the whole thing.
#

Friends,
One month after twenty children and six teachers and staffers were murdered at Sandy Hook Elementary School, Gabby Giffords went before the U.S. Senate to urge our leaders to make our communities safer.
Only two years into her recovery after being shot herself, speaking was difficult for her – but her message was clear:
_“Be bold,” she urged. “Be courageous. Americans are counting on you.”_
Yet, outrageously, in the wake of that horrific tragedy and so many since, Congress has failed to rise to Gabby’s challenge and enact any major federal gun reform despite historic efforts in the House of Representatives.
But her plea was not ignored – **YOU** answered Gabby’s call and our grassroots movement has grown to over 2 million people who have succeeded in putting the gun lobby on the defensive and upended gun politics in the United States!
Now more than ever, this country desperately needs the courage and bold action that you have brought to this life-or-death issue.
Despite our successes at the polls, gun deaths are on the rise nationwide, leaving no community untouched. It boggles my mind that we have the weakest gun laws and the most guns – 393 million – of any comparable nation. To continue to do nothing is not an option.
[**That’s why I’m reaching out to committed supporters like you to ask you to reaffirm your support by making a $3 contribution to our fight to save lives. You can make that contribution here:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-sept21?refcode=em210920-1-15&t=1&refcode2=882_3935704_a9ISgK&akid=882%2E3935704%2Ea9ISgK)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-sept21?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em210920-1-15&t=20&refcode2=882_3935704_a9ISgK&akid=882%2E3935704%2Ea9ISgK)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-sept21?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em210920-1-15&t=21&refcode2=882_3935704_a9ISgK&akid=882%2E3935704%2Ea9ISgK)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-sept21?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em210920-1-15&t=22&refcode2=882_3935704_a9ISgK&akid=882%2E3935704%2Ea9ISgK)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-sept21?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em210920-1-15&t=23&refcode2=882_3935704_a9ISgK&akid=882%2E3935704%2Ea9ISgK)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-sept21?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em210920-1-15&t=24&refcode2=882_3935704_a9ISgK&akid=882%2E3935704%2Ea9ISgK)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-sept21?express_lane=true&refcode=em210920-1-15&t=25&refcode2=882_3935704_a9ISgK&akid=882%2E3935704%2Ea9ISgK)**
---
****
The reason we need your continued support is simple: Everyone knows what needs to be done to stop gun violence – but it’s up to us to make sure our elected officials demonstrate the courage and political will to get it done.
As I write this email, our biggest legislative priority – passing a bill requiring universal background checks for all gun purchases – is awaiting a vote in the Senate.
A few years ago, that challenge would have been too great. But now, every politician will think twice about voting “no” on universal background checks because they know we will hold them accountable on Election Day if they fail to protect our country from gun violence.
I hope you are proud of all that Giffords PAC has been able to accomplish. It may look to some like a political miracle. _It isn’t._ It is the result of a meticulous, relentless commitment and vision made possible by your perseverance and generosity.
Your contribution right now will help us conduct polling, develop messaging strategies, and identify critical constituencies that can make the difference in close elections.
[**When Gabby asked you to join her in this movement to end gun violence, you didn’t hesitate to say “Yes.” Today I hope we can count on you to say “Yes” once again and donate to support our work.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-sept21?refcode=em210920-1-15&t=26&refcode2=882_3935704_a9ISgK&akid=882%2E3935704%2Ea9ISgK)
Thank you for all you are doing to help save lives.
Sincerely,
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-sept21?refcode=em210920-1-15&t=27&refcode2=882_3935704_a9ISgK&akid=882%2E3935704%2Ea9ISgK)

Peter Ambler
Executive Director
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-sept21?refcode=em210920-1-15&t=28&refcode2=882_3935704_a9ISgK&akid=882%2E3935704%2Ea9ISgK)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=29&akid=882%2E3935704%2Ea9ISgK) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Mark Kelly for Senate
subject: do you have two minutes?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
The results were pretty close to what we suspected, although it was a little surprising to see climate change as the top issue by such a wide margin.
#

Hey, friends —
Earlier this month, we sent you a survey asking about the top issues that impact your life, maybe you missed it.
The results were pretty close to what we suspected, although it was a little surprising to see climate change as the top issue by such a wide margin. Health care was second, closely followed by COVID-19.
But the truth is, we need some more results for these findings to be complete. So we’re asking:
[**Can you please take our issues survey before midnight tonight? It’s really important for us to get a sense of the issues you care about most.**](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-sept-issue-survey/?source=em210920-1-15&refcode2=1359.6688874.roI_zu&t=1&akid=1359%2E6688874%2EroI_zu)
**[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-sept-issue-survey/?source=em210920-1-15&refcode2=1359.6688874.roI_zu&t=2&akid=1359%2E6688874%2EroI_zu)**
From what we can tell, people think Mark is doing a good job as a Senator, they think the campaign is going well so far, and they understand that National Republicans are going to spend a lot of money to try to beat Mark in this race.
But again, we really need a few more responses in order to feel confident about the results.
So please:
[**Take just 2 short minutes to complete Mark Kelly’s issue survey.**](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-sept-issue-survey/?source=em210920-1-15&refcode2=1359.6688874.roI_zu&t=3&akid=1359%2E6688874%2EroI_zu)
Thanks again,
Team Kelly

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=1359%2E6688874%2EroI_zu).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.
clean_body: The results were pretty close to what we suspected, although it was a little surprising to see climate change as the top issue by such a wide margin. Hey, friends — Earlier this month, we sent you a survey asking about the top issues that impact your life, maybe you missed it. The results were pretty close to what we suspected, although it was a little surprising to see climate change as the top issue by such a wide margin. Health care was second, closely followed by COVID-19. But the truth is, we need some more results for these findings to be complete. So we’re asking: From what we can tell, people think Mark is doing a good job as a Senator, they think the campaign is going well so far, and they understand that National Republicans are going to spend a lot of money to try to beat Mark in this race. But again, we really need a few more responses in order to feel confident about the results. So please: Thanks again, Team Kelly Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate

name: Josh Harder
subject: homelessness is a crisis
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Harder for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/2e52bn0_1rsmGE1yHagrv2FK7fAxfsMN69QSrtRoam4=/6DACUrxzIFaD7o0CiPVcfF1O5XgNe4GeYUWpXkk72Dg=?refcode=E11362-20210920-AffordableHousing-header-HousingHomelessness-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15) | Peter, Did you know that on any given night in California, there's 170,000 people living on the streets? In the wealthiest country on Earth, that is simply shameful. Homelessness is a crisis here in California and we have to treat it with the seriousness it demands. So I wanted to give you an update on all the work we've been doing. Last year I released a comprehensive plan to combat homelessness with 3 main provisions:
* Bring more federal resources to homelessness emergency areas
* Improve mental and behavioral health care
* Build more affordable housing

And then we got to work. In the past year (even during the pandemic) we've been able to take some big steps forward. **Directing more federal dollars to homelessness emergency areas:** We've brought home more than $11 million in Homeless Emergency Solutions Grants and more than $30 million in direct rent and utility assistance. These two programs are getting folks out of tough situations and making sure no one teetering on the edge becomes homeless in the first place. **More support for mental and behavioral health care:** We secured federal funding for two transformative projects here in the Valley. The first, the Youth Navigation Center, is a first of it's kind wrap-around services center that will functionally end youth homelessness in our community. The second, the Mental Health Residential Facilities Bed Shortage Regional Partnership, will bring together all of the counties in the region to plan for a brand new in-patient mental health facility. **Building more affordable housing:** I just got back from a tour of Modesto's 1612 project, an unprecedented new construction that will house low and moderate income folks and become a hub for local businesses. We're working to bring the project new federal dollars and I can't wait to see it open soon. I share these updates to show there's no silver bullet. We have to do the hard work every day on projects big and small to make a dent in a system that has left too many behind. These problems won't be fixed overnight, but I know that together with your support, we can get our neighbors off the streets and set up for long term success. Thanks for reading,
Josh
---
* * *

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/2e52bn0_1rsmGE1yHagrv2FK7fAxfsMN69QSrtRoam4=/nwqyqhN3C21nfd8LHQsszDk_xmA8-CSWu4gDqmyhleo=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/2e52bn0_1rsmGE1yHagrv2FK7fAxfsMN69QSrtRoam4=/SKX9zg5w96nCbn7awTkbh26CQAS9-PU34g-7o5UxYAk=)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because CA-10 is one of our nation's most pivotal tossup districts. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, we understand. You can click [**here**](https://act.myngp.com/el/2e52bn0_1rsmGE1yHagrv2FK7fAxfsMN69QSrtRoam4=/Snz14lDPe1JU4WkjebXjJ2zkp5NKI1PUyN38TW1Y7uM=?recipientId=JGP1LIgKX8KYGR8WifkGL1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com) to get only the most important updates, or you can [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/2e52bn0_1rsmGE1yHagrv2FK7fAxfsMN69QSrtRoam4=/xwwsX1X6mGERLRhKuAPDat7KmoexhbA9C_VSukedkjk=) here.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/2e52bn0_1rsmGE1yHagrv2FK7fAxfsMN69QSrtRoam4=/6DACUrxzIFaD7o0CiPVcfF1O5XgNe4GeYUWpXkk72Dg=?refcode=E11362-20210920-AffordableHousing-footer-HousingHomelessness-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15)
[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/2e52bn0_1rsmGE1yHagrv2FK7fAxfsMN69QSrtRoam4=/6DACUrxzIFaD7o0CiPVcfF1O5XgNe4GeYUWpXkk72Dg=?refcode=E11362-20210920-AffordableHousing-footer-HousingHomelessness-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15)

Josh and his wife Pam live in Turlock where Josh grew up and delivered newspapers for the Turlock Journal. Josh was re-elected to Congress on behalf of families in the Central Valley where he's fighting to hold our government accountable, pass COVID-19 relief, and deliver on our progressive values. **[Will you help him keep up the fight in Congress by making a contribution today?](https://act.myngp.com/el/2e52bn0_1rsmGE1yHagrv2FK7fAxfsMN69QSrtRoam4=/6DACUrxzIFaD7o0CiPVcfF1O5XgNe4GeYUWpXkk72Dg=?refcode=E11362-20210920-AffordableHousing-footer-HousingHomelessness-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15)**

Nancy Pelosi should turn her attention to the REAL INSURRECTION that took place when General Milley willingly SUBVERTED his then-Commander in Chief, President Trump.

_A new book alleges that General Milley called his Chinese Communist counterpart and promised that he would give them an advance warning if the United States were to attack China._

_Let me repeat that allegation ... an unelected general told America's Communist adversaries that he would undermine the actions of his duly elected Commander in Chief and conduct his own foreign policy contrary to our national security._
---
**But General Milley is now being PRAISED by Joe Biden -- all while innocent patriots like me and many others are being ruthlessly targeted with bogus charges.**
---
You see, my freedom isn't the only thing on the line here, Peter.
---
The fate of America as a free and just country with a commitment to the rule of law hangs in the balance.
---
If the Deep State can ruin me, they could one day do the same to you.
---

**As a Black man running to be Iowa's next governor, I'm not setting out to make history -- but I do plan on making a difference.** It all starts with something I learned from my parents at a young age.

Iowa welcomed my grandmother in 1957 after she packed up her family in an old station wagon and fled a sharecropping plantation in Tchula, Mississippi.

My dad was only seven years old when he arrived. He went on to take a job at John Deere and stayed for more than 40 years. He was an active member of the United Auto Workers union and barely missed a day of work in his life.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36130373/307176500/975127612?refcode=em-92021-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODQxMDFkMS01NzFhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hgNHyUpW4v07rysUY1QTcO4l5grOLmWuCvpWmdiwZJ0=)
_My dad with my siblings and me._
My mom served as military police, and then became a pastor. Here's a story about how they taught me to treat people:

One Easter Sunday, a few folks at our church told my mom they couldn't afford to buy and wear their "Sunday best." My mom immediately got on the phone and told them **"No, come as you are."**

That story has stuck with me my whole life. You see, my mom did not want clothes or money to be a barrier for folks to participate in community.

To me, "come as you are" means Iowa could be a state where everyone is welcome -- no matter how much money you have, who you voted for, or what part of the state you call home.

**Unfortunately the opportunities my parents had to not just survive, but thrive, are further out of reach for more working families today than ever before.**

Instead of working to change that, politicians like my opponent Kim Reynolds and the rest of the Iowa GOP have only made them worse.

[**I'm running to be Iowa's next governor so that everyone has the opportunity to not just survive, but truly thrive. If you agree, chip in $5 to make sure more voters know another future is possible, and that I'm ready to take on Kim Reynolds and win.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36130375/307176502/975127612?refcode=em-92021-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODQxMDFkMS01NzFhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hgNHyUpW4v07rysUY1QTcO4l5grOLmWuCvpWmdiwZJ0=)

clean_body: I'm not setting out to make history -- but I do plan on making a difference. | Ras Smith is running to replace Kim Reynolds, one of America's worst pandemic governors. He's a father, husband, public servant, hunter, farmer, coach, and counselor who believes Iowa deserves better.= We'd hate to see you go, but if you no longer receive email from us, please . = = | = As a Black man running to be Iowa's next governor, I'm not setting out to make history -- but I do plan on making a difference. It all starts with something I learned from my parents at a young age. Iowa welcomed my grandmother in 1957 after she packed up her family in an old station wagon and fled a sharecropping plantation in Tchula, Mississippi. My dad was only seven years old when he arrived. He went on to take a job at John Deere and stayed for more than 40 years. He was an active member of the United Auto Workers union and barely missed a day of work in his life. = My dad with my siblings and me. My mom served as military police, and then became a pastor. Here's a story about how they taught me to treat people: One Easter Sunday, a few folks at our church told my mom they couldn't afford to buy and wear their "Sunday best." My mom immediately got on the phone and told them "No, come as you are." That story has stuck with me my whole life. You see, my mom did not want clothes or money to be a barrier for folks to participate in community. To me, "come as you are" means Iowa could be a state where everyone is welcome -- no matter how much money you have, who you voted for, or what part of the state you call home. Unfortunately the opportunities my parents had to not just survive, but thrive, are further out of reach for more working families today than ever before. Instead of working to change that, politicians like my opponent Kim Reynolds and the rest of the Iowa GOP have only made them worse. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks, Ras Smith Democrat for Governor PS. "Come as you are" means that on our campaign -- you don't have to be perfect, have it all figured out, or worry about saying the wrong thing. I just need your commitment that you'll work for a better Iowa. So what do you say, friend?= = | | Paid for by Ras Smith for Governor Ras Smith for Governor P. O. The Senate parliamentarian's ruling is disappointing, and while we're optimistic that Democrats will hopefully identify a workaround to address this urgent need, we need to show that we have their back.

body:
Things have been tough here in Nevada lately. Under our current leadership, Nevadans have faced endless lockdowns, business closures, and rising crime [](http://links.deanheller.com/u/click?_t=1ca3cf9eff954af6abde4c492f66d1d2&_m=7c98f80994d746578ced794479c1f134&_e=bJRpCV4tzA23L7lfsptpOsv9zhlzPeik8_8jC_hyRBf4N4-a2GpWddrQiHoejdwmQPVokGUL3gzG0gmrBr0rtYcI4vVJvzD4-TSWJ9yzzkbPWlOyoMWjQxlQhyzJhvaqfV2ULD8hcAcJKWsP653kFnda6felN-GK8fW27hRIBrp_mznsvDs-82JeYCe2bg-2e_yQxHnwjCQwiMBmOS8TbKfre97K1QMkV3WaBaoUEPk1v6Zg5IuLp9SBV2j7xCJHMwPapEgzwMjGr8z-jcN7dE0MH6UpKeEAMFYXWR3XYgLHcot8z55kC3zLVE6_mb6N6k-rIJ0NI8z0H9eyTI5iVPjdx0nNnUHjRmkxMM_CUmjI0BfXmKLHm5Mb613_TbwdZOd0bHTyzNDwxdiIshzWK_7N7XShVHsEctjqtx8zHOhRjmdmsJ-OT13CN3923vA0cVwKNiiHLzcYiiGQDRlwbEbvPDWK31nKFLCSI1FENfK6O9eEmlRDDAUgXHIvz-8k) | |
---
Peter, things have been tough here in Nevada lately.

Under our current leadership, Nevadans have faced endless lockdowns, business closures, and rising violent crime rates.

We have a governor more interested in locking us out of work than putting us back to work.

Las Vegas became a sanctuary city.

People who work for a living are scared.

**I've had it.**

I'm sick of seeing Abortion clinics open while churches and schools are closed, and my grandkids playing soccer in masks.

I’ve seen a lot, Peter. But what’s happening in our state is hurting Nevadans. I can’t sit back and watch the state I love struggle.

**Under Governor Sisolak, Nevada is headed in the wrong direction.**

_That’s why after much careful consideration and prayer, I’ve decided to run for Governor._

**_To get Nevada back to work, and to serve Nevadans._**

I didn’t take the decision to run for Governor lightly. But, honestly, I couldn’t stand idly by as Nevadans suffer any longer.
[](http://links.deanheller.com/u/click?_t=1ca3cf9eff954af6abde4c492f66d1d2&_m=7c98f80994d746578ced794479c1f134&_e=bJRpCV4tzA23L7lfsptpOsv9zhlzPeik8_8jC_hyRBf4N4-a2GpWddrQiHoejdwmQPVokGUL3gzG0gmrBr0rtYcI4vVJvzD4-TSWJ9yzzkbPWlOyoMWjQxlQhyzJhvaqfV2ULD8hcAcJKWsP653kFnda6felN-GK8fW27hRIBrp_mznsvDs-82JeYCe2bg-2e_yQxHnwjCQwiMBmOS8TbKfre97K1QMkV3WaBaoUEPk1v6Zg5IuLp9SBV2j7xCJHMwPapEgzwMjGr8z-jcN7dJmpk02IqxkpeNM-oghIDzw4zU2oVp9TRxH2UUz9Apw1N9hX9MhvmqvvNMeKeRdFggj2n3kj2vQUdsVdAS19t76DdgCWyGGCsvFTzM-7G1FrG3PqaqmsqMj1vZnAjcwdM_kfRxm77cUPtLtFVJLyZiboYNL1tMjkWI7pbJrmqGPr86aIrsNqZ2SpPIXYxfPl0zAGs0OJYnpIEfEf3WNHwhYwBUzsqizdUrUso1xe9O3j)
[**WATCH NOW >>**](http://links.deanheller.com/u/click?_t=1ca3cf9eff954af6abde4c492f66d1d2&_m=7c98f80994d746578ced794479c1f134&_e=bJRpCV4tzA23L7lfsptpOsv9zhlzPeik8_8jC_hyRBf4N4-a2GpWddrQiHoejdwmQPVokGUL3gzG0gmrBr0rtYcI4vVJvzD4-TSWJ9yzzkbPWlOyoMWjQxlQhyzJhvaqfV2ULD8hcAcJKWsP653kFnda6felN-GK8fW27hRIBrp_mznsvDs-82JeYCe2bg-2e_yQxHnwjCQwiMBmOS8TbKfre97K1QMkV3WaBaoUEPk1v6Zg5IuLp9SBV2j7xCJHMwPapEgzwMjGr8z-jcN7dFCyfqHuUfY4v9xkHqG4qGxi8sjwh_-Hu4MIOc4IoJEvp_2UXQm5cETe5enLd8QVgl_3YukMOoeZn-pLC0WYlAfPFsgH2As9tLsjs1J1iMeS5Yk0TfEemDaQ4YWe2AmxFcmbsQuxv1vCjXr2OGbtSy98ltY0BxByB6GBeYD8XQ64CeD5ty6KdnZMNJiuNy3wT0ot4R4qwsxEMN_jHo8DJtYu5F-3UCyNLBfpf3gW06N0)
One of the things I am most excited about is getting on the road to talk to Nevadans on the campaign trail. I’m looking forward to getting the chance to hear the stories and struggles of folks like you.

And I know there will be tales of triumph, too. Because Nevadans are tough as nails, and not even hard times or bad leadership can keep us down.

**I may be the driver in this race, but a driver is only as good as his crew. **

I’m counting on you to see this thing through with me. That starts today.

clean_body: Things have been tough here in Nevada lately. Under our current leadership, Nevadans have faced endless lockdowns, business closures, and rising crime | | Peter, things have been tough here in Nevada lately. Under our current leadership, Nevadans have faced endless lockdowns, business closures, and rising violent crime rates. We have a governor more interested in locking us out of work than putting us back to work. Las Vegas became a sanctuary city. People who work for a living are scared. I've had it. I'm sick of seeing Abortion clinics open while churches and schools are closed, and my grandkids playing soccer in masks. I’ve seen a lot, Peter. But what’s happening in our state is hurting Nevadans. I can’t sit back and watch the state I love struggle. Under Governor Sisolak, Nevada is headed in the wrong direction. That’s why after much careful consideration and prayer, I’ve decided to run for Governor. To get Nevada back to work, and to serve Nevadans. I didn’t take the decision to run for Governor lightly. But, honestly, I couldn’t stand idly by as Nevadans suffer any longer. One of the things I am most excited about is getting on the road to talk to Nevadans on the campaign trail. I’m looking forward to getting the chance to hear the stories and struggles of folks like you. And I know there will be tales of triumph, too. Because Nevadans are tough as nails, and not even hard times or bad leadership can keep us down. I may be the driver in this race, but a driver is only as good as his crew. I’m counting on you to see this thing through with me. That starts today. I’m building a pit crew here. I need a team that I can count on to fuel the tanks. If you chip in $10 to my campaign on launch day (that’s today!) you’ll receive an official HELLER PIT CREW membership card. With a team that is Nevada Tough, I know we can do anything, Peter. This race means everything to me and to the future of Nevada. The finish line is in Carson City, and I’ll see you there. Peter,
This year has been an unmitigated disaster for the Biden Administration, both at home and abroad. Since day one, Joe Biden’s policies have caused crises, starting on our southern border, and culminating with what the world witnessed over the last month.

**There is a clear crisis of confidence in Joe Biden’s ability to lead.** His administration has trouble providing the American public answers to our most pressing questions, from the border crisis to the origins of Covid to Afghanistan.

At every turn, Democrats have covered for him, and the media has enabled him. [**We must hold Democrats accountable: https://secure.winred.com/josh-hawley-committee/bidens_crisis_of_confidence.**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=6b9ee4e3da4a4789ab4a35b000b5f2d3&_e=ZFyv_r1phm7iShLeF_VGd5tZFC7HtknEQOjwa1luuWXKvUjVnMW2B111nmsCf2BfjChyAZyeogNfKyoD9y-yzCqwMi3oVt7ZVpzcd9GyNvi-Uo0vqM90ro37eIQtnGPNOe-652_7cfzhd7z0en3enc9J9EAgg4HmYXrM1u8sG0s9vKKCxfPqGl4hgJtV67PE1Ddj2w7wJ40K_NCP6n_f4SW2rYxdgESfV68En2u-tH2IFNxJGhDhVgFSyBwdds7sowsYaOoj8GyR-tIeI7-pnynu50VHIengwY58qMEldPr8mrNhonQnPXXMBx_dl-enlK_pXJD_3Vp1v6Cs3LM1GHLsniVOqI0PxrFzxWAJtbDhr_68EdP4H635NrQ-zGFknQCA9TzNGrj_TJoUNITD28bCf3dZKiLIewjKbDETSb8%3D)

Mark Pukita will be speaking at a protest outside the Ohio Department of Education on Tuesday, September 21. Unlike other speakers, however, Pukita will ALSO be testifying before the State Board of Education focused on two items:

- AN IMMEDIATE END TO 1ST AMENDMENT RESTRICTIONS: Demand a pending resolution, to end 1st Amendment Restrictions during public participation, be passed unanimously (it is voting item #27 on the agenda). Some months ago, the Board put unconstitutional restrictions on speakers.
- AN IMMEDIATE REPEAL THE EQUITY RESOLUTION FROM 2020: Demand an immediate emergency consideration of the REPEAL of the Equity Resolution.

To prevail, we are going to need to really FIGHT to stop CRT, not just give speeches away from the Board Meeting action. Not a single other protest speaker even requested to speak to the State Board of Education itself.
