Speakers need to get approval for their remarks to the State Board of Education. Mark Pukita's approved remarks are below.

Pukita's Approved Remarks to be made on September 21 before the State Board of Education

My name is Mark Pukita and I live in Dublin. I spoke here on July 13, 2021.

I asked for tough, on the record, immediate votes on ending your disgusting and unconstitutional 1st Amendment restrictions and on repealing the 2020 Equity Resolution. You failed to even vote on either.

Conservatives should have been fighting for immediate emergency consideration of both. Instead, they cowered in the corner at the slightest pushback and then sat on their hands from then on. Instead of acting, they protected others from tough, on the record, votes. Maybe even protecting themselves from a tough, on the record vote, that would show what kind of people Governor DeWine has appointed to this Board.

Parents have been clamoring for action for a year. They deserved real action in July, before schools went back in session. Instead, they got inaction and a useless, John Hagen request to Dave Yost to write a letter to the Board on the Constitutionality of the Equity Resolution.

That proved to be a waste of time that resolved nothing, except that a contractor cannot be forced to take implicit bias training. Wow. Is that what parents are mad about? Is that what they wanted from you? Of course not. They wanted the Equity Resolution repealed, not kick the can SWAMP politics.

When I spoke in July, Mr. Hagan lectured me. He called my “guns a-blazing approach” dumb. He accused me of thinking I was the smartest guy in the room. With all due respect, I am not the smartest guy in the room, but I am the guy in the room calling you out and exposing you for wasting time and failing Ohio parents, children, and families.

In July you had a chance to act, before the schools opened, to force a vote on repeal of the Equity Resolution. You could have pressed for emergency consideration to restore 1st Amendment rights and to repeal the Equity Resolution. Instead, you played typical SWAMP politics. You failed Ohio parents, children, and families. Will you do the same here today?

Today is another opportunity for there to be a straight-up resolution to simply repeal the Equity Resolution. Your rules allow for a resolution to be declared an emergency, acted on, and made effective, today. If the President and Vice President do not allow emergency consideration, any member can demand an on the record vote of the Board on emergency consideration. You all know that. Why don’t you do that?

We want to know where you all stand now, on September 21, 2021 - - On the record. Particularly, Governor DeWine’s appointees.

I have provided a very simple resolution to repeal the Equity Resolution. Let me read it:

WHEREAS on July 14, 2020, the State Board of Education passed the resolution entitled “Resolution to Condemn Racism and to Advance Equity and Opportunity for Black Students, Indigenous Students, and Students of Color” (hereafter “the Equity Resolution”); and

WHEREAS the Equity Resolution has caused division and dissent when it was intended to foster unity and collaboration; therefore, Be It

RESOLVED, That the State Board of Education REPEALS the Equity Resolution effective immediately; and, Be It Further

RESOLVED, That the State Board of Education INSTRUCTS the Ohio Department of Education to suspend all policies enacted as a result of the Equity Resolution effective immediately.

We don’t need more than that. We don’t need a resolution watered down with symbolic words. We need simple, direct, “guns a-blazing.” We need there to be no excuses to not act now, today, on the record, as an emergency.

Thank you for this chance to speak. I welcome any questions.

Mark Pukita for US Senate 2022 Committee, 4467 Donegal Cliffs Drive, Dublin, Ohio 43017, USA, (614) 946-0949

I have provided a very simple resolution to repeal the Equity Resolution. Let me read it: WHEREAS on July 14, 2020, the State Board of Education passed the resolution entitled “Resolution to Condemn Racism and to Advance Equity and Opportunity for Black Students, Indigenous Students, and Students of Color” (hereafter “the Equity Resolution”); and WHEREAS the Equity Resolution has caused division and dissent when it was intended to foster unity and collaboration; therefore, Be It RESOLVED, That the State Board of Education REPEALS the Equity Resolution effective immediately; and, Be It Further RESOLVED, That the State Board of Education INSTRUCTS the Ohio Department of Education to suspend all policies enacted as a result of the Equity Resolution effective immediately. We don’t need more than that. We don’t need a resolution watered down with symbolic words. We need simple, direct, “guns a-blazing.” We need there to be no excuses to not act now, today, on the record, as an emergency. Thank you for this chance to speak. I welcome any questions. Mark Pukita for US Senate 2022 Committee, 4467 Donegal Cliffs Drive, Dublin, Ohio 43017, USA, (614) 946-0949

name: American Update
subject: "The best commentary on the principles of government ever written"
body:
You may have heard a lot of talk in the media lately about how our Constitution [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8795%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=5IY8l5afhzvCibEmP56TDA&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c04797%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CJK0xNjac7opzyCqO53Sew&sysid=1) [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c04798%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CA%2bIVu%2f%2fKs2RVqXLoLRoXQ&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American,
I hope you’re having a good day today.
You may have heard a lot of talk in the media lately about how our Constitution, as designed by the Founding Fathers, is flawed and outdated.
It may make you wonder, as it does me: How should defenders of the Constitution respond to these charges?
Well, a few early defenders of the Constitution--Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison--have given us the guide: The Federalist Papers.
These essays were written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, The Federalist Papers, and were published initially as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution.
Thomas Jefferson described **[The Federalist Papers](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c04799%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=uKnO%2bWEPdQDrdeJqfMygvQ&sysid=1)** as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.”
There is no better guide to understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than through the words of the Founders themselves. That’s why I’d like to give you the chance to enroll in Hillsdale’s free online course,**[“The Federalist Papers,”](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c04790%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=E3DaRKG7AUwqn%2bHIJNvOJw&sysid=1)** today.
Taught by Hillsdale College’s politics faculty, this ten-lecture course explores the major themes of this classic work of American politics, such as the problem of majority faction, the importance of separation of powers, the nature of the three branches of government, and the argument concerning the Bill of Rights.
Thanks for reading my email, and I hope you’ll activate your free enrollment in **[“The Federalist Papers”](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c04791%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fdXgXqSuP6zIoA3YErbAmQ&sysid=1)** today.
[Activate your free course now »](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c04792%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6ejO0ICizW6tSCrvvSfjoA&sysid=1)
Warm regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
* * *

## What students are saying
“Hillsdale College's online offerings have deepened my education and enriched my life.” **\- Fred D.** “Extraordinary in their simplicity and so fulfilling in their content. Thank you for creating this avenue to knowledge.” **\- John C.** [Activate your free course now »](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c04792%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6ejO0ICizW6tSCrvvSfjoA&sysid=1)

name: Mark Takano
subject: Please read this. It's important to me.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P
body:
It's an important anniversary.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36139363/307185905/-2042826227?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTQwNzllMS02MDFhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KLXWQVEMatzO28pDKslRrGXEZ7j1SbctKVi4pA8wCo0=)
---
Peter, when I was elected to Congress for the first time in 2012, I was the very first LGBTQ+ person of color to ever be elected.

I knew then that one of my biggest priorities in Congress would be to fight against the countless bigoted, anti-LGBTQ+ bills introduced in Congress and legislatures across the country. And today is a very important date in that fight.

**Ten years ago today the discriminatory “Don’t Ask, Don’t Tell” policy was repealed.**

I was a high school teacher back then, and I was overjoyed. Together, Democrats progressed and put an end to an unjust and painful policy that unfairly discharged tens of thousands of LGBTQ+ service members.

But Peter, despite this victory and others, Republicans have worked with vicious rigor to strip LGBTQ+ protections across the nation. They still don’t believe we deserve equal rights! [**Peter, Republicans hate members of Congress like me who refuse to back down from what we should all know is right. I will never give up the fight to protect this community, but I need you on my side to survive constant Republican attacks against us. clean_body: It's an important anniversary. | = Peter, when I was elected to Congress for the first time in 2012, I was the very first LGBTQ+ person of color to ever be elected. I knew then that one of my biggest priorities in Congress would be to fight against the countless bigoted, anti-LGBTQ+ bills introduced in Congress and legislatures across the country. And today is a very important date in that fight. Ten years ago today the discriminatory “Don’t Ask, Don’t Tell” policy was repealed. I was a high school teacher back then, and I was overjoyed. Together, Democrats progressed and put an end to an unjust and painful policy that unfairly discharged tens of thousands of LGBTQ+ service members. But Peter, despite this victory and others, Republicans have worked with vicious rigor to strip LGBTQ+ protections across the nation. name: PramilaForCongress.com
subject: FWD - A quick update on where things stand in Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
We wanted to make sure you saw Pramila’s timely message from last night, Peter. While corporate America, Big Pharma, and the GOP are trying to stop us from delivering for working people, she’s leading the fight for a big, bold, transformative Build Back Better Act. **[Can you give her message a quick read and then chip in $3 to keep her fight going as we enter a pivotal week?](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/6109?refcode=em20210920-650&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=650%2E420207%2EusX_5q)**
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Pramila Jayapal
Date: Sun, Sep 19, 2021
Subject: A quick update on where things stand in Congress
Peter, I know it’s a Sunday, but I wanted to write you today with a quick update on where things stand in Congress before we’re back in session tomorrow.
**Here’s the deal:** After several rounds of committee hearings and negotiations on the scope of the Build Back Better Act — a $3.5 trillion bill that invests in climate action, health care, paid leave, child care, universal pre-K, housing, and so much more — the House will begin voting again _this week_.
**Here’s the problem:** Corporate America and Big Pharma don’t like that we’re asking them to pay their fair share in taxes to support these bold and transformative investments in working people. They’re working overtime and spending lots of money to stop our momentum — and to stop Medicare expansion and long-overdue climate action.
**I’m no stranger to tough fights****, Peter.** We’ve been here before. But to be blunt — if we fail to meet this moment and deliver on the passage of the Build Back Better Act, we’re letting down the millions of Americans who delivered the House, the Senate, and White House to Democrats.
[**If you’re still with me in the fight to go big and bold on a spending package that fully invests in working people, can you chip in $3 or whatever you can afford to our campaign today?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/6109?refcode=em20210920-650&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=650%2E420207%2EusX_5q)_This fight is far from over — and with your help today, I’m going to continue putting the pressure on my colleagues to come together to get this done:_
**[Chip in $3 »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/6109?refcode=em20210920-650&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=650%2E420207%2EusX_5q)**
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210920-650-footer&t=23&refcode2=650_420207_usX_5q&akid=650%2E420207%2EusX_5q)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=24&akid=650%2E420207%2EusX_5q)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=650%2E420207%2EusX_5q)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

name: Collier for Texas
subject: avoiding accountability
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collier Committee
body:
|
#
---
Hey there, team. **Today begins the Texas legislature’s third special session where lawmakers are expected to begin the redistricting process to gerrymander the state.** After passing some of the worst bills we’ve seen in our state’s history, we know Dan Patrick and the Texas GOP will do anything they can to redraw the maps in their favor so they can desperately hold onto power. With our state growing more diverse each year, Republicans will use every tool in the box to avoid accountability so they do not have to answer to Texans for their failed leadership. As Democrats gear up for another fight, we must be prepared to push back against Dan Patrick’s dangerous, anti-democratic agenda in the days ahead. | Dear Patriot, Anthony Fauci let a dark secret slip from his lips. He believes that Joe Biden's illegal vaccine mandate did not go far enough -- and now he's attempting to seize more power. In an interview with CNN, Fauci said Biden was "being somewhat moderate in his demand, if you want to call it that." _"Myself, I would make it just vaccinate or not. But he was trying to be moderate in what his pronouncement was."_ When I heard that, I couldn't believe my ears. Fauci is demanding a total vaccination mandate for all Americans, handed down like a decree from a dictator, with no input from Congress. **This is intolerable.** I knew Fauci would try to bring Australia-style COVID dictatorship to America, but I must say I'm shocked that it happened this quickly. How would Fauci enforce this new mandate? Would he send the military to the homes of every American to check their vaccination status? How far is he willing to go in his quest to eradicate the Constitution and seize control over American society? **I have been Fauci's Kryptonite since the day the pandemic began.** **I have exposed him for funneling money to the Wuhan lab.** **I have exposed his disregard for science when it comes to masks and natural immunity.** That's why he sneers with disdain every time he sees my face – because he knows I am standing in the way of his goal of having absolute control over your life. I will do everything in my power to stop this scheme, just like I have stopped so many of his other schemes. But if the Left manages to defeat me in my Senate race, I will be powerless to stop him. name: Great America Update
subject: You can help restore hope in our country
body:
You may be discouraged by the Left’s dominance in our colleges and universities [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c349%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=UWTwGCymu%2bFdPVPSgH2uiA&sysid=1)
| | | This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66659%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=UdUnMqsE16mhI3TsTeOhHw&sysid=1) Fellow American, [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66659%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=UdUnMqsE16mhI3TsTeOhHw&sysid=1) You may be discouraged by the Left’s dominance in our colleges and universities, and its increasing influence in K-12 education. But we must not lose hope. Instead, we must fight back with the truth. Hillsdale College has been engaging the Left on the battlefield of education from the beginning. That’s why we’ve turned our course, [**“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66650%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TgMZ5107sNqlbwXaDSyUUA&sysid=1) into a DVD set, and I’d like you to have a copy. Taught by historian Wilfred McClay and based on his recently published history of America, **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** presents a full, unbiased account of America’s past. Hillsdale’s goal in producing this course is to **restore the kind of intelligent patriotism --especially among our young people--that is essential to preserving free government.** **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** is a powerful counterweight to _The New York Times’_ “1619 Project,” which is injecting the idea that America is an essentially unjust nation into the curricula of America’s K-12 schools. Please consider getting [**“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66650%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TgMZ5107sNqlbwXaDSyUUA&sysid=1) as a DVD set for your home library or to give as a gift. Presenting real American history is the surest means of preserving liberty. Quantities are limited, so reserve your copy today. [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66651%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=pRLZ7jNhYVoF120jvBM7UQ&sysid=1) Thank you for your partnership with Hillsdale College and your support of its mission on behalf of liberty. Sincerely, Bill Gray Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: This is a longer email, but I hope you'll read it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Common Good Virginia
body:
| | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miGFL7wQvJlY0GjVnSFZeNWtcN1Eapjx5sDN70bo7P5Z3UJ3DhmmcMAfTyn-bGcAuJR4sbnoHOB3uNrHWW3vLBjVbkviRzwd9nVABMu7aQOANroF7EAC9dDIV2enxzJwc-T5RNBWv6y94fRXKk2WISMlixQ8yjpGVMAdYA4Pf1omKARqFvT9ETJeDZe_Ek21oDVWrJ4HTHOTF1BEpdYlNK_tgcoQ1RwoqUyzriUapTwS2QJgo4ecG35dG6efrNRWXsdB4QxGrn8iC5wOVUTYQJ1lnwlMjXVvSnI3ybWrG20Uum8w7TUrDgBcGGHQ_1YgwHLzerd2ATVhim7U0lE50dSNSNiEdHkFTp4VryRyU48D4/3fh/LOKLDkKNSjaECcWrQFrqVQ/h0/qiselCD83d_RWzW2xftn7Hm6A0kUHHvRrCqpVsygE_8)
This is a longer email, Derek, but I hope you'll read it.

Right-wing billionaire and Donald Trump's former Secretary of Education, Betsy DeVos, came to New Hampshire to rally Trump's far-right base. She is just one of the many Trump allies trying to unseat me and flip the Senate red.

During Betsy DeVos' confirmation hearing for Secretary of Education back in 2017, she demonstrated a complete lack of understanding and support for the public education system – and it was clear that she was unqualified to serve as secretary of education. **At her confirmation hearing, I specifically questioned Ms. DeVos on whether she would enforce the Individuals with Disabilities Education Act. Not only did she refuse to say she would, but she also demonstrated that she was unaware that this landmark civil rights law was a federal law.**

Unfortunately, she didn’t improve upon that disastrous confirmation hearing during her tenure in the Trump administration – pursuing policies that undermined public schools in New Hampshire and across the country. From proposed funding cuts to her efforts to implement a voucher system, **DeVos ignored the needs of both educators and students in an attempt to dismantle our public education system.**

I’m writing today because it has been my honor to represent New Hampshire in the U.S. Senate, and I’m not done fighting for a more robust public education system. I only won my last election by 1,017 votes, and New Hampshire’s State Senate and State House both flipped from blue to red last year. Republicans know this, and DeVos' visit is a clear attempt to unseat me by rallying Trump's far-right base. **If we lose in New Hampshire, Democrats have no chance of holding our narrow majority.**

Having Donald Trump and his allies fully invested in this race is bad news. [**I hate asking for money, but my campaign is falling behind our goal, and we need the funds to fight back against Republican attacks. Will you please split $25 between my campaign and Common Good VA to help us win in New Hampshire and protect our vulnerable Senate majority?**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miGFL7wQvJlY0GjVnSFZeNWtcN1Eapjx5sDN70bo7P5Z1O663iI-qXJEifOZVzZ4z0zeDxby6lOcoTteVlwyCDKWCrLh5U-k_xjpKpv4qDUII_IXvHv4QVOERszKbTQLJltj-sn3zCPMAZYWcXso07VnDjNmWd0j5MNBRLYy_xsFPzrn6FBx7olCzlBNz-Z0Ej60VaDaCu56EaD9EaTKCOLxF75BCtI1FaeXZilCgXJ24n43FyvAR4-FDfXp8TTslzAfdjmNtN5CViSR_AZZSO4UoWCtfptFx7VVyOi-71FZxrQR9LIC6JSOhFHn3q_eWzpDpiwVO0xZAyyftIrpzJhvKGs2tPSxbNGRjfq3YJHtQ/3fh/LOKLDkKNSjaECcWrQFrqVQ/h1/EXs2N_gxzYkxZEKtaHIIYpGVskiKUEH0NQWwI_q-CS8) **[ Donate $25 ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miGFL7wQvJlY0GjVnSFZeNWtcN1Eapjx5sDN70bo7P5Z1O663iI-qXJEifOZVzZ4z0hoYCLpPdvwLPUvflDitCvj8hLhO6I-7e9J_e9lwDnXkB_4BMYYE6tsRRh1FSHR4x2cxuFpOrzfRdcSDFbwmYd7_71j-AdVV4c5HkVTyxynesKbUhF0Y48ui_JZmWXWHklcvkTujc04CnL8vanqpyAQbHvDAgkdkIdo3Oo1g7ETU3MQU4QIkk0mX91CucWxK1fGvlqenCdRihmcx0TYVTGt-2xThk-R-3cLu32Mx62OgYg2UnEHVRifq1PMXvgpAk1vTOUUzHoVEMV1kgwo1RaofJW52tH0rbvFtJED98L_o/3fh/LOKLDkKNSjaECcWrQFrqVQ/h2/teVaC6kZl0jA9ZrqNxuWvAtqy4PspabkA2hFb_5Ovkk)

But there's still much work ahead – and if Republicans regain control of the Senate, they will undo all of the progress we've made so far.

**[So please, consider splitting a $25 donation between my campaign and Common Good VA today.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miGFL7wQvJlY0GjVnSFZeNWtcN1Eapjx5sDN70bo7P5Z1O663iI-qXJEifOZVzZ4z0jkfQ6FBPqUaWBC9bCR1SdTIgRv2mDfJd9HD-3B4gMHSjoK2zl5tpyRqDae-uhMuoVGnPmOiAKl-mF7kD-iRPSP-Qf_cyluq65v8XK7zZ203Zx_LUIXgxafXnM7da6d3qvqF2zEfDH5MYkygG-pJEVLKV__XFfKGyPyc_aGuPT9q-qDmMbzPiN5LX_sE0ydxuSMQWu4K05LIpknf6vo-DCnMYQ4QG7dE5yFkGTKuVN4bYpOGY4TS89p83KtogPNbmO1lqNSuEY1FFej0vZ46MqVQcbGn0DimW9gbJeG5ntU4/3fh/LOKLDkKNSjaECcWrQFrqVQ/h6/m8BYRYanhUlajx6qguzXa3OgEGMpUULkDISbke5vhTc)**

subject: ✅ Mike Pompeo Endorses Mike Carey for OH-15
body:
Former US Secretary of State Endorses Carey | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/careyforcongress/mikepompeoendorsement?e=f89184af42)
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE:**
September 20, 2021
## **Secretary Pompeo Endorses Mike Carey For Congress**
Secretary of State Mike Pompeo today endorsed Mike Carey to represent Ohio's 15th Congressional District. **Speaking about his endorsement, Secretary Mike Pompeo said,** “Mike is the conservative outsider we need to fight for our values in Congress. He has my full support. It's critical that Republicans keep this congressional seat, and I urge Ohioans to get out and vote for Mike on November 2nd.” "Secretary Pompeo has fought for freedom at home and abroad, and I am humbled to have his endorsement as I seek to represent Ohio's 15th District in Congress,” **said Carey.** “In Congress, I'll continue to fight for the America First agenda and work to protect the good work Mike did as our Secretary of State." ###
---
|
---

name: Marco Rubio
subject: [update] here’s what I’m seeing on the ground
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
****
If we fail, Republicans up and down the ballot will be completely overwhelmed and the battle for the control of Congress will be lost...
****This is Marco Rubio:
I just reviewed the latest YouGov polls and my stomach just DROPPED. TWO back-to-back polls show Democrats ahead by SEVEN POINTS. That was a hard pill to swallow, but that's not even the worst of it...
The latest FEC filings show that Liberal fundraising just hit an all-time-high this year. Hey, Peter \- Harold here. I wanted to follow up on the email my team sent earlier this week.

I’m not going to lie to you, things are not going well in the radical Left’s America. That’s a big part of why I’m running for Congress - I want to fix all the problems Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi, and the Dems in Washington have created.

But that’s not the only reason, Peter.

Right now, Democrats aren’t just destroying our borders and our economy. They are also destroying the heart and soul of our country.

Dividing us. Canceling us. Forcing us to think how they think and feel how they feel.

It makes me furious, and I’m done putting up with it.

**I’m on a mission to preserve the things that make our country the greatest in the world so my kids grow up in an America that they can be proud of.**

If that sounds like something worth supporting to you, I encourage you to donate to my campaign and help me make it happen: _**[https://secure.winred.com/earls-for-georgia/action-2880745/](http://links.haroldearls.org/u/click?_t=1787314c8e75423e977ed0981a928c89&_m=aeb929f1846e425592d7ccb6405a8441&_e=EvguD4GZK6y5Y4nW3zNnbgMZDYpfJEPE6hLnuTjMexLvs0yfa1MLFgZi2bZUSypydDzaeCAsoccUON8uZvE1rhB493hBgu6H9nLh97eSRKD9DNpkh3ZFDY8O4E3mR6B3TQuCXiBlotAeAfzSpWT-eUPln2EygB9-NjpcyJ8yEHA523IPPbZD79QFNqgKUrg5B5qX4pxJqUvfVWunwplvThH9h5SlHaWuC40Kdmt8uMxFusSLKPtVqwDNzea7OKW5LRfV9bWewzPrxNLQKwhZn68c014_RjmCAt7prOnPQ97joSor5-N7df-yu9zYcnQ1k4MZMMMpF5_RZkzwVIoNykKzNNeah22Hgd-H3XoDPKvFvKVBtb6QwJnaYprDp_-E7ZRQGxiEiU-glU9CZR6ImS0GFBgVmKqeVr2Hf5nJbjk2m_U54EW-U1YpVKLZhMPx6GdKjKF9wMKNNPmNwAyMm-405fy3pYOZXvkIEGxZkaBmxYStD2fF1XZkKi-75MEh)**_

I love this country, and I will do whatever I can to defend it against the radical Left. I hope you will join me in this fight, Peter.

_[**Click here to make a donation and help me preserve the heart and soul of America. >>>**](http://links.haroldearls.org/u/click?_t=1787314c8e75423e977ed0981a928c89&_m=aeb929f1846e425592d7ccb6405a8441&_e=EvguD4GZK6y5Y4nW3zNnbgMZDYpfJEPE6hLnuTjMexLvs0yfa1MLFgZi2bZUSypydDzaeCAsoccUON8uZvE1rhB493hBgu6H9nLh97eSRKD9DNpkh3ZFDY8O4E3mR6B3TQuCXiBlotAeAfzSpWT-eUPln2EygB9-NjpcyJ8yEHA523IPPbZD79QFNqgKUrg5B5qX4pxJqUvfVWunwplvThH9h5SlHaWuC40Kdmt8uMxFusSLKPtVqwDNzea7OKW5LRfV9bWewzPrxNLQKwhZn68c014_RjmCAt7prOnPQ97M5l22rynh1By5P2B-MTIrDYsNryWm3KY7cT0oILYnHEDOHJhsVmKANCHJwnhlPAxnRdICFOSKvybgxzCt36fPuVU40DFp9SadYpNTHdk_E25b2pm0Qp1IXTykILPGL4kjtxIM5JF53fV28XOLtw_DHO73jat7iGZDCilpVryRxujhh0DoP9XoDvgfwcpFHWDt2pWNGpLxm0ABjLsChAda)_

Harold

body:
Did you see this? Seven. Hundred. Million. Dollars. That’s right... Under Laura Kelly’s watch, the state of Kansas paid out nearly $700 million in unem Friend, Did you see this? Seven. Hundred. Million. Dollars. That’s right... Under Laura Kelly’s watch, the state of Kansas paid out nearly $700 million in unemployment benefits to fraudsters during the COVID-19 pandemic. That means that instead of supporting families struggling on unemployment because of her lockdowns that crushed one-third of all Kansas small businesses,**Laura Kelly’s administration used your taxpayer dollars to pay criminals.**

name: Team AOC
subject: We won't sugarcoat it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
If we can make September our best fundraising month yet, people will take notice.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20210920-2520-header&t=1&akid=2520%2E2526796%2EhM1Xwy)
We won't sugarcoat it: we’re over halfway through the month right now, but we are not halfway to our September fundraising goal.
It’s crucial that we catch up, because September is an extremely important month for our campaign. After the 30th, we report our fundraising numbers to the Federal Election Commission (FEC) for the public to see.
Alexandria has spent this past month speaking truth to power: from taking on Texas Governor Abbott over the state’s harmful abortion restrictions, to calling attention to Joe Manchin’s weekly meetings with Exxon and his unwillingness to support the reconciliation budget bill, to lifting up our country’s need to Tax the Rich. **If we can make September our best fundraising month yet, we’ll send a powerful message to the special interests who are hoping to see our movement lose steam.**
[Can you make a $3 contribution right now to help our campaign hit this critical fundraising goal and send a powerful signal to our opponents?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210915-1?refcode=em20210920-2520-P_FND_MMF_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=2520_2526796_hM1Xwy&akid=2520%2E2526796%2EhM1Xwy)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210915-1?refcode=em20210920-2520-P_FND_MMF_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=2520_2526796_hM1Xwy&akid=2520%2E2526796%2EhM1Xwy)**
Our campaign is powered by small-dollar donors who pitch in whenever they can — whether that’s $5, $15, or $50. **We’re proud of the fact that 80% of all the money we’ve raised this cycle has come from small-dollar donors.**
What we raise not only ensures we have the resources to continue running a strong campaign to keep Alexandria in Congress. **Each contribution, of any amount, sends an unmistakable message that our fight for a livable climate, healthcare for all, and making the rich pay their fair share has strong support — from your city and across the country.**
But, in order to keep building, we need to hit every single one of our monthly fundraising goals that we’ve set for this year. **And right now, we’re pacing behind where we need to be during a critical fundraising month.**
[Your first contribution to our campaign — no matter the amount — couldn’t come at a more important moment. If you’re able, will you make your first $3 donation today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210915-1?refcode=em20210920-2520-P_FND_MMF_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=2520_2526796_hM1Xwy&akid=2520%2E2526796%2EhM1Xwy)
Thank you for everything.
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210915-1?refcode=em20210920-2520-P_FND_MMF_GOL&t=23&refcode2=2520_2526796_hM1Xwy&akid=2520%2E2526796%2EhM1Xwy)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20210920-2520-P_FND_MMF_GOL&t=24&akid=2520%2E2526796%2EhM1Xwy)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=25&akid=2520%2E2526796%2EhM1Xwy) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=26&akid=2520%2E2526796%2EhM1Xwy) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=27&akid=2520%2E2526796%2EhM1Xwy)

To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

Friend: **The GOP has claimed Arizona as ground zero for the worst of its extremism – and if we don't fight back now, we could lose our democracy as we know it.**
Republicans in our state are leaving no stone unturned in their desperate push to strip away fundamental rights and keep Arizona red. They've invited QAnon conspiracists like Marjorie Taylor Greene, and even Donald Trump himself, to overturn the 2020 election. Hello, I’m about to ask you for a small donation to my campaign for United States Senate ahead of our FEC fundraising deadline. Before I do, let me just say this:

We’ve only been in this thing for a few months, but it’s clear that folks from every corner of Wisconsin want to replace Ron Johnson with someone who will actually fight for working families, tackle the climate crisis, lower the cost of prescription drugs, defend reproductive freedom, and so much more. I will be that senator.

**Now is the time to make a statement about the strength of our grassroots movement. That’s why I’m asking you to rush a donation of ANY amount to our campaign before the FEC fundraising deadline. Ron Johnson has made it clear he's not fighting for Wisconsinites. He has spent his time in the Senate spreading dangerous conspiracy theories, enriching himself and his wealthy campaign donors, and ignoring the people he was elected to serve. **I have different priorities.**

I’m running for U.S. Senate to make sure Wisconsinites have a leader who will actually fight for them, not the special interests who are already more than well-represented in Washington. That’s why I have never taken a dime from corporate PACs -- and I never will. Instead, we’re building this campaign from the ground up, one individual contribution at a time.

The money we raise isn’t as important as the number of people who contribute. That’s why I want anyone who looks at our public FEC report to see what I see: a strong coalition of grassroots supporters who are fighting for new leadership in the U.S. Senate -- because Wisconsin desperately needs to get rid of Ron Johnson.

**[This will be one of the toughest fights I have ever taken on, but I’m no stranger to tough fights. I could use your help on this one though. Please consider adding a donation of any amount to my campaign before the FEC fundraising deadline.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36141905/307193146/-623328154?refcode=em21_210920_EOQ_fndd_gq_act___SG_ettx_sl2&utm_campaign=em21_210920_EOQ_fndd_gq_act___SG_ettx_sl2&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWVkNGI2YS02YTFhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dXqPZ1X5LKYQIDnSIIsPOIWlZs6Z9tMWyweLPVvE9ko=)**

clean_body: Hello, I’m about to ask you for a small donation to my campaign for United States Senate ahead of our FEC fundraising deadline. Before I do, let me just say this: We’ve only been in this thing for a few months, but it’s clear that folks from every corner of Wisconsin want to replace Ron Johnson with someone who will actually fight for working families, tackle the climate crisis, lower the cost of prescription drugs, defend reproductive freedom, and so much more. I will be that senator. Now is the time to make a statement about the strength of our grassroots movement. That’s why I’m asking you to rush a donation of ANY amount to our campaign before the FEC fundraising deadline. You can chip in right here: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = Ron Johnson has made it clear he's not fighting for Wisconsinites. He has spent his time in the Senate spreading dangerous conspiracy theories, enriching himself and his wealthy campaign donors, and ignoring the people he was elected to serve. I have different priorities. I’m running for U.S. Senate to make sure Wisconsinites have a leader who will actually fight for them, not the special interests who are already more than well-represented in Washington. That’s why I have never taken a dime from corporate PACs -- and I never will. Instead, we’re building this campaign from the ground up, one individual contribution at a time. The money we raise isn’t as important as the number of people who contribute. That’s why I want anyone who looks at our public FEC report to see what I see: a strong coalition of grassroots supporters who are fighting for new leadership in the U.S. Senate -- because Wisconsin desperately needs to get rid of Ron Johnson. = I was raised to always fight for what's right -- no matter how difficult the fight is -- and that's exactly why I got in this race. Together, we can make sure our workers and families come first by electing leaders who won’t turn their backs on the folks back home as soon as they get to Washington. That’s why your donation matters so much today. Thanks so much. — Sarah Sarah Godlewski is running for U.S. Senate to put hard-working Wisconsin families first. She's the only Democrat in this race who has won statewide twice. With your help, she can defeat Ron Johnson, too. Chip in to join our grassroots campaign: | = Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin Sarah for Wisconsin PO Box 166 Madison, WI 53701 United States

clean_body: Joe Biden? Or Republicans? | Peter, The situation at our Southern Border is absolutely out of control. Since Joe Biden was sworn in, illegal border crossings have seen record highs -- month after month with no end in sight. Photo Credit: Bill Melugin (@BillFOXLA) Things are so bad that State Republicans have had to take matters into their own hands: sending National Guard troops to the border and even making plans to finish Trump’s Wall without the help of Washington, DC. | | Do you trust Sleepy Joe Biden to secure the border? | | | | A nation without a border is no nation at all, Peter. We must get control of our border. An open border is a major national security threat! | Thank you. State Republicans Sent via North Carolina Republican Party

name: MarisaWoodForCongress.com
body:
McCarthy is raising millions of dollars from corporate special interest PACs and Trump-aligned mega donors who want to see him with the Speaker's gavel. |

See this, friend? This is the average contribution given to our campaign:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36142030/307193512/-686739743?refcode=em-92021-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDFlYmRhZC02YTFhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qcTqHj5vSY-6CFu2O9j-R-Ekqu7eJ6tLx96wqEJrIrY=) **Before we launched, we knew there would be a ton of people fired up to defeat Kevin McCarthy. But we never expected thousands of people to contribute in just these first few months.**

That's huge because McCarthy is raising millions of dollars from corporate special interest PACs and Trump-aligned megadonors who want to see him with the Speaker's gavel.

On the other hand, Marisa's raising $22.45 from lots of folks like you. Some might consider this a disadvantage, but we actually think this is the very best way to beat McCarthy. When you chip in $22.45, and someone else from your area does too. It adds up, quickly.

It's not just about raising money. Lots of people donating across the country generates grassroots buzz. Someone from every single state (including PA!) has chipped in.

**The next test of our campaign is meeting the mark on our end-of-quarter fundraising goal that hits next week. We're on track to have our best quarter yet, but in order to do that, we need to raise $75,000 by next Thursday. That's 3,340 people chipping in $22.45.**

**[Friend -- If you were waiting for the right time to give, will you be one of the 3,340 supporters that will give to Marisa's campaign? Make your first contribution of $5, $22.45, or even $35 today. | | Peter,

This month, millions of families will receive their third child tax credit payment.

As a pediatrician, children are my top priority. I know all too well how a lack of access to quality food and health care can affect a child’s life and future.

That’s why it’s critical that Congress make the child tax credit permanent. If it becomes permanent, an estimated 4.3 million fewer children would live in poverty every year.

clean_body: | | | | 400% MATCH OFFER TODAY ONLY! Dear Peter, Our CRITICAL End-of-Quarter deadline is quickly approaching. We still need to raise another $50,000 this week to hit our goals. This is our biggest deadline of the year. We’ve been getting pummeled by the far-left and the fake news media because I stepped up to hold the line. Whether the issue involves protecting your energy jobs, your 2nd Amendment rights, your ability to speak freely, election integrity, or defending against Biden's horrific mandates, I've been your warrior for freedom. Today is one of the last days to contribute before our big End-of-Quarter deadline, and some of our supporters have committed to a 400% MATCH on your contributions. This offer expires at midnight, Peter. Join Team Morrisey and help Attorney General Patrick Morrisey defend our Constitution and America. | | | | | Sincerely, Patrick Morrisey West Virginia Attorney General | Follow us on Social Media ****|****|****|****|** Paid for by TEAM MORRISEY, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit of Morrisey for Attorney General, Morrisey for West Virginia, Inc., Morrisey 2020, Blue and Gold Fund, and West Virginia Republican Party, Inc. c/o Red Curve Solutions 138 Conant Street, 2nd Floor Beverly, MA 01915. _**Banking Privacy Petition**_ Status:******INCOMPLETE** **[SIGN THE PETITION BEFORE MIDNIGHT TO

clean_body: She’s all in for Youngkin | | | = | | Disgraced former Education Secretary Betsy DeVos and Glenn Youngkin sure do have a lot in common. Both are mega-rich right-wingers who’d rather gut our public schools than fund them. And both are blindly loyal to Donald Trump above all else. Now, we’ve learned that they’re joining forces to turn Virginia red. According to Youngkin’s campaign fundraising report, the DeVos family contributed nearly $100,000 before the last filing deadline. That makes Betsy DeVos and her family some of Glenn’s BIGGEST supporters. = | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Virtually every poll out there shows a close race in Virginia. With Betsy DeVos and Glenn Youngkin spending big to win, a blue Virginia is in serious jeopardy. Derek, they’re outraising AND outspending us, right as voting starts. Glenn already had his bottomless bank account. Now he has Betsy DeVos’ too. Our kids and our Commonwealth deserve better. = | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, Terry for VA = Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click._ Paid for by Terry for Virginia

name: Mo Brooks
subject: Fellow Americans...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE MO BROOKS FOR SENATE COMMITTEE
body:
| | To keep receiving updates from my campaign, please add us to your address book.
---
[](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=O2VuetiQea1aep2z7TECUy6SeOo3fSqjV85jUBNqUYg&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=america_first&n=1)
---

| Dear Fellow American, I am the Alabama MAGA candidate for the U.S. Senate **endorsed by President Donald Trump**. I am running to protect working American families and the essential freedoms that are the bedrock of our country. [](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYl5kI5FGvvVrRHG_uYbe7RkCTO3TuYp1Q6oSPEXVuzF9&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=america_first&n=2) [](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYl5kI5FGvvVrRHG_uYbe7RkCTO3TuYp1Q6oSPEXVuzF9&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=america_first&n=3) The cheap-labor lobby -- the "establishment" -- is spending millions to defeat me in the Republican primary. They know from my actions as a U.S. Congressman that I value the security and well-being of American families more than globally optimized return on capital. **Over the last 50 years the global population doubled leaving 3.4 billion people living on less than $5.50 per DAY. The UN estimates the world will add between 3 to 4 billion more by the turn of the century. Our big business and political elite have allowed these surging poor billions to compete for American resources.** MOST Americans have not prospered as we imported historically unprecedented numbers of people to compete for housing, government services, and jobs. MOST Americans have not prospered as our systematically unbounded trade deficit forced them to compete with global cheap-labor. In contrast, these policies have enabled the elite 1% to double their share of national income at the expense of working families. **How we deal with this driving reality will determine the political and economic future of our country.** Two competing political solutions to this reality are evolving in America; Socialism and America First conservatism. You know from history that socialist wealth redistribution always results in poverty and, most importantly, loss of liberty. Our growing **America First** political movement asserts our primary moral responsibility is to our fellow citizens and the principles of individual liberty. In his inspiring inaugural address President Donald Trump made this promise: **_"From this day forward, a new vision will govern our land._** **_From this moment on, it’s going to be America First._** **_Every decision on trade, on taxes, on immigration, on foreign affairs, will be made to benefit American workers and American families._** **_We must protect our borders from the ravages of other countries making our products, stealing our companies, and destroying our jobs. Protection will lead to great prosperity and strength._** **_I will fight for you with every breath in my body – and I will never, ever let you down._** **_America will start winning again, winning like never before._** **_We will bring back our jobs. We will bring back our borders. We will bring back our wealth. And we will bring back our dreams."_** I have lived this promise with President Trump. I was the first to stand up and fight the election misconduct that turned President Trump from office. Along with President Trump, I will continue to fight for this vision. [**With your contribution we can open the eyes of our fellow citizens and build an America First coalition that can first defeat the short-sighted globalist cheap-labor lobby of the GOP and then the lying socialists.**](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYl5kI5FGvvVrRHG_uYbe7RkCTO3TuYp1Q6oSPEXVuzF9&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=america_first&n=4) [****](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYl5kI5FGvvVrRHG_uYbe7RkCTO3TuYp1Q6oSPEXVuzF9&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=america_first&n=5) God bless you and the America we love, Mo Brooks
---

---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=america_first&n=6).
---

Mo Brooks for Senate Committee
P.O. Box 4678 Huntsville, AL 35815
PAID FOR BY THE MO BROOKS FOR SENATE COMMITTEE

name: Jane Timken for Ohio
subject: This is it!
body:
Don't Miss the Celebration [](https://) Peter, There are more than 200 days until the 2022 primary election in May, _but our team isn't resting for a single second_. Since announcing this spring, Jane Timken has been determined to run this race the right way. Building off of the victories she delivered for President Trump in 2020, her army of grassroots supporters has overwhelmed the fair-weather competition and flooded the field with her pro-Trump, America First message. **The enthusiasm for Jane on the ground has resulted in 500,000 voter contacts before anyone else has knocked a single door.** While there is a long way to go, this enormous head start is cause for celebration and we want you to be there with us! Join Jane this Saturday, September 25th as we cross another major milestone with our half millionth voter contact. She will be in: Columbus - 9:30AM Athens - 11:30AM Cincinnati - 3:00PM Don't miss this chance to meet your next U.S. Senator! Sign up below. subject: $1 can make all of the difference
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
What if we told you that flipping the House took only $1? Would you join Team Jordan by making a gift toward our efforts to flip the House RED?

| [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=b7304f12dc3c4a719dd69ac1b16d5955&_e=vfKw3MkqfmKSWtaVZqdGlDXsB9tIqYkvbkDY1RqUNZsH5tToU5T9lHPlsgDEB02-vuSMBfxE4LaQ6XbZ6PvWwJazRoB8T9wYnFWS_tfEc7Nk-grgkL67mD-Lc2Ee1V55HG0eKZyiY6EF4dwLYW_8uaqZiFJGjyfqsKLd2M4V1jfmNbXja7Eru8Px_LhnMx52PM6Qwar-_f_cVaOn7iONBHSKKPPXKGdPO_FGthkhI_TK2kW2kbDoPXjKxS2FTTMH4I0bqWD5IlC5LiOFkDrFYKtHpmPKXeLDJnxlm5KhEclSZokbEeepgVBaq8-fi8NHmhCFWDbfGs-uaLYge5aCwQdh8qYo46wnbST5ZWrM3OY%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

What if I told you that even just $1 dollar could make a difference as me and my Republican colleagues work to take back control of the House from the socialist Democrats next November? **[Would you donate $1?](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=b7304f12dc3c4a719dd69ac1b16d5955&_e=vfKw3MkqfmKSWtaVZqdGlDXsB9tIqYkvbkDY1RqUNZsH5tToU5T9lHPlsgDEB02-vuSMBfxE4LaQ6XbZ6PvWwJazRoB8T9wYnFWS_tfEc7Nk-grgkL67mD-Lc2Ee1V55HG0eKZyiY6EF4dwLYW_8uXuGLw3tFzx2K74tA_kzFobJ8iubSSPCjKXXCB4WmIs3t-RQkJaDumHFU9DR-4z0iSyzjexyA8DYFtCTLaWRcFRMbbLHzw6AVa9Ii0FwPJ26uSYuOqckCIhZ4NEiyKYcxTY0FunI2RVULnzyuGCJH2eeuUtjfnw4SU2jQBaVRm2z68OpXxysWVZC3j7SyoYorLWItcxLGISmzIf1COKuZIY%3D)**

We’re playing the long game. Every day from now until the election is a day which we can lay out our case to the American public as to why it’s important to kick left-wing Democrats to the curb and restore some common-sense conservative leadership to the House.

By now, you are probably well aware that if we don’t do anything to stand in their way, Democrats are going to bankrupt the United States. And the best part? They’re using the same approach that they did when then jammed Obamacare through the House ten years ago. **When the price tag of a bill in consideration is $3.5 TRILLION, we ought to take the time to make sure we know what’s in it before we pass it**.

[**HELP US TAKE BACK THE HOUSE
CHIP IN $1 OR MORE->**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=b7304f12dc3c4a719dd69ac1b16d5955&_e=vfKw3MkqfmKSWtaVZqdGlDXsB9tIqYkvbkDY1RqUNZsH5tToU5T9lHPlsgDEB02-vuSMBfxE4LaQ6XbZ6PvWwJazRoB8T9wYnFWS_tfEc7Nk-grgkL67mD-Lc2Ee1V55HG0eKZyiY6EF4dwLYW_8udObXVy3BmTESu0mFFZjJk3KemNYq7Yh2f41jKPtaVb2zu_xENb8YDZ3Kw4V2jmI5dw3SHaoEv1QwqWwvemg4U_PQkX6T8HE5YPYZiW6pmNkeYevi2ntM_ZPQALgAdtJsR0oTeob03tEMCc3OysNb4OL5Ptdrke5Q8VFRPvGyIHXCo4QNrlgDKcS7PgbAlQk8lBPt0B1hRr6TAyGhtSm3gc%3D)

**But no. The Democrat in charge of moving the bill through the house said recently** ,

_"detailing tax-increase plans too soon can give too much time for opposition to build."_

**No way??**

**[If that crooked DC insider way of thinking upsets you as much as it upsets me, please consider contributing $1 or more right now toward my team’s efforts to send Democrats back into the minority.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=b7304f12dc3c4a719dd69ac1b16d5955&_e=vfKw3MkqfmKSWtaVZqdGlDXsB9tIqYkvbkDY1RqUNZsH5tToU5T9lHPlsgDEB02-vuSMBfxE4LaQ6XbZ6PvWwJazRoB8T9wYnFWS_tfEc7Nk-grgkL67mD-Lc2Ee1V55HG0eKZyiY6EF4dwLYW_8ud3S9n1pDo3iNpz9KdUNvlHqumnntxpBeV1YkHaM-EGAkxK163DYcAGvYRTSsirPRjI90ikKXG337YBK_FnSzwKPgeJhuSjhcVDt4vehDW0r8RVYEvJ_oZNEI9IWdsdKIxMaGoZHix7bn4wQb66K7l3Zn2mkis0xPUkRwOLC3SbcWy3CvkLihWN7VLilDraCq2LLkxqQTKNCf-62QU-MSW0%3D)**

They’re using the same approach that they did when then jammed Obamacare through the House ten years ago. When the price tag of a bill in consideration is $3.5 TRILLION, we ought to take the time to make sure we know what’s in it before we pass it. But no. The Democrat in charge of moving the bill through the house said recently , "detailing tax-increase plans too soon can give too much time for opposition to build." No way?? For America, Jim Jordan | Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress PO BOX 355 Delaware, OH 43015 Don't want to receive our emails?

name: John Fetterman
subject: re: yard signs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
New signs just dropped.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210920-2710-header&t=1&akid=2710%2E434096%2E8SrHTo)
Peter, I have a really *BIG* announcement for you today:
**Our official Team Fetterman yard signs just dropped. 😍**
I'd truly love for you to have one of your own to display — in your yard, window, or literally wherever you want! All you have to do is donate $10 or more today, and our team will send an official Team Fetterman yard sign straight to your door.
[**_Will you kick in $10 or more using this link for an official Team Fetterman yard sign?_**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/30172?refcode=em20210920-2710&t=2&akid=2710%2E434096%2E8SrHTo) **Plus, here's the *really* fun part: If you're in Pennsylvania, Gisele and I might just hand-deliver your yard sign straight to you.**
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/30172?refcode=em20210920-2710&t=3&akid=2710%2E434096%2E8SrHTo)
**[Get Your Yard Sign →](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/30172?refcode=em20210920-2710&t=5&akid=2710%2E434096%2E8SrHTo)**
To be completely honest, Peter, I *really* wanted to give these signs out to all of yinz for free. But our finance team made it really clear that we had to at least break even 🙄 — _after all, at the time in 2016, the race to flip this Senate seat was the most expensive Senate race in history._
**So, we landed at just $10 for an official yard sign sent straight to your door.** Ten bucks will cover the printing and shipping — but if you're able to give more, it'd be deeply appreciated and a huge help as we fight to build a campaign capable of fighting to win every vote in every single one of Pennsylvania's 67 counties.
[**_Donate $10 or more using this link, and we'll send you an official Team Fetterman yard sign._If you're in Pennsylvania, Gisele and I may just show up at your door to deliver your sign by hand._ Our team will compile a list of every Pennsylvanian who donates to get their sign, and we'll make it a point to hand-deliver yard signs to a few of yinz._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/30172?refcode=em20210920-2710&t=6&akid=2710%2E434096%2E8SrHTo)
**[Get Your Yard Sign →](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/30172?refcode=em20210920-2710&t=7&akid=2710%2E434096%2E8SrHTo)**
Thank you and have an AMAZING week.
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania
P.S. For just ten bucks, my team will send you an official Team Fetterman yard sign. They just got in, and I must say — I think they look pretty damn great. [** _This sign would look incredible in your yard or window, so would you donate $10 or more right here to get yours? As a fun added bonus, Gisele and I are planning to *hand-deliver* a few signs to folks who chip in to claim one as we travel the across the Commonwealth to upcoming campaign stops._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/30172?refcode=em20210920-2710&t=8&akid=2710%2E434096%2E8SrHTo)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210920-2710-footer&t=9&refcode2=2710_434096_8SrHTo&akid=2710%2E434096%2E8SrHTo)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=10&akid=2710%2E434096%2E8SrHTo)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=2710%2E434096%2E8SrHTo)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Moms for Katie Porter
subject: Peter— Will you be one of the 50 people we need today ?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MOMS IN OFFICE
body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]Hi Peter,
Can I take a minute to tell you more about or friend and inspiration Congresswoman Katie Porter , Peter?
Katie is a force to be reckoned with. She’s a fearless advocate for working families, and one of our champions in the fight for paid family leave. You do know about her white board, right?
She’s also at serious risk of losing her House seat.
Here’s why: The GOP listed her as a top target in the midterm elections. They are determined to retake the House majority and in order to do so, they need to flip Katie’s seat.
Can you please rush a donation to support her re-election campaign today? We promised her that Moms for Katie Porter could raise her $10,000 by the end of this month and we are so close. We are counting on you to chip in to help us close the gap. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsforkatieporter?refcode=0920]
In 2018, Katie was the underdog and narrowly flipped her district blue. If she’s going to keep her seat next year, she’ll need supporters like you and organizations like us to power her campaign.
None of this work would be possible without you.
With gratitude,
Simona Grace
Founder and Executive Director
Moms in Office

name: John Castorani
subject: Cleaning up after Hillary Clinton
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Castorani for Virginia
body:
September 11th, 2012 changed my life forever. Not only was it the evening that Islamic terrorists raided the American compound in Benghazi, Libya Today I'm asking you to help me give back to the men and women of the national guard who are stepping up to protect our communities in this time of uncertainty. Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_s=16afe60b080f4a5f8b0edfe58445e3cb&_t=2IDeU2HL61NtKAI6Q4UuSPEC4R-cIIyqoC4-vyC2K50K7qWs0d8M_GDExBHBe8-CFMOr4nQ2Fp2X15DbF4jJY9mNCvHzMu9SFW7UKSXxOhqb1ruqAb_hcmO-Rmt-6tZ4z7zzupCe3rV_zYa9knzzncahG64DETHJd3oUkWDn27U%3D) | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=16afe60b080f4a5f8b0edfe58445e3cb&_e=GjznP-fNgkNe7vG5BSAc34YQ_2ELVnM6kJ0l9ByxW0ZMsYib227cjsIaie2y-w7vMqr-ToB4OqFEr3SQehyLXVyg6nkJabV6ikdKjdSE9DKCyKrTS_DVPK16BQMubkkV8SnBry8Sb5ddL6TkVFpBo7Echmmr7L3Pa4dTp_EimWbsOOcQXLsxluoZrPxRoGV2pR2ecHB5xQlP9uWZFuXQDoyqqXFFKdCSL8NPFvGIEiq75PMWpYp9Pz90-vKtJYxL2EWchN1vgs3W6MX7lJjhPW10JidBYrpBoVRKl-nsEs_YN88n6odYpNnr0qVAfydaYBgQrAlJxi8qvR4vJWWcZrYtvnPtdDBXH-ZzL9sc9pSpp7jSiMQnK7psm-PY_SG_peE9k6eCkCGF99sUDfaevxR5qs1q28TkNwDTMkrf3WkmCiRMGqR7zoP9ngG7EHKmic-8OOi30I_-HkefpO2S0ngFNF8MFngJI2-TOnYkKBzSk8yIIJyvhTDJmVucl-TLpiUmqbLBkdYkiAhe9izZJw%3D%3D)
---

Peter,

My name is John Castorani, and like a lot of other political candidates whose emails wind up in your inbox **I’m hoping you’ll give me 30-seconds to a minute to explain why I’m reaching out to you today.**

I’m a 29-year-old conservative from central Virginia and I love this country of ours with all of my heart. Until earlier this year I was a member of the United States intelligence community.**I deployed seven times with the Army’s Special Operations Command hunting radical Islamic terrorists across the Islamic MAGREB and in continental Africa. The men my team and I were charged with hunting down and capturing, in every case, posed an existential threat to democratic countries around the world, and I’m proud to say for that for 11 years my job was to track down and eliminate threats to your family and my own**.

[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=16afe60b080f4a5f8b0edfe58445e3cb&_e=GjznP-fNgkNe7vG5BSAc34YQ_2ELVnM6kJ0l9ByxW0ZMsYib227cjsIaie2y-w7vMqr-ToB4OqFEr3SQehyLXVyg6nkJabV6ikdKjdSE9DKCyKrTS_DVPK16BQMubkkV8SnBry8Sb5ddL6TkVFpBo7Echmmr7L3Pa4dTp_EimWbsOOcQXLsxluoZrPxRoGV2pR2ecHB5xQlP9uWZFuXQDoyqqXFFKdCSL8NPFvGIEiq75PMWpYp9Pz90-vKtJYxL2EWchN1vgs3W6MX7lJjhPW10JidBYrpBoVRKl-nsEs8ciQgpzuAXHGfTz7aHB019YJtv2le5Nt529NDVfuX0_LsnDUo1v2ni3rLHP5IolEE7f3gXctYL4u-_asmYNVakF8QuD3xRtFBIG7fx9lCZVJ65BBNws8Hm-OOqllCmQ-vX94SgA_FlsDUwl3Y01mj3Ktez7C7z1k6OJFXghcgmBGWnZLheknlAUfvmrjHtoPWcfwxHUXP7ZinWV-bIUQgvPsKxeK7SxqAQUOYm7JEECw%3D%3D)

Upon the election of Joe Biden to the presidency **[I gave up my career in the intelligence service- along with my security clearance - to run for Congress](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=16afe60b080f4a5f8b0edfe58445e3cb&_e=GjznP-fNgkNe7vG5BSAc34YQ_2ELVnM6kJ0l9ByxW0ZMsYib227cjsIaie2y-w7vMqr-ToB4OqFEr3SQehyLXVyg6nkJabV6ikdKjdSE9DKCyKrTS_DVPK16BQMubkkV8SnBry8Sb5ddL6TkVFpBo7Echmmr7L3Pa4dTp_EimWbsOOcQXLsxluoZrPxRoGV2pR2ecHB5xQlP9uWZFuXQDoyqqXFFKdCSL8NPFvGIEiq75PMWpYp9Pz90-vKtJYxL2EWchN1vgs3W6MX7lJjhPW10JidBYrpBoVRKl-nsEs95CzJzLeDWP2O572Ux8qDCAWYOz1n1Jn8rRjWPJ9cIBv88VSirnX3Wzlpq4WKetENwQO1u9H0ckqhodYJnyrvehSCRHCYDGxpfbGAEwwlz2Xj3ZLLihBgiRXY2gUDUjajaFqA8LMY7qZ3T2AHpmnx1n-am5QMJdTzTeiXgI8DDWs0-41IaJddhMrBOARKZ8xqzXx8uC6kkkzyfNF4IiRdV7jVq4rUFCg3M3IXkurxgdQ%3D%3D)**. I did this because I’m scared to death that Biden is going to repeat the same mistakes of President Obama, and we’re all going to pay the price.

name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: Judicial Watch Sues HHS for Biodistribution Studies for the Pfizer, Moderna and Johnson & Johnson Vaccines
body:
Judicial Watch, the government watchdog group, announced today that it filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) for biodistribution studies and related data for the Pfizer, Moderna, and Johnson & Johnson vaccines (Judicial Watch v. U.S. Department of Health and Human Services.

---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | Sep 20, 2021
---|---|---
## Today's Top Stories
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56716&L=25876&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvanctdmFjY2luZXMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDkyMDIyMTcwOQ==) | **[Judicial Watch Sues HHS for Biodistribution Studies for the Pfizer, Moderna and Johnson & Johnson Vaccines](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56716&L=25876&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvanctdmFjY2luZXMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDkyMDIyMTcwOQ==)** Judicial Watch, the government watchdog group, announced today that it filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) for biodistribution studies and related data for the Pfizer, Moderna, and Johnson & Johnson vaccines (Judicial Watch v. U.S. Department of Health and Human Services [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56716&L=25876&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvanctdmFjY2luZXMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDkyMDIyMTcwOQ==)
---|---
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56716&L=25870&F=H&) | **[DHS Unit that Averts WMD Attacks Obligated $9.5 Mil to Test Illegal Aliens for COVID-19](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56716&L=25870&F=H&)** The specialized Homeland Security unit charged with preventing weapons of mass destruction (WMD) attacks against the United States obligated $9.5 million to test illegal immigrants for COVID-19 in Mexican border crossings. The costly operation, described as “short-term” in a federal audit, lasted less than two months and tested around 22,000 migrants primarily in the Del Rio and Rio Grande Valley Border Patrol sectors in Texas. The Department of Homeland Security (DHS) bureau, known as the Countering Weapons of Mass Destruction (CWMD) office, evidently stepped in because Customs and Border Protection (CBP), the frontline DHS agency, was crushed with an onslaught of illegal immigrants in the throes of a global pandemic. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56716&L=25870&F=H&)
---|---
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56716&L=25862&F=H&) | **[Obama Program to Expand Migrant Youth Entry Returns with Broadened Eligibility](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56716&L=25862&F=H&)** A revived Obama program to allow more migrants under the age of 21 to come to the U.S. legally will begin accepting new applications this week and has been expanded to assure more candidates qualify, the Biden administration announced via the State Department. Known as the Central American Minors (CAM) Refugee and Parole program, it was initially launched in 2014 so youths from Guatemala, El Salvador, and Honduras with a relative in the U.S. could qualify for asylum without having to apply in person as is customary. The Trump administration terminated the program in 2017 and earlier this year the Biden administration said it was “reinstituting and improving” it. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56716&L=25862&F=H&)
---|---
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56716&L=25877&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvbmV3LWZkYS1yZWNvcmRzLWh1bWFuaXplZC1taWNlLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA5MjAyMjE3MDk=) | **[Judicial Watch: New FDA Records Show Purchases of Fetal Organs, Heads and Tissue for ‘Humanized Mice’ Project](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56716&L=25877&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvbmV3LWZkYS1yZWNvcmRzLWh1bWFuaXplZC1taWNlLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA5MjAyMjE3MDk=)** Judicial Watch received the records through a March 2019 Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the U.S. Department of Health and Human Services, of which the FDA is a part (Judicial Watch v. U.S. Department Health and Human Services (No. 1:19-cv-00876)). The lawsuit asks for all contracts and related documentation on disbursement of funds, procedural documents and communications between FDA and ABR for the provision of human fetal tissue to be used in humanized mice research. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56716&L=25877&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvbmV3LWZkYS1yZWNvcmRzLWh1bWFuaXplZC1taWNlLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA5MjAyMjE3MDk=)

U.S. Department of Health and Human Services == ---|--- | | | | = | = The specialized Homeland Security unit charged with preventing weapons of mass destruction (WMD) attacks against the United States obligated $9.5 million to test illegal immigrants for COVID-19 in Mexican border crossings. The costly operation, described as “short-term” in a federal audit, lasted less than two months and tested around 22,000 migrants primarily in the Del Rio and Rio Grande Valley Border Patrol sectors in Texas. The Department of Homeland Security (DHS) bureau, known as the Countering Weapons of Mass Destruction (CWMD) office, evidently stepped in because Customs and Border Protection (CBP), the frontline DHS agency, was crushed with an onslaught of illegal immigrants in the throes of a global pandemic. = ---|--- | | | | | A revived Obama program to allow more migrants under the age of 21 to come to the U.S. legally will begin accepting new applications this week and has been expanded to assure more candidates qualify, the Biden administration announced via the State Department. Known as the Central American Minors (CAM) Refugee and Parole program, it was initially launched in 2014 so youths from Guatemala, El Salvador, and Honduras with a relative in the U.S. could qualify for asylum without having to apply in person as is customary. The Trump administration terminated the program in 2017 and earlier this year the Biden administration said it was “reinstituting and improving” it. ---|--- | | | | = | = Judicial Watch received the records through a March 2019 Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the U.S. Department of Health and Human Services, of which the FDA is a part (Judicial Watch v. U.S. Department Health and Human Services (No. 1:19-cv-00876)). The lawsuit asks for all contracts and related documentation on disbursement of funds, procedural documents and communications between FDA and ABR for the provision of human fetal tissue to be used in humanized mice research. = ---|--- | | | = Just the News Officials say Judge Christopher Cooper’s ties to leading Democrats and key figure in discredited Trump-Russia probe should disqualify him from case of Michael Sussmann, lawyer who fed anti-Trump dirt to FBI while hiding connection to Hillary Clinton campaign. = The Daily Caller The Food and Drug Administration assured the Daily Caller News Foundation Friday that it has not entered into any contracts “for the purchase of human fetal tissue” since 2018. The agency’s response follows the release of documentation obtained by Judicial Watch showing that the FDA procured fetal organs, tissue, and heads for research that involved “humanized mice.” = American Thinker Much to many Californians' disappointment, Gavin Newsom won his election recall, and did so by a wide margin. name: Laura Loomer
subject: The Left wants COVID to win . . .

body:
I want to thank you and everyone else for your prayers and well wishes.
| | | [](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/M78929kxNuNn60XLWYAKh8rg/f3i9Er4sWOxSy763mvajc9Cw)
Patriot,

[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/M78929kxNuNn60XLWYAKh8rg/f3i9Er4sWOxSy763mvajc9Cw) I want to thank you and everyone else for your prayers and well wishes.

Over this last week, I’ve seen the best and worst of America from my bedroom as I recover a bad case of the China virus.

Despite the radical Left and media's hopes that I lose my battle with COVID, I’m getting stronger every day!

My dogs, Loomer and Mecca, are getting anxious from their lack of walks, but I’m doing all that I can to rest and load up on therapeutics that will speed up my recovery from Covid.

While I want to cover a few things, first, [**we’re 10 days away from the FEC deadline**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/M78929kxNuNn60XLWYAKh8rg/f3i9Er4sWOxSy763mvajc9Cw) and we need to catch up on our campaign fundraising goals!

If you haven’t already done so, please [**pitch in whatever you can to help me beat Do-Nothing incumbent Dan Webster**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/M78929kxNuNn60XLWYAKh8rg/f3i9Er4sWOxSy763mvajc9Cw) in my run for Congress in Florida’s 11th District.

I have to raise $12,000 by the end of the week. [**If you can donate $25, I’ll just need 599 others to do the same.**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/M78929kxNuNn60XLWYAKh8rg/f3i9Er4sWOxSy763mvajc9Cw)

Now, I was LIVID over the weekend when I saw that the _Daily Mail_ ran with a headline FALSELY saying that I was encouraging my supporters to “get vaccinated and wear masks”.

**That is a patently false headline and I’ve demanded a retraction.**

As I’ve always said, this is a personal choice – and for me, the vaccine and masks are a no-go.

**The Coronavirus with all of its “variants” is here to stay.** By the way, if you haven’t figured it out, the final variant is COMMUNISM.

Canada, Israel and other nations are proof-positive that despite a majority of residents being vaccinated, the virus will still spread.

The vaccine DOES NOT prevent you from getting COVID.

| | [SEND LAURA LOOMER TO CONGRESS](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/M78929kxNuNn60XLWYAKh8rg/f3i9Er4sWOxSy763mvajc9Cw)
---

The solution isn’t masks and “jabs”, it’s these very simple steps:

* Protect our elderly while allowing them to make their own personal choices.
* If you’re concerned about severe symptoms with COVID, if you’re able, take care of yourself. Eat right and get healthy.
* If you’re worried about it or have a compromised immune system, make the decisions that are best for your situation.

**The Biden Regime’s mandates show the total hypocrisy and overreach of government.**

Obesity related deaths have been the leading cause of death in America for decades, claiming over 650,000 Americans each year.

Where is the Biden Regime on Obesity? Where is Congress?

They’re where our government has always been: **making Americans fatter and sicker**.

| [SEND LAURA LOOMER TO CONGRESS](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/M78929kxNuNn60XLWYAKh8rg/f3i9Er4sWOxSy763mvajc9Cw)
---

Hundreds of billions of tax dollars go toward subsidizing junk food ingredients by propping up the sugar, corn, wheat, rice, soy and milk industries.

**Today, two-thirds of Americans over the age of 20 are overweight. Forty-two percent of us are obese.**

COVID deaths are directly tied to our obesity rates. That’s beyond dispute.

But the solution isn’t banning Big Macs and Big Gulps. **It’s overhauling the government that’s making us fat, keeping us sick and grossly overmedicated.**

You can help make that happen with me. [**Just help me get to Congress by supporting my campaign today.**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/M78929kxNuNn60XLWYAKh8rg/f3i9Er4sWOxSy763mvajc9Cw)

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

P.S. I just want to remind you that I have 10 days left before the end of the quarter. My opponent will be raising money like crazy with the help of the political establishment, and I have to raise $12,000 this week to be competitive. [**Help me get there today.**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/M78929kxNuNn60XLWYAKh8rg/f3i9Er4sWOxSy763mvajc9Cw)

| [SEND LAURA LOOMER TO CONGRESS](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/M78929kxNuNn60XLWYAKh8rg/f3i9Er4sWOxSy763mvajc9Cw)

Obesity related deaths have been the leading cause of death in America for decades, claiming over 650,000 Americans each year. Where is the Biden Regime on Obesity? Where is Congress? They’re where our government has always been: making Americans fatter and sicker. | Hundreds of billions of tax dollars go toward subsidizing junk food ingredients by propping up the sugar, corn, wheat, rice, soy and milk industries. Today, two-thirds of Americans over the age of 20 are overweight. Forty-two percent of us are obese. COVID deaths are directly tied to our obesity rates. That’s beyond dispute. But the solution isn’t banning Big Macs and Big Gulps. It’s overhauling the government that’s making us fat, keeping us sick and grossly overmedicated.** You can help make that happen with me. Respectfully, Laura Loomer P.S. I just want to remind you that I have 10 days left before the end of the quarter. My opponent will be raising money like crazy with the help of the political establishment, and I have to raise $12,000 this week to be competitive. | Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes.
