name: Margaret (BAMPAC)
subject: You gotta see this video, Peter...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Black America's PAC
body:
Peter, they're coming after him like nothing I've ever seen... -
| | | | Dear Peter, I wanted to make sure you didn't miss the important message Alvin sent this past week. He's counting on you to read and respond to his email (see below). Thank you! \- Margaret
---
* * *
| | | | |
---
| | | |
---
| | | | Dear Mr. Willis, The Democrats and their mainstream media comrades have unleashed an unbelievably despicable assault on Burgess Owens in a desperate plot to destroy his reputation within the Black Community... ...because this fearless Black conservative is exposing their racist lies and reclaiming Black voters from the Democrat Party like never before. [](https://www.bampac.org/endorseburgessowens?recruiter_id=55042&info=2021EA1004&sal=Peter&utm_content=EndorseBurgess&utm_client=BPAC&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021ea1004&n=1) **I'm hoping you'll sign your personal endorsement to _reelect_ Burgess Owens to Congress _this_ _election_...** **...but first let me explain why Democrats are so terrified of Congressman Burgess Owens.** [](https://www.bampac.org/endorseburgessowens?recruiter_id=55042&info=2021EA1004&sal=Peter&utm_content=EndorseBurgess&utm_client=BPAC&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021ea1004&n=2)Burgess is a former NFL star & Super Bowl Champion, conservative author, and frequent guest on Fox News and conservative talk radio... ...and he's one of the fastest rising Black conservatives in America because he's fearlessly standing up and fighting back against the Democrats' racist lies & radical agenda _at_ _every_ _single_ _turn_. Burgess Owens is a rock-solid conservative through-and-through, he relentlessly fights for our values, and _he's_ _not_ _afraid_ _to_ _tell_ _it_ _like_ _it_ _is_... | "The Democratic Party looks at the black race as objects... They look at us as something they can bring out every four years, use and then put aside until the next four years. Now, we're sprinting off this plantation, and I'm so excited to see it."
---
As you know, the Democrats ruthlessly slander Black conservatives like Burgess Owens, Tim Scott, and myself in order to destroy our credibility, trust-worthiness, and status within the Black Community...
...because, _unlike conservatives of any other race_ , we can speak directly to the Black Community to expose the Democrats' lies & hypocrisy.
**But they're coming after Burgess like nothing I've ever seen!**
Maybe that's because he's taken the lead on the nationwide effort to reach out to Black voters with the truth. _He's_ _made_ _it_ _his_ _mission_ _to_...
**☐** | **Expose** the Democrat-backed Marxist plot to divide-and-conquer America with racist, hateful rhetoric and propaganda
---|---
**☐** | **Reclaim** enough Black voters to cripple the Democrat Party for decades to come
**☐** | **Break the chains** of the Democrat Plantation that's enslaving Blacks in a mental prison of resentment, victimization, & dependency
"Misery is a powerful tool the left uses. They keep people miserable, hopeless, angry and racist... and that's what divides us."
---
Burgess has quickly earned a reputation for fearlessly calling out Democrats on their lies and hypocrisy, and his damning critiques of the Democrat Party are spreading like wildfire within the Black Community.
He's opening their eyes to the race-baiting LIES by unmasking the Democrats as opportunistic, self-serving politicians who've done nothing but prey on Blacks for decades with lies, empty promises, and failed policies...
**...igniting an exodus of Black voters from the Democrat Party.**
**The Democrats are Desperate to Defeat Burgess Owens...**
...because they know that without their death-grip of at least 90% of the Black vote, it'll be nearly impossible for them to win any more elections.
That's why they poured **_$12 million_** into their failed bid to stop Burgess from retaking Mia Love's former seat back from Democrats last election...
...that's why they're desperately funneling _even_ _more_ _money_ and resources into taking him down _this_ _election_...
...that's why he's at the top Nancy Pelosi's 2022 Target List...
...and that's why they've launched such a vile, racist assault on his character and reputation so early in this critical U.S. House race.
**It's painfully obvious the Democrats are terrified of Burgess Owens, and they'll stop at nothing to SHUT HIM UP!**
And that's why your signed endorsement to Burgess Owens is so important!
| "I think the world of you. I fully endorse and support your candidacy, you're a good man with a great heart." \- Sean Hannity
---|---
Once you sign your endorsement, I'll send it directly to Burgess so he'll know patriotic conservatives like you have his back as he takes the fight to the Democrats!
Along with your signed endorsement, I pray you'll also make an urgent donation of $28, $40, $75 or more to help recruit as many of your fellow conservatives to endorse & support Burgess Owens as we can get.
Or perhaps you understand how important Burgess Owens is to reclaim Black voters from the Democrat Party, and you'd like to do more to help?
Your generous donation of $250, $500, $1000 or more will help purchase the critical advertising needed to beat back the Democrats' attacks and propel Burgess Owens to victory _this_ _election_!
| "Burgess is a friend of mine who has the deepest of character and integrity. He is a man born for these times." \- Glenn Beck
---|---
**Remember, the Democrats have unleashed an all-out assault to destroy Burgess Owens because he's empowering Black voters to leave the Democrat Party once-and-for-all...**
**...and the Democrats know that without their stranglehold on Black voters, it'll be impossible for them to ever win again.**
[So please join Sean Hannity, Glenn Beck, Donald Trump, and thousands of your fellow patriots in endorsing Congressman Burgess Owens today...](https://www.bampac.org/endorseburgessowens?recruiter_id=55042&info=2021EA1004&sal=Peter&utm_content=EndorseBurgess&utm_client=BPAC&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021ea1004&n=3)
[...and please include an urgent donation of $28, $40, $75, $250, $500, $1000 or more to help beat back the Democrats' vicious attacks and propel Burgess Owens to victory this election!](https://www.bampac.org/endorseburgessowens?recruiter_id=55042&info=2021EA1004&sal=Peter&utm_content=EndorseBurgess&utm_client=BPAC&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021ea1004&n=4)
[Or if you can't afford that much right now, then please send $20.22, $15, or whatever you can as a symbol of your support.](https://www.bampac.org/endorseburgessowens?recruiter_id=55042&info=2021EA1004&sal=Peter&utm_content=EndorseBurgess&utm_client=BPAC&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021ea1004&n=5)
Thank you, and God Bless.
|
Alvin Williams
President
---|---
| | | |
---
| | | | © Black America's Political Action Committee Paid for by Black America's PAC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions are not tax deductible for income tax purposes. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year.
---
You're receiving this email because you support Black conservatives like Burgess Owens, John James, and Tim Scott. If you're giving up on these patriots, then please [click here](https://www.bampac.org/unsubscribe?e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021ea1004&n=6) to STOP receiving emails from Black America's PAC.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: Let's do this
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
Changes need to be made |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=0d83af9c37&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,

My name is Mark Finchem. I am a proud America First State Representative in the State of Arizona who has been leading the vanguard in America’s Audit in Maricopa County.

**A few days ago, President Trump endorsed me to be the next Arizona Secretary of State**
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=9d33d7d2e7&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| _I know this last week there has been bombshell after bombshell coming out of the Maricopa. And I know it’s a lot to keep track of._

This is why I am writing you today...

I have a big announcement –

**_I am officially calling for a State-Wide Door-to-Door Voter Roll Verification in Arizona – and[I need your help](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=9e651147e1&e=44b8c466b0)._**

Such a massive endeavor does not come without a cost, and to get this done we need to take the Election Integrity movement to the NEXT LEVEL!

**I need all patriots to rally together. President Trump is standing behind us with his recent endorsement. Together we can take back Arizona.**

_[Can you show your support? We have an urgent fundraising goal of $75,000 by the end of the quarter, just a few weeks away!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=3ec8c98ba9&e=44b8c466b0)_
[***Help us reach our fundraising goal!***](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=471f9c8415&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=1b1fc54328&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| I was just on the One America News Network to talk about the terrifying results of a grassroots canvassing effort into the voter rolls. While this is not part of the Audit being conducted by the Senate, it does raise some worrisome implications.

The Executive Summary from the report reads:
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=767ab2659e&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| With 173,104 votes suspect, even if a small fraction of those were due to fraud, then it is absolutely clear that the Arizona election needs to be decertified IMMEDIATELY and strong work needs to be done to verify the voter rolls.

_We need a door-to-door verification of these voter rolls to ensure exactly which votes were not counted and WHY._

**And then we need to lock everyone responsible for this Democracy-Destroying fraud up in prison. For a very long time.**

But this will take a momentous effort. This is all hands on deck. And I need your urgent support to get us to the end of the quarter.

_[We need to raise $75,000 by the end of the quarter to keep the momentum going. My campaign to defend Election Integrity depends on you! Can you help out with a donate of $25, $50, $100, $250, or more today?](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=56278d1fbf&e=44b8c466b0)_

**[I am still $65k SHORT of my goal and need your help right now.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=3d514b800e&e=44b8c466b0)**

Friends and Patriots, this has been a long and illuminating journey for us all.

**When I first paid for the election integrity hearings out of pocket, I knew there were severe problems with the election in 2020. **

**_I had no idea the depths of corruption and fraud that these investigations could reveal._**

But I want to leave you with a message of hope. You may feel dismayed, threatened, and even silenced by the Democrats. You may feel like if they can steal the election in 2020, what’s the point?

**Here’s the point. It is not over, the fight is not yet lost. Every day we are winning battles for Election Integrity and the end of the war is in sight. The victor in this war will be determined by who is more persistent, louder, and more passionate.**

_[Will you let the Democrats voices be louder, pockets be deeper, and armies be more persistent?](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=28195c512a&e=44b8c466b0)_

**Of course not! We are Republicans. We are Conservatives. And we never back down from a fight.**

_[Show your support today so we can win the fight. And we WILL win the war for Election Integrity!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=b87f182341&e=44b8c466b0)_
[Thank you for your support!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=f3bbe480a3&e=44b8c466b0)

God Bless You,
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=287e9a972b&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

P.S. President Trump just endorsed my campaign. We must raise what is needed to defeat the corrupt Democrats. I have to raise $75k by the end of this month to meet my fundraising numbers. [Will you contribute $15, $35, $100 or more to help me get there?](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=016025d06e&e=44b8c466b0) Every amount helps!

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2021 Mark Finchem for Secretary of State, All rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
Mark Finchem for Secretary of StatePO Box 69344Oro Valley, AZ 85737
[Add us to your address book](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=13a68e4f44) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=13a68e4f44).

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bill=20Olson?=
subject: FL has it right. Biden has it wrong.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Biden wants fear, not solutions |
---
| | [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=cf04f5089f&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Hi Peter,

Vaccination is a personal choice! It should be left to a free people to evaluate the risk and decide for themselves.

Joe Biden doesn't believe we are a free people, and all his actions say that he intends to be a tyrant to us.

THAT means we have a moral duty to oppose him!

**My name is Bill Olson, and I am the Christian patriot and combat vet [running to take back a tossup district](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=567a98b4ad&e=afa21b7626), Florida’s 9th District in the Orlando area. It's currently held by Democrat Darren Soto, who supports Joe Biden in all he does!**

Biden has been doing more crazy things to distract to his failures.

Inflation exploding. The Afghanistan debacle. Invasion on the Southern Border.

So many failures. That's why he is suddenly focusing on persecuting some Americans "on behalf of" others!

FOX News reports:

_Vice President Kamala Harris raised eyebrows on Sunday with her tweet urging Americans to help protect already vaccinated people in order to end the COVID-19 pandemic.

"By vaccinating the unvaccinated, increasing our testing and masking, and protecting the vaccinated, we can end this pandemic. That’s exactly what we are committed to doing," Harris tweeted.

Harris’ tweet was no exception and was met with criticism and confusion.

"’Protecting the vaccinated’ is an odd argument since the vaccinated are already, you know, vaccinated. And the vaccine works in keeping one out of the hospital 99.99 percent of the time per the data," Fox News contributor Joe Concha responded.

**Former Trump administration staffer Kyle Hooten asked, "Why do you need to protect the vaccinated? Doesn’t the vax do that?"**

Fox News contributor Kate Pavlich called Harris’ message "bizarre" and noted the Biden administration appears to be "taking credit for something...the vaccine is supposed to do." _

So why is Biden persecuting unvaccinated people to "protect the vaccinated"? I mean, doesn't that sound ridiculous on its face?
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=83f416e7b9&e=afa21b7626)
---
| The evidence has always been there that Biden is using COVID measures as political weapons- to punish enemies and reward friends. More evidence of this came this week, when Biden attacked Gov. DeSantis while choking off supply of anti-COVID medicine to Florida!

_The Biden administration is taking over the distribution of the antibodies, which are used to treat COVID-19, and the Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) will now be in charge of distribution.

DeSantis strongly criticized the decision on Thursday because it will result in Florida receiving fewer monoclonal antibodies than it previously had. He pledged to "fight like hell" to get the treatment to those in Florida who need it.

Fact Check: Has There Ever Been a Mandated 'AIDS Vaccine'?READ MOREFact Check: Has There Ever Been a Mandated 'AIDS Vaccine'?
NEWSWEEK NEWSLETTER SIGN-UP >
"Just last week, on September 9, President Joe Biden said that his administration would be increasing shipments of monoclonal antibodies in September by 50 percent," DeSantis said at a press conference in Broward County, Florida.

"And yet, on September 13, HHS announced that it was seizing control of the monoclonal antibody supply and that it would control distribution."

DeSantis went on: "We're facing a massive, massive cut in monoclonal antibody treatments abruptly. Just after the president said they would have a 50 percent increase, we're now seeing more than a 50 percent cut for the state of Florida. So we're going to fight like hell to make sure that our folks get what they need."

The Republican governor said Florida could purchase the antibodies directly from pharmaceutical company GlaxoSmithKline.

President Biden also took aim at DeSantis through his official Twitter account on Thursday.

"Republican governors in states like Texas and Florida are doing everything they can to undermine the public health requirements that keep people safe," Biden tweeted.

Under the Biden administration's new plans for monoclonal antibodies, Florida is set to receive 27,850 does of Regeneron this week. That's significantly less than the weekly average of 72,000 that the state's clinics and providers had been ordering, according to DeSantis' office._

Once again, Biden is putting Floridian lives at risk because of his personal hatred of Gov. DeSantis. Florida has the nation's greatest proportion of senior citizens. OF COURSE WE SHOULD HAVE THE GREATEST AMOUNT OF TREATMENT, GIVEN HOW THIS DISEASE AFFECTS SENIORS!

Joe Biden wants senior citizens to die. He wants Floridians to die.

Ron DeSantis is right. Florida has been doing everything right WHILE also protecting our freedoms. And Joe Biden has been doing just the opposite.

**The proof? Florida's new infections are plummeting, not even among the top states in infection rate. The most infected states are all the Blue states impeding on the freedom of their citizens!**
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=6468b34b3a&e=afa21b7626)
---
| **Florida is doing right by its citizens, thanks to Gov. DeSantis but NO THANKS to Joe Biden!**

I am vaccinated, that was my choice. But I support the rights of our citizens to make their own choices! Florida leads America in the percent of senior citizens vaccinated- almost 90%. People are perfectly capable of making the choices right for them.

_But why aren't Republicans in Congress pushing back against Joe Biden? Do they agree with all his failures and all his tyranny?_

We must use the power of Congress to grind Biden's out of control regime to a stop. Defund Biden!

_I will stand up for Floridians against Biden's disastrous agenda. Darren Soto will not._

What Biden has done is impeachable. Elect me and let's impeach him!

Right now it's all on the governors, but we need stronger leaders in Congress to help! [Help me get elected and impeach Biden!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=2771b49ffe&e=afa21b7626)

[I must raise $25k by the end of this month for my end-of-quarter deadline. Will you help me get there by contributing right now?](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=d52d302a28&e=afa21b7626)

No more "nice guy" Swampy politicians.

[Thank you for your support!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=411b20f3df&e=afa21b7626)
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=c3107b0bb4&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Bill Olson
Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars
Supports President Trump
Not a Career Politician
Hard Core Conservative Fighter
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=08c2bcf305&e=afa21b7626)
---
| P.S. [I have a big deadline coming up at the end of this month and need to raise $25k before then. Can you help me reach my goal?](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=cb51f89c41&e=afa21b7626)
---
| |

[Add us to your address book](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a9a8add464)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a9a8add464&e=afa21b7626&c=0621b496a8) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a9a8add464&e=afa21b7626&c=0621b496a8).

Friend — Jeff here.

I’m worried about the future of our country.

**As Governor,****Steve Sisolak has always been committed to protecting reproductive freedom for every person in Nevada.**
Steve signed the Trust Nevada Women Act**** into law to remove harmful restrictions on Nevadan women’s right to choose. And he’s put women’s health first by investing in family planning services and reproductive health care and leaving personal decisions up to pregnant people and their healthcare providers.
**_With reproductive rights under attack across the country, the last thing Nevada needs is Dean Heller as a last line of defense._**
**[Steve needs all hands on deck to fight back against this latest opponent and keep this Battleground State blue. name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Action Needed to Stop Mandates
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=don_t_let_biden_retarget&n=1)
---
Peter \-- I don't hardly recognize this country right now. Both Joe Biden and Tim Walz have shown a complete disregard for our health freedoms. **The rule of law and the Constitution does not matter to the political elite and their followers in the COVID cult. We're led to believe we need to trade in our health freedoms for their false sense of protection.** There's never been a more important time in our lives to stand up and fight against the political class than now. And we know exactly how to do that. Politicians said we would never be able to End Walz' Emergency Powers as long as Democrats were in charge. But we proved them wrong in June by being the only split legislature to remove a lockdown governor's powers. We accomplished this by creating overwhelming political pressure on politicians in St Paul! Over 55,000 phone calls were made and 40,000 doors were knocked in carefully targeted legislative district across Minnesota. This forced politicians to do the right thing, because they feared the costs to them at election time for not acting. **We can do this same thing again to Stop Vaccine Mandates in this state. Which is why I have my field team working around the clock, calling voters all across Minnesota right now.** We're also running digital ads to build our army... [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=don_t_let_biden_retarget&n=2) But I'm afraid we will not be able to win this battle if we don't have the resources to keep our pressure campaign going. So I need your help. **Peter, can I count on you to make a donation to our pressure campaign so we can Stop Vaccine Mandates in Minnesota? Please help our organization fight in the trenches for your freedoms against the political elite who seek to destroy them!** | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=don_t_let_biden_retarget&n=3 "Donate") [Donate](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=don_t_let_biden_retarget&n=3)
---
The political elite, from Walz up to Biden, want us to sit at home, complain and do nothing about it. They assume Republican legislators will be too cowardly to fight them on the vaccine mandates.
## But we aren't going to let that happen!
Politicians can ignore you and me. But they can't ignore tens of thousands of angry voters, all contacting them about passing the Rep Erik Mortensen's **Stop Vaccine Mandates** Amendment.
Help us get the message out to tens of thousands of more Minnesotans by [**donating today**](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=don_t_let_biden_retarget&n=4). And equip us with the resources to hire phone callers to keep the pressure on politicians.
[**Please make a donation of $100, $50 or even $25 to Stop Vaccine Mandates and stand up to the Biden Administration. We simply can't afford to lose this battle**](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=don_t_let_biden_retarget&n=5)!
**In Liberty,**
****
**Jake Duesenberg**
**President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty
1920 Oakcrest Ave #5
Roseville, MN 55113
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=don_t_let_biden_retarget&n=6).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=don_t_let_biden_retarget&n=7).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=don_t_let_biden_retarget&n=8), software for leaders.

Fellow American, the left is coming. Senate Democrats see my conservative campaign as a threat to their progressive agenda - even though THEY ARE CRIPPLING HARD-WORKING FAMILIES.

But Democrats don't get it, Fellow American. Because the harder they come at me - the more I train to get ready to beat them.

I strive on being the most prepared person in the room, and this campaign for the U.S. Senate is no different. **[But I need your help to win.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=8dae69f927f344f0ac41db4ca268ff79&_e=TCB3ulEW_MR0YjgvQ7EzWvlKtyNsJcIiOdneqXFCxmkLmuL01TCWS0fBowaR3OannxK1xtV_Tzq3OQbpcQ-fnEejh77SGY50Xj5rh8Ok4XJlROTqfZpiL7P3miWPgLw0NuN0s2tS5s_I8ITphXZNJAG2x47XEONmHJy3kSIobh2pCo217beT3qJQYR2PyMAQJtgwK5st0YR_Gj8klkUxNs8e7YsQsJLhpEwqVemuUzVv7rkaHj751XdTtWBu_WV_4BuYzgJpXKr5zCEdziMNGPX383-AX-T5Vcs7OjoK-rjgzEsFSIDbxG6vzg6C7GXdSxA1BDdZPIWlt1qmhLxov4ZNt1Jgjbx-a6CQrogTcmJVXqqekhKH6jQamheiVBB_1GMSA5RLYc3jyc4bEa2xgegRiVsmeQ_pUmgzAnNqxghh8zt2Km3iD0gzrD1W_Cy8vzjEX_EpaCc9yEg7dEqp_lzqfdGGD_Y7CqOxyV4LVro%3D)**

subject: Team Russo Weekly Update 🎉
body:
Block parties, breakfasts, and big canvass launches! | | | |
---
| | |
## Team Russo volunteers were busy this weekend, !
---
|
---
* We knocked on over 3,000 doors across five counties
* Called 2,000 voters across the district
* Held a series of [conservation visits](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=102b248d2a&e=400a181d5a) in Perry County
* Enjoyed the [Ohio Pawpaw Festival](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=0b66e95fa6&e=400a181d5a) and [Hocking County Fair](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=e7b73d330d&e=400a181d5a)

| [JOIN US NEXT WEEKEND](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=abc37f4f5c&e=400a181d5a "JOIN US NEXT WEEKEND")

### Pickerington Block Party, Saturday at 11:30am
Join Allison Russo and local Pickerington candidates for City Council and School Board at our fall block party! We'll be registering our new neighbors to vote and hanging out with free food, music, and fun for the whole family! RSVP and bring some friends!
|

---
### SEO Labor Breakfast with Allison
Calling all union members! The SEO Central Labor Council and AFSCME are hosting a breakfast with Allison this Sunday at 10:30am.
|
---
| [ ](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=569475d147&e=400a181d5a)
---
### Bobcats Meet & Greet on Campus, Sunday at 1pm
Join OU Dems and Allison for lunch and conversation with OU students on campus. There will be pizza!

body:
They are gunning for the seat I flipped last cycle I’m afraid if we don’t stay on track, this seat will be vulnerable to the radical-Left and all our work to flip it last cycle will be for nothing. | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=5020538bdc8144dda6a9ed6108a68f63&_e=1-q1P7abqrc_6xxoKp-v7LqqBLbcIgCZ_0tjW-cNn5C_-sK7WUMA7zDzVIpTreRxBFWom3h_X05SUJpEetMhvHvTz6VXvD0pM3HhFkP-qnXtqnBG6oImGl0VfS46jTKufbBafzmd4IeFuvsrQgojh9tHPmXwIbHHq3TLWWANR2lKYIjo9FZ3BFfET0eGyFG5uRX436Ad69-Dv6Xm8ZOHsIjs3Z6WNsKFsCZBQA_X7ndRXI0pawSiJ8drDvB50mgA9gTSKnb78jFy29Vml1t2tamhSJuHF6CGBhQYt_h3LBukzqIoi0LHaguku12BkrD8_Q4UZWW28KjpUTuxC3r1E8tlnHws_e3DmOahfe4a46ictJ3b6JqhXIQJlU5DqjK7B5vx5nKkcxDDO1dyQe_ThkhTTk7r5jiMFZyWrkcd2DeejNURYJSZk0IxtDGpGHySdfXJn7WgFmuKVqO6EaF5ABbS9VJg8QwpB84GiZF97B8%3D)

Fellow Conservative -

The news just broke: progressive Democrat Gabe Vasquez announced today he is running against me in New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District - **the seat I flipped from the Democrats last cycle.**

The Left will stop at nothing to force their socialist agenda on America, which is why **they are directing all their resources towards unseating any Trump-supporting conservative who stands in their way - starting with ME.**

Now that I have a challenger that has access to the Democrat Machine and their limitless pocketbooks, [**I am going to need to build an even bigger team of grassroots conservatives to protect this Republican seat.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=5020538bdc8144dda6a9ed6108a68f63&_e=1-q1P7abqrc_6xxoKp-v7LqqBLbcIgCZ_0tjW-cNn5C_-sK7WUMA7zDzVIpTreRxBFWom3h_X05SUJpEetMhvHvTz6VXvD0pM3HhFkP-qnXtqnBG6oImGl0VfS46jTKufbBafzmd4IeFuvsrQgojh9tHPmXwIbHHq3TLWWANR2lKYIjo9FZ3BFfET0eGyFG5uRX436Ad69-Dv6Xm8ZOHsIjs3Z6WNsKFsCZBQA_X7ndRXI0pawSiJ8drDvB50mgA9gTSKnb78jFy29Vml1t2tVo_nIrG6XJWBvF-lMnBRH8t3GdI9ke-WOsj7aeKpYzrcY7Ih5Nxbbmi9w4Di6jvfnZizfADnxeNeeE1ejDJcD6BGY8omwMZ2ZT-5sWCyLpsW5Ajsw3cTOMEEiIkT5_oCutkOeAJf3sUD7q2NmJFgY1LLTH5UtQO_DDdNu1tMWOtMsYKXDR7gLRmFY0G6yhlkHa_MWH39UnjkmbSdgf-cTU%3D)

[**JOIN THE FIGHT NOW -> **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=5020538bdc8144dda6a9ed6108a68f63&_e=1-q1P7abqrc_6xxoKp-v7LqqBLbcIgCZ_0tjW-cNn5C_-sK7WUMA7zDzVIpTreRxBFWom3h_X05SUJpEetMhvHvTz6VXvD0pM3HhFkP-qnXtqnBG6oImGl0VfS46jTKufbBafzmd4IeFuvsrQgojh9tHPmXwIbHHq3TLWWANR2lKYIjo9FZ3BFfET0eGyFG5uRX436Ad69-Dv6Xm8ZOHsIjs3Z6WNsKFsCZBQA_X7ndRXI0pawSiJ8drDvB50mgA9gTSKnb78jFy29Vml1t2tSjDwuQKQHWPTLDXgpjs5rgzm_0IU2yYJBvusNj1YWxXANUGBxvKv2HwMT-PRQQYNZ4AtYmMUGbKej_DgISeUzOPUGwHBMSW022tHtJwxyY3PQ04_LNNBvpVVBQvX0P80snhZtOPP2gD0IT5nlsSH5K2PhwZtXcU_sOE0r-NXKGNl-2d-8xqBbs5pTreWOtQgVmuIqsSoZ6voFRpL3nETcg%3D)
You may not live in New Mexico, but I need you to invest in my reelection race for one big reason, Fellow Conservative...

Democrats are gunning for our incumbent House members across the nation to derail our momentum in the fight to take back the House. **If we lose even a single Republican seat, the math gets tougher and tougher for us to flip the House and finally FIRE Nancy Pelosi.**

New Mexico - and our country - cannot afford to have another Democrat like Vasquez who blindly supports Joe Biden and Kamala Harris’s radical liberal policies. **Simply put - if the Democrats gain back control of this seat, we will see the seemingly endless list of crises facing our citizens worsen here in New Mexico and across the nation.**

[**Fellow Conservative, if you care about the future of our country, and care about protecting the conservative New Mexico values I have fought relentlessly for in the House, we need your immediate support. clean_body: They are gunning for the seat I flipped last cycle I’m afraid if we don’t stay on track, this seat will be vulnerable to the radical-Left and all our work to flip it last cycle will be for nothing. | BREAKING: Fellow Conservative - The news just broke: progressive Democrat Gabe Vasquez announced today he is running against me in New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District - the seat I flipped from the Democrats last cycle. The Left will stop at nothing to force their socialist agenda on America, which is why they are directing all their resources towards unseating any Trump-supporting conservative who stands in their way - starting with ME. Now that I have a challenger that has access to the Democrat Machine and their limitless pocketbooks, You may not live in New Mexico, but I need you to invest in my reelection race for one big reason, Fellow Conservative... Democrats are gunning for our incumbent House members across the nation to derail our momentum in the fight to take back the House. If we lose even a single Republican seat, the math gets tougher and tougher for us to flip the House and finally FIRE Nancy Pelosi. New Mexico - and our country - cannot afford to have another Democrat like Vasquez who blindly supports Joe Biden and Kamala Harris’s radical liberal policies. Simply put - if the Democrats gain back control of this seat, we will see the seemingly endless list of crises facing our citizens worsen here in New Mexico and across the nation. We can put an end to the Democrats’ thinly-veiled attempts to fundamentally alter our entire nation - but to do so, we need to elect a Republican majority. Thank you, Yvette Herrell (R-NM) | Born and raised in New Mexico, Yvette Herrell served for 4 terms in the New Mexico House of Representatives. Derek- We have a lot at stake in this election this year and this is definitely the most important election to date here in the Commonwealth. Nothing proved that more than the first gubernatorial debate last night. Glenn Youngkin spent the majority of the time calling Governor McAuliffe a liar, calling him an extremist radical, denying making statements about outright criminalizing abortions that he had been recorded saying, and denying support for his own campaign from former President Donald Trump. But one thing was clear: **Glenn Youngkin and his supporters are aiming to drag Virginia backwards and undo decades of progress. **
---
| [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953z6-9VUgKeUYQwxrRLQUXXKV091c7YKecWGqoSdOvorxD64_cvaGX5_wIYHSbWWWLxzHnFo2BixrwQhgET7ygaKtrZUG2jTwBL_BY24oPM7zb8k-kQ-mQT9GWD8IRjXcF56qXUq2N6Z9BVlq95PXIAT7cMeJnwEMQKSvFSXply49KOjApaZyNVK_Y81428hfJrH_cbd1GwLMrJvQDFQ_prbv77RrfAWzDcr7QX895XyakV4J5IthrilvSvTChVVuXksuz_W7O24vi_gY08GDHv61oqgPJuDQu_c3gsmJS0kglH_ObjmZj-tXvO3t1_-uu2P4FAv_rXpkg2G6W8eiL7NiQYIgpKaiOVDhs9OwIgvIg/3fh/1DISCiTSS1O98i5tOXh-qw/h1/0myj_mFVK1e4Eb_ZJPpSPLXAV5IW_oY4wh6VjvYmz0E)

**[Help Us Protect Virginia](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953z6-9VUgKeUYQwxrRLQUXXKV091c7YKecWGqoSdOvorxD64_cvaGX5_wIYHSbWWWLw_BfDExFxBw2pTpLvw68n-W9SbnDV7kyyPLy8ySR2WQRBW9snY91wwog2E2awU4zpefVaQe-yeC7Y2-FLdUqthjl6kz6noBKPXRwL8iaN0ZZ-pNaLoXY_-jPOMZ_k5H4AWqEG2cRyUzCgXIvXpmUTV-jBRguLgRCEQj6c8rtFBTaDrS5cnS7U40UnbXdGg9ciZFos_KeFPKlXdr_STaK1hBPQbYl2U4Om-Cbf2_2HNTYQWEI-BkByWB6AfJdnXQcSPSMhm97UrLVl6eyxADpuzuIGqNmExz_vd4alZFIwoCQ/3fh/1DISCiTSS1O98i5tOXh-qw/h2/TNTz3fDYmNbfeX0kUCTQ1PSH4ZuS4iWTVij1RLzgPgQ)** Reproductive rights and access to quality reproductive health will be all but eliminated under Glenn Youngkin, who stated that the thing that was wrong with the Texas Abortion Ban was that it was "confusing and unworkable." Workers' rights and economic justice will be taken backwards because Glenn Youngkin does not believe in the worker's right to organize, nor does he believe in paying all workers a living wage. Our environment will continue to be in jeopardy and we will never be able to meet our environmental goals because Youngkin believes that clean energy will only lead to "blackouts and brownouts" and that we need to continue to use fossil fuels to power our energy grid. Glenn Youngkin proved that he had a grave misunderstanding of racial and social justice when he quoted Martin Luther King Jr. last night by saying that he wanted a world "where our children are not judged by the color of their skin," when talking about opposing teaching history on racism and injustices in our country. **[Join us and fight agains this backwards thinking](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953z6-9VUgKeUYQwxrRLQUXXKV091c7YKecWGqoSdOvorxD64_cvaGX5_wIYHSbWWWLzkU7x_uQPhr5vQmZjiF5bKIPDX50j3ZaJAnoDQsKvHnTqG-xnFKr-tl43K0Y5Y2_cwbFvI9rltGaBFRMI0Yxyg2MqgRRKBs9WPQdFAz5YSPlggYb38oVV5NlW7KLG852XJWUt7JD-4Q8cta4HHdpDk_n7V2gPh-5r_hYAP_kg6K_K8CzcJsTplSPgFEPhxDlTHTldxg1HhTJqQAfbKkUUiCSX0_zMtPajIwzIDEpq55G_teqmoiouatjaSJ-gma3t5CnnttyzzQbIQVi2UOCMHnAf-thKEuEYNKWdTFUS-1g/3fh/1DISCiTSS1O98i5tOXh-qw/h3/u-U-knT3zVVozMGsEAjRPj4DqICdBSN_3f0XIC1xdCA)** We will admit that it's true. Terry McAuliffe was not our first choice in the primary. However, right now, he is the best and only option for us to move Virginia forward and on day one, we will be bringing our Progressive ideas to his desk, just like we have done with our own President Joe Biden and even our own Senator Mark Warner. We will continue to bring our ideals and values to their doorstep to make sure that they know what their voters want to see. Governor McAuliffe will be on the side of progress for all Virginians, and yes, while we all have different variations of how far that progress should go, for right now, we will take some steps forward rather than one huge leap backward. Our party is a big tent and it takes all kinds to continue to move us forward. All great movements have been built by alliances between progressives and moderates. Progressives bring passion, energy, and movement building into the fight, while moderates bring calculated approach, negotiation, and pragmatism into it just right beside them. But the fact of the matter is that we need each other. Iron sharpens iron and right now, none of us can afford to sit out. So we are asking you directly. If you want us to continue to move in the direction that we have been fighting so hard for, we need you to go and vote. Even if you feel like you are not as excited about this ticket as you would have been with other candidates: if you want to continue to have a Governor that you can at least reason with and have a conversation with, you need to get out and vote early. We would much rather have someone in office who shares 85% of the values and policy stances that we have, than someone who wouldn't even open the door for us. clean_body: | | Derek- We have a lot at stake in this election this year and this is definitely the most important election to date here in the Commonwealth. Nothing proved that more than the first gubernatorial debate last night. Glenn Youngkin spent the majority of the time calling Governor McAuliffe a liar, calling him an extremist radical, denying making statements about outright criminalizing abortions that he had been recorded saying, and denying support for his own campaign from former President Donald Trump. But one thing was clear: Glenn Youngkin and his supporters are aiming to drag Virginia backwards and undo decades of progress. | Reproductive rights and access to quality reproductive health will be all but eliminated under Glenn Youngkin, who stated that the thing that was wrong with the Texas Abortion Ban was that it was "confusing and unworkable." Workers' rights and economic justice will be taken backwards because Glenn Youngkin does not believe in the worker's right to organize, nor does he believe in paying all workers a living wage. Our environment will continue to be in jeopardy and we will never be able to meet our environmental goals because Youngkin believes that clean energy will only lead to "blackouts and brownouts" and that we need to continue to use fossil fuels to power our energy grid. Glenn Youngkin proved that he had a grave misunderstanding of racial and social justice when he quoted Martin Luther King Jr. last night by saying that he wanted a world "where our children are not judged by the color of their skin," when talking about opposing teaching history on racism and injustices in our country. We will admit that it's true. Terry McAuliffe was not our first choice in the primary. However, right now, he is the best and only option for us to move Virginia forward and on day one, we will be bringing our Progressive ideas to his desk, just like we have done with our own President Joe Biden and even our own Senator Mark Warner. We will continue to bring our ideals and values to their doorstep to make sure that they know what their voters want to see. Governor McAuliffe will be on the side of progress for all Virginians, and yes, while we all have different variations of how far that progress should go, for right now, we will take some steps forward rather than one huge leap backward. Our party is a big tent and it takes all kinds to continue to move us forward. All great movements have been built by alliances between progressives and moderates. Progressives bring passion, energy, and movement building into the fight, while moderates bring calculated approach, negotiation, and pragmatism into it just right beside them. But the fact of the matter is that we need each other. Iron sharpens iron and right now, none of us can afford to sit out. So we are asking you directly. If you want us to continue to move in the direction that we have been fighting so hard for, we need you to go and vote. Even if you feel like you are not as excited about this ticket as you would have been with other candidates: if you want to continue to have a Governor that you can at least reason with and have a conversation with, you need to get out and vote early. We would much rather have someone in office who shares 85% of the values and policy stances that we have, than someone who wouldn't even open the door for us. So we need you to help out, anyway you can. If you can't donate your time, if you can't donate your money, See Y'all Out There, KTBBH Team | | KTBBH takes its initials from the late great Henry Howell who said he would "Keep the Big Boys Honest." That's what Progressives need to do now in the Commonwealth of Virginia. We rely solely on everyday donors like you to make sure that we support elected officials who only answer to you, the people.
